Name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
User_Review:
Plates at Cinnamon Grand has been our go-to spot for all our family birthday celebrations, and it never disappoints. The ambience is warm, the food is consistently delicious, and the service is truly exceptional.

A special highlight of our visits has always been the outstanding service from Mr. Dishira. He is incredibly attentive, genuinely friendly, and goes above and beyond to ensure we are comfortable. No matter the request, he is always willing to go out of his way to accommodate us, and his professionalism and personal touch truly make every celebration feel special.

We would also like to extend our appreciation to Mr. Prabhu, who has been extremely helpful with our reservations. He is efficient, polite, and always does his best to arrange our bookings exactly the way we need, making the planning process smooth and stress-free.

Thank you to the wonderful team at Plates for consistently delivering such a memorable dining experience. We look forward to many more celebrations with you!

Name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
User_Review: Excellent location, super central in Colombo with easy access to taxis! Smooth check in and check out process, the reception and staff were very hospitable!! Lobby and restaurants in the hotel were great. Room was comfortable and clean. Bathroom was modern. The Cheers Pub and Lobby Cafe were some of the highlights of our stay! Amazing food, would stay again and recommend. Pool was great and the staff offered to hold our luggage until the airport taxi arrived.

Name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
User_Review:
Cinnamon Grand Colombo is one of the best places to stay in the city. The front desk staff are exceptionally friendly and very helpful, making every guest feel truly welcome.

The rooms are spacious, comfortable, and well maintained, offering a relaxing stay whether for business or leisure. One of the real highlights here is the food—there are many restaurants to choose from, each serving delicious and varied cuisines. The breakfast spread in particular is excellent.

All the staff are attentive and courteous, always ready to go the extra mile. The hotel’s pool, gym, and other facilities make the stay even more enjoyable.

Overall, Cinnamon Grand offers comfort, great service, and fantastic dining options all in one place. Highly recommended!

Name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
User_Review:
I had the chance to enjoy the Saturday lunch buffet at Cinnamon Grand, and it was a delightful experience from start to finish. The spread was impressive, with a wide variety of options to suit every palate.

The sushi station was definitely a highlight — fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The shooters added a creative and refreshing touch to the meal. The main courses were equally satisfying, with tender meats, tasty sides, and a good mix of international and local dishes.

The dessert corner was another standout, offering an incredible variety of sweets that made it almost impossible to pick just one.

On top of all this, the staff were very friendly and attentive, providing excellent service that made the whole experience even more enjoyable.

Overall, Cinnamon Grand’s Saturday buffet is a wonderful combination of great food, warm hospitality, and a welcoming atmosphere. Definitely worth visiting!

Name: Cinnamon Grand Colombo
User_Review:
I went to Cinnamon Grand with my family for the lunch buffet while we were holidaying in Sri Lanka and it was really good! My favorite part was the sushi section. They had so many different kinds and it tasted super fresh. I went back a few times just for that.

The chefs were also making seafood right there, and it was cool to watch. The food overall was tasty and there were lots of choices, even for kids.

The desserts looked really nice. I tried the coconut toffees and the handmade chocolates.

It was busy but the people working there were nice. I liked that we could try so many different things, and I had fun. Will definitely visit there again.
From Nisith - 10 years

Name: Shangri-La Colombo
User_Review:
We recently stayed at Shangri La to celebrate my daughter’s birthday, and it couldn’t have been more special. The staff went above and beyond, especially during breakfast where I was surprised with a beautifully presented birthday treat and warm wishes from the team. It was such a thoughtful gesture and really made my day feel extra special.

What also stood out was the flexibility and kindness of the front desk staff – they graciously allowed a late checkout, which gave us time to relax and enjoy the last moments of our stay without feeling rushed.

From start to finish, the service was exceptional. It’s clear the team genuinely cares about making guests feel welcome and appreciated. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a place that adds those personal touches that make all the difference.

Name: Shangri-La Colombo
User_Review:
Excellent place to stay and fine. Rooms are large and very well-appointed with all necessities. Check-in does take time, but the staff is very helpful.
Opt for the MAP package. Both Breakfast and Dinner had a lot choices of cuisines and the buffet was well planned and extensive. Food was excellent.
The Hotel is attached to a reasonably sized Mall with a lot of International labels and domestic top retailers. The Mall has direct access from the Hotel.
Right in front of the Hotel is a strip beach that you can walk around, though no swimming was allowed.

Name: Shangri-La Colombo
User_Review: Attended my son's wedding at Shangri-La. The view from the room was beautiful. Old 2V CLI and Military Hospital Buildings gave the former Lower Lake road (Baladaksha Mawatha) memories. Lower Lake Road had been shifted near to the Beira Lake. Old 2V CLI, Or's Mess, Quarters and WO's and Sgt's mess had been demolished for the road. There were three functions at the assigned location of the wedding but the noise and crowd were well controlled. One typo error was noticed. Food was excellent and the staff were well versed with the wedding crowd. Tables were well prepared and frequently supervised. Washrooms were clean and frequently attended by the staff, even noticed a senior manager visiting and observing the condition of wash washrooms. When there was an issue with a washbasin in the room complaint was smoothly handled, and the maintenance person attended to it very quickly. Air quality was well maintained. Staff were courteous and well-trained. They showed what a Star Class means by their actions.

Name: Shangri-La Colombo
User_Review:
Shangri-La Colombo truly sets the standard for luxury hospitality in Sri Lanka. From the moment you step in, you're welcomed with elegance and warmth. The service is exceptional the staff are professional, friendly, and always attentive to every detail, ensuring a seamless and personalized experience throughout your stay.

The food is absolutely outstanding, offering a wide range of local and international cuisine with rich flavours and high quality presentation. Whether it’s the buffet, à la carte dining, or desserts, every dish is thoughtfully prepared and delicious.

One of the highlights is the ballroom, which is spacious, beautifully designed, and ideal for weddings, corporate events, or gala dinners. The ambiance, lighting, and decor add a touch of class and sophistication, making any event feel truly special.

The hotel’s interior design and atmosphere reflect modern luxury with cultural touches, offering breathtaking views of the ocean and city. The rooms are spacious, well maintained, and filled with all the modern amenities you need.
Whether you're staying for leisure, a special event, or a business trip, Shangri-La Colombo delivers excellence on every level luxury, service, food, and overall experience. Highly recommended for anyone looking to enjoy the best Colombo has to offer.

Name: Shangri-La Colombo
User_Review: The hotel is very luxurious with a great location overlooking the ocean and close to the city center. The staff were friendly and professional, and the service was excellent. The rooms were clean, spacious, and well-designed with beautiful views. Facilities like the pool, spa, and restaurants were also impressive. Overall, it was a wonderful stay and I would definitely recommend this hotel for anyone visiting Colombo.

Name: Galle Face Hotel
User_Review:
Historic hotel located on the beach, this place is worth a visit even if you're not staying here. It has close to 150 years of history with their guest list including Yuri Gagarin, Mountbatten, Nehru and even Harrison Ford (there's a hotel museum in here that's worth a visit). There are multiple restaurants within the building, some of them with an ocean view and the food is fantastic as expected.
I stayed in the hotel for a couple of days - the rooms were well equipped, and the staff were courteous and helpful throughout. Finding your way in the hotel can be challenging, so make sure you ask for help if you're lost inside!

If you're visiting colombo, plan to stay / visit here, you won't regret it.

Name: Galle Face Hotel
User_Review:
We stayed at the Galle Face Hotel for one night as a couple with our 10-year-old child during our vacation. The location is absolutely unbeatable — right by Galle Face Green and just a short walk from One Galle Face Mall. The setting feels truly royal, and the historic architecture gives the entire property a timeless charm.

The ambience is grand, with beautiful antique furniture and elegant colonial-era design that makes you feel like you’re stepping into history. However, the room service could be improved — we had to ask for basic amenities like a dental kit, and one staff member accidentally shut the door so hard that a painting fell off!

Although we didn’t dine at the hotel, the restaurants looked inviting, offering a variety of cuisines in a classy setting.

Overall, it’s a beautiful, heritage hotel with a majestic location and vintage charm, but a few service touches could make the experience truly five-star.

Name: Galle Face Hotel
User_Review: I attended a wedding at the Galle Face Hotel, and everything was executed flawlessly. The service was impeccable from the moment we arrived. The staff were attentive, professional, and made sure all the guests were well taken care of. The highlight for me was the food—the buffet was one of the best I've ever had at a wedding. The variety and quality of the dishes, from the local Sri Lankan curries to the international options, were outstanding. The dessert bar was a particular favorite! It's a top-tier venue, and they clearly know how to host a grand celebration.

Name: Galle Face Hotel
User_Review:
We had out pre-wedding mixer and had several friends stay at the Galle Face Hotel and we cannot be happier with how it all went.
This hotel is a masterpiece in all its historical glory and is well worth the price. Could not believe how cheap it was.
Also a HUGE thank you to Efani who went out of her way to make it all happen so seamlessly.

Name: Galle Face Hotel
User_Review:
Really enjoyed our stay at Galle Face Hotel. The room was clean and comfortable, the food was great, and the views were amazing. Hotel staff were friendly and professional — we were treated really well as local guests, which we appreciated.

Only issue was with the spa. We were told there’s a 40% discount under the resident offer, which the hotel confirmed. But the spa staff said there was no such offer and weren’t helpful at all. There was a slot available, then suddenly it wasn’t. Later, the hotel admitted it was a miscommunication on their end and that the spa hadn’t been informed properly. Still, the way the spa handled it was disappointing, so we skipped it.

That aside, everything else was great. Would happily return — just hope the spa team gets better aligned next time.

Name: Taj Samudra Colombo
User_Review: We stayed at Taj Samudra twice within a week on two separate occasions, and both experiences were wonderful. The service was exceptional — warm, attentive, and genuinely caring. The hotel, though an older property with incredible charm and a beautiful sense of history, is beginning to show signs of age and could benefit from some attention to detail and upkeep. That said, its grand spaces, lush gardens, and serene walking areas make it truly special. Dinner at Golden Dragon was excellent — the Chinese food was authentic and full of flavour. The swimming pool and health club are also great, adding to the overall experience. Despite a few signs of wear, the hospitality and warmth of the staff make Taj Samudra a memorable and delightful place to stay in Colombo. I will be back for sure.

Name: Taj Samudra Colombo
User_Review: We had the most amazing time here. Staff is friendly and super welcoming, we spent loooots of time talking with everyone as they all gave us recommendations on what to do and where to go. Chaminda at breakfast showed us the best app to check trains in Sri Lanka. Our room was facing the ocean which was amazing, especially at sunset. We had the club lounge access and Amar was kind enough to make special drinks for us. The room is spacious and comfortable, massive bathroom with a bathtub and shower. We tried all the restaurants on sites and wooow, all delicious, Japanese was our favourite tho. Thank you so much for having us, we’ll be back for sure 🥰

Name: Taj Samudra Colombo
User_Review:
We had a mixed experience during our stay. The ocean-view room was lovely, check-in was smooth, and room service was excellent. However, the in-dining breakfast experience was disappointing. The buffet options were boring and some items, like the sausages, were almost inedible. While they did offer live counters for dosa, omelets, and waffles, most of the time the staff forgot to bring the items to our table even after taking our order and table number. Over our 5-day stay, this happened repeatedly, leaving us waiting and often losing our appetite.:

Traveling with our 2.5-year-old was also a challenge, as the hotel had nothing to offer for children—no play area, no activities, not even simple things like coloring materials. Compared to other 5-star properties that make families feel welcome, this was quite disappointing.

Additionally, the hotel seems designed primarily for businessmen. For example, there was no power outlet near the mirror for hair styling—only a socket clearly mentioned for men’s trimmers. If the hotel is truly intended just for business men , they should not accept family bookings at all, It felt like the needs of women and families were overlooked.

Overall, good experience. But a little more attention to details would have been even more better.

Name: Taj Samudra Colombo
User_Review: We had the most magical experience celebrating our wedding at the Taj Samudra Hotel in Colombo. Every detail was perfect, and the entire team went above and beyond to make our day unforgettable. A special thank you to chef Neranjan for the exceptional cuisine, Ms Samudra Fernando, and Captain Kinsley for their flawless organization of the wedding ceremony and reception. Your dedication and attention to detail made our wedding truly memorable. We are deeply grateful and highly recommend the Taj Samudra for anyone looking for a luxurious and seamless wedding experience.

Name: Taj Samudra Colombo
User_Review:
The staffs provide the experience of Taj's International hospitality.
At the restaurant the decisions they take to serve customers is extremely commendable.
Service with a smile comes naturally..
The experience at the swimming pool was one of special. The passion in his work that Jalath exhibits reflect the way it's kept - absolutely commendable..

Name: Hilton Colombo
User_Review: Exceeded all expectations from well appointed room, warm welcoming food and delicious food options. The pool and fitness facilities were an added bonus as was the live music in lobby and pool area. Landscapes gardens and pond with water feature and fish only adds to the charm. Location is superb, close to mall, waterside and other attractions

Name: Hilton Colombo
User_Review:
My recent one-day stay at the Hilton hotel was absolutely wonderful. From the moment I stepped into the lobby, I was greeted with a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The check-in process was incredibly smooth and efficient, and the staff was friendly, professional, and genuinely happy to help.

The room was pristine and beautifully decorated, providing a perfect sanctuary for my short visit. The bed was exceptionally comfortable, ensuring a great night's sleep. I was also impressed by the attention to detail, from the cleanliness of the bathroom to the thoughtful amenities provided.

What truly made the experience memorable was the exceptional service. Every interaction, whether with the front desk, the restaurant staff, or housekeeping, was a testament to the hotel's commitment to excellence. The staff went above and beyond to make me feel valued and comfortable.

I highly recommend this Hilton location for anyone looking for a top-tier hotel experience. I will definitely be returning for a longer stay in the future!

Name: Hilton Colombo
User_Review:
All in all, a pleasant stay at Hilton Colombo. While it didn’t quite feel like a full 5-star experience, the front of house staff were a real highlight. Bakhti and Daniel, in particular, stood out — friendly, attentive, and professional. Bakhti even arranged a lovely cake and decorated the room for my parents’ anniversary, which was a really thoughtful touch.

The breakfast was a bit chaotic, and the food and drink quality could be improved, but despite that, the hotel is a great base for exploring Colombo. It is very safe, secure, and gorgeous, with a lovely courtyard featuring a water feature and swans. I’d happily recommend it for a comfortable stay.

Name: Hilton Colombo
User_Review:
It was our first time in Sri Lanka, and we are so glad we chose to stay at Hilton Colombo. From check-in to check-out, everything was seamless and well-managed. A special thanks to Duty Manager Mr. Chamith for his warm hospitality, as well as the two lovely ladies who assisted us during check-in and kindly showed us around our room (we missed their names this time, but we’ll surely mention them in our next visit!).

The breakfast was fantastic with a wide variety of options, and we truly enjoyed dining at The Wok restaurant, so much that we went twice! Compliments to the chef for his incredible cooking skills, and heartfelt thanks to the service staff for being both professional and genuinely friendly.

We also loved the live music in the evenings, the entertainment band was simply amazing. To top it off, our spa experience was excellent. Both my husband and I had a relaxing massage, making our stay even more enjoyable.

Overall, it was a memorable and delightful experience at Hilton Colombo, and we’re already looking forward to coming back on our next trip to Sri Lanka.

Name: Hilton Colombo
User_Review:
Our experience at Hilton Sri Lanka was exceptional. From the moment we checked in, the service was seamless and attentive. Zainab and Romesh went above and beyond to ensure both myself and my children were well taken care of, making the stay feel truly personal. The children especially appreciated the thoughtful gesture of receiving complimentary Hilton Kids Club polo tees, which made them feel very special.

Every aspect of our stay was memorable, from the swimming pool and room service to dining at the Chinese restaurant, which was a particular highlight. We also returned to enjoy the Japanese high tea, which was a delightful experience.

Overall, Hilton Sri Lanka provided an outstanding stay, combining warm hospitality with exceptional service. We are truly grateful for such a special and memorable highlight to our vacation.

Name: Marino Beach Hotel
User_Review: I recently visited this place and had a wonderful experience. The food was extremely tasty — fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. Every dish I tried was delicious and exceeded my expectations. The customer service was excellent, with staff who were polite, friendly, and attentive to every detail. The cleanliness of the restaurant was impressive, and the overall hygiene was very well maintained. It felt comfortable and welcoming from the moment I walked in. I truly appreciate the care and effort the team puts into providing both great food and great service. I would definitely recommend this place to others.

Name: Marino Beach Hotel
User_Review:
We visited Marion Beach Hotel on 15 September 2025 for their dinner buffet to celebrate my birthday. The buffet was priced at Rs. 5,700 per person, which felt fair compared to high-end buffets in Colombo. The atmosphere was relaxed with no strict dress code, so guests could dine comfortably even in casual wear.

The welcome was warm, and we were escorted to our table by a friendly hostess. Seating indoors turned out to be a good choice as the outdoor area got disrupted by rain. The buffet spread was good, starting with a light vegetable soup that I believe was pumpkin and ginger. The starters were nicely presented, but not all were labelled, which can be risky for people with allergies. Clear and consistent labelling would be a big improvement.

The main courses were tasty, and staff were polite, though they seemed short-staffed as we had to ask for water refills. The one real disappointment was that my wife had arranged a birthday cake in advance, even agreeing to pay extra, but it was never served or mentioned. For a special occasion, a simple gesture like this can go a long way in creating lasting goodwill.

Overall, Marion Beach Hotel offers a reasonably priced buffet with good food and friendly service. We left satisfied, but with the hope that the hotel pays attention to small details that can turn a good dining experience into an unforgettable one.

Name: Marino Beach Hotel
User_Review: This hotel offers a smooth and efficient check-in process, making your arrival experience quick and hassle-free. The rooms are beautifully designed, spacious, and well-maintained, offering great comfort and modern amenities. The pool area is absolutely stunning — large, clean, and perfect for relaxing with a view. Its location is excellent too, close to the beach, restaurants, and shopping areas, making it ideal for both leisure and convenience. Overall, it’s a perfect blend of comfort, style, and accessibility.

Name: Marino Beach Hotel
User_Review:
فندق متميز انصح به 💯

We had an incredible experience at this hotel! The room was not only spacious but also impeccably clean, equipped with all the essentials like complimentary toiletries, plenty of towels, two pairs of slippers, bathrobes, a water boiler, an iron, and a hairdryer. The TV offered a variety of channels in multiple languages, from Arabic to German, which was a nice touch. After our one-night stay, we headed to Bentota, but when we returned to Colombo, my family specifically requested to stay at this hotel again.
The food options were fantastic, and the staff was exceptionally friendly. Additionally, there’s a small mall nearby with various shops and restaurants. On our final day, we requested a late check-out, and they graciously accommodated us. A big thank you to the Marino Beach staff and to Vishvi specifically.. she was very friendly and helpful.. We can't wait to visit again!

Name: Marino Beach Hotel
User_Review: One of the best hotels in Colombo to visit. The rooftop infinity pool is nice and has beautiful views. The rooms are clean. The buffet breakfast is fresh and has many choices. The staff were kind and helpful. Everything worked well and we enjoy a lot during our stay.

Name: Movenpick Hotel Colombo
User_Review: Love this hotel. Staff is supportive and friendly.  Food is delicious.  Buffet is nice and has a large variety of items. Love the rooftop.  Highly recommend.

Name: Movenpick Hotel Colombo
User_Review: Good place to do a business conference. Calm place and easy access. Can obtain nice refreshments from the same place. Authentic Indian vibe with traditional decorations. As well as beautiful lacation for photos. Well equiped conference hall. Wish to visit again and again

Name: Movenpick Hotel Colombo
User_Review: The hotel was nice, clean, and the staff were very kind.

Name: Movenpick Hotel Colombo
User_Review: Went for dinner. The food was nice, and there were a lot of options to select. Service was good as well.

Name: Movenpick Hotel Colombo
User_Review: Our whole experience has been wonderful. All the staff are friendly and cater to all our needs. The rooms is perfectly presented everyday upon our return from our ventures around the city. The restaurants within the hotel prepare the most tasteful food. I cannot speak more highly of our overall experience but to thank them all so much. We would recommend this as the place to stay when visiting Colombo city.

Name: Jetwing Blue Negombo
User_Review:
We stayed one night at Jetwing Blue and had a lovely experience overall. The room was spacious, clean, and came with a bathtub in the washroom a nice touch that made our stay more relaxing. We especially loved the ocean view from the balcony.

The service was good, We tried both the dinner buffet and the breakfast buffet. While the breakfast buffet tasted slightly better, the variety was limited. I expected more seafood options at a beach resort, and the dinner buffet flavors were not quite up to the mark.
The highlight for us was the beautiful golden sand beach right in front of the property clean, wide, and perfect for a stroll.

Overall, it was a pleasant and comfortable stay, and we really enjoyed the room and beach atmosphere. With some improvements in the buffet variety and seafood dishes, this could easily be a 5-star experience.

Name: Jetwing Blue Negombo
User_Review:
Stayed here for three days and really enjoyed it. The location is perfect, the rooms are clean and comfortable, and the staff are incredibly kind and welcoming. Service throughout the stay was excellent.

The only thing that could be improved is the restaurant pricing, the menu mentions a 10% service charge, but the final bill adds 10% plus 23% in taxes, which isn’t clearly advertised.

Name: Jetwing Blue Negombo
User_Review:
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 Excellent Stay at Jetwing Blue!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Jetwing Blue, and it was an unforgettable experience from start to finish. The hotel perfectly blends luxury, comfort, and warm Sri Lankan hospitality.

The location is simply breathtaking – right on the golden sands of Negombo beach, offering stunning ocean views, especially during sunset. The rooms were spacious, spotless, and beautifully designed with modern amenities, ensuring a truly relaxing stay.

What stood out the most was the service. Every staff member went above and beyond to make me feel welcome, always greeting with a smile and attending to every request promptly. Their attention to detail and genuine care made the experience feel very personal.

The dining options were equally impressive – delicious local and international dishes, always fresh and full of flavor. The breakfast buffet had a fantastic variety, and dining by the sea made it even more special.

The facilities – from the pool to the spa – were excellent, creating the perfect atmosphere for both relaxation and recreation.

Overall, Jetwing Blue is a true gem in Negombo, whether you’re looking for a relaxing beach holiday, a romantic getaway, or a comfortable stopover before exploring Sri Lanka. I would highly recommend it to anyone and would love to return again!

Name: Jetwing Blue Negombo
User_Review:
I visited Jetwing Blue, for a one night stay as a family of four adults and booked a super deluxe quadruple room on a half board basis.

The booking process itself was very simple, made over the phone. I initially spoke to the front desk and then to the manager (Akhila) to discuss a few specifics. Both were extremely helpful and made the booking process a breeze, with a verbal order confirmation. I got the added benefit of an early check-in and late check out.

Arriving at the hotel, we were formally greeted and bags taken. I was fully taken with the service provided right from the moment we stepped in - absolutely amazing! We were greeted with cool fruit juices, warm towels, genuine smiles, and the ever endearing ‘Ayubowan’.

The room was top notch. Simply amazing. I was based on the second floor. The green painted wooden door, opened onto a cool blue tiled floor, and a floor to ceiling glass facade in front, revealing coconut mangroves, followed by a pristine sandy beach and the blue waters of the Indian Ocean. The room decor was simple yet rich, with teak furniture, and a large king bed, with two additional single beds. The washroom was interesting, having glass windows facing into the room, which could be completely covered with bamboo blinds for privacy. There was a large bathtub with salts and foam present, along with neatly stacked towels, a hair dryer and a host of other amenities beautifully displayed.

The meals at ‘The Kitchen’ restaurant were phenomenal at both dinner and breakfast. There was attention to detail in even the smallest of things. The spread was excellent covering both Sri Lankan and international cuisines, with every single dish boasting authentic flavours and mouth watering taste. Kudos to the chefs their superb culinary skills. Going into the details of the food items would itself entail a complete review unto itself. I do hope that the attached photos do some justice to what was presented.

The servers were quick on their feet, with a ready smile, rapid service, effortless plate collection, water refills, and finger bowl provisions. Hats off to the servers for making the place run like clockwork.

Time spent was largely between early morning and late evening sea swims, followed by mouth watering meals and some well needed rest in between.

From all the hotels I’ve stayed at over the years, this really does take cake, for service which is above and beyond the call of duty, for the friendliness and genuine interactions with all staff categories. I would definitely consider visiting Jetwing Blue again, if for nothing else but the excellent service provided.

Name: Jetwing Blue Negombo
User_Review:
We stayed at Jetwing Blue with our 10-month-old baby and had a fantastic experience. The staff were incredibly attentive and accommodating throughout. Our baby was always smiling when we went to the pool, the restaurant, or even just walking around — a real testament to the welcoming atmosphere.

Ben, the guest relations manager, regularly checked in to make sure we were well looked after. Because of this, I would happily rate the service 5/5.

Our room was spacious and comfortable, but some areas would benefit from renovation — especially the bathrooms and the corridor lighting at night. Overall, we were very comfortable, but I felt the rates were a bit high given the current room standard. I’d rate the room 4/5.

The pool was clean and well looked after, with attentive lifeguards keeping an eye on everyone, especially young children. There were plenty of sun beds, though many were in the shade.

The food was excellent, offering both Western and Sri Lankan options at all meals. We enjoyed every meal and would rate the food 5/5.

Overall, a great family-friendly hotel with outstanding service — we would happily return!

Name: Heritance Negombo
User_Review:
The Heritance Negombo is a wonderful hotel.  The location overlooking the beach is stunning.  The rooms are spacious and beautifully appointed with great views.  Service at the front desk is very friendly and helpful.

I ate breakfasts and dinners at the hotel restaurant.  Madu always greeted me with a warm smile and showed me to my table.  Samantha, who served us,  made sure our order was correct not too spicy.  I was impressed by their hard work and attention to detail.  In fact all of the restaurant staff  worked as a team to ensure you enjoyed your meal.  I will long remember the short but pleasant time I spent at your hotel.  Thank you.

Name: Heritance Negombo
User_Review: Stayed at this beautiful hotel for 6 nights. Hotel and rooms were excellent, pool area and gorgeous views were also great. Staff were genuinely the nicest friendliest helpful people you could meet as was everyone we met in Sri Lanka. Used the Spa twice and the ladies there were superb at what they do, one of the best massages I’ve ever had! Restaurant food was top quality and service impeccable, shout out especially to Rohitha who served us most days, professional and extremely friendly as was everyone, even the chefs went out their way to say hello. Thanks to every at Sentido for a fantastic stay, will definitely be back!

Name: Heritance Negombo
User_Review:
It is very large hotel with stunning views of Negombo Beach. The rooms were clean and comfortable, though there was a bit of wear and tear in some areas. I did notice that one of the pools is being been upgraded, which shows that the hotel is keeping up with maintenance. The main pool has a cool pool bar built into the pool, so you don't need to get up for drinks, simply order with a glass slid to you on the bar table!
The place was quite busy and I met many other tourists who also spoke positively about their stay. Overall, it was a pleasant experience in a beautiful setting.

Name: Heritance Negombo
User_Review: We only wish we didn’t start our 5-week stay here! It was so amazing that most of our other accommodations paled in comparison. We don’t normally stay in this kind of hotel as we tend to prefer smaller, less fancy hotels. But this was the perfect place to chill for 3 nights as we got over our very long flight to Sri Lanka. Our room was gorgeous, the staff were lovely, the pool was just what we needed and the buffet breakfast was so good!!!! We loved the location and walked one way along the beach and roads on one day and the other way on another day. Each day we walked well over 10km-15km and felt safe the entire time. The hotel is close to many restaurants and we highly recommend it for your stay in Negombo.

Name: Heritance Negombo
User_Review: Absolutely the best experience in Our Vacation. We were there for 3 Nights. Great Location and our Room was front of the swimming pool. Staff were exceptional and they took care of us well. We had great Breakfast. The vibe was wonderful, warm and welcoming. View from the hotel is absolutely amazing. Perfect balance and highly recommended!

Name: Camelot Beach Hotel Negombo
User_Review:
Rooms are clean and has got some of the best views. Service is amazing, staff doesnt fail to meet our needs!
This hotel is in right in front of the beach, easy access to the beach, got three swimming pools!
Loved every minute here, its very relaxing!
Will visit again!

Name: Camelot Beach Hotel Negombo
User_Review:
The hotel is very hot, the air conditioning in the room barely works, and without the additional fan it would be unbearable. We saw two lizards in the room. The key card for the room didn’t work, and we waited an hour for someone to bring us a regular key.
The food in the hotel restaurant is nice, but the portions in the à la carte restaurant are really small.
The pools and the beach are great.

The price of the accommodation is high for the level of service they provide.

Name: Camelot Beach Hotel Negombo
User_Review:
I didn't stay a night in the hotel, but my family (three kids and two adults) stopped in for a few hours for lunch and a swim in the pool before heading to the airport. They could not have been more welcoming. They are amazing.

We actually tried a place called Jetwing Blue before which was five times the price (literally) , not massively friendly, didn't really want us there. So instead we went to Camelot on the recommendation of some of the staff from Jetwing actually. And it was brilliant. They're really, really nice, gave us a great couple of sun loungers by the pool, really good food, possibly some of the best food we've had actually in Sri Lanka, and then helped us sort out transport to the airport. So five stars. Thanks guys.

Name: Camelot Beach Hotel Negombo
User_Review: Worst hotel experience in a long time: Over 1 hour waiting in reception for room (the hotel is virtually empty); outlets don’t work; room key doesn’t work; everything is dusty and dirty; they gave me probably the worst room in the hotel overlooking a noisy street (even though the hotel is on the beach and there are so many empty rooms); WiFi is terrible. I paid $17 last night at a budget hotel that was far superior. Don’t waste your money.

Name: Camelot Beach Hotel Negombo
User_Review: Thoroughly enjoyed our two nights stay, glorious weather moment of waking to sleep late. Very good staff. No complaints

Name: Club Hotel Dolphin
User_Review: Club Hotel Dolphin is a beach front resort with well maintained. It has a atmosphere with friendly and hospitality. The staff were very helpful, kind and respect,specifically Naduni at the reception. Food was really delicious and the large spread buffet. Rooms are very spaceous ,clean and tidy. Pool and environment of the hotel is very clean. Great view.

Name: Club Hotel Dolphin
User_Review:
Had an amazing time thanks to the Entertainment team and the entire hotel crew! Everyone was so energetic, friendly, and made sure guests were engaged and having fun throughout our stay. Their efforts truly added a special touch to the experience.
Thank you for the great service and unforgettable memories! Highly recommended!

Name: Club Hotel Dolphin
User_Review: The club hotel dolphin is an amzing hotel I have experienced in Negombo area. That staff was very friendly and helpful. Guest relations team pay their attention for each and every guest,specially Naduni. Buffet was very large with delicious cuisines. Entertainment are good. Clean and tidy emvironmnet

Name: Club Hotel Dolphin
User_Review: It was absolutely a nice place to visit. The service was good. The rooms were clean and good looking. They have a huge swimming pool. Specially Romesha assisted us a lot. But since we went there on a weekend it was really crowded, we had to go in lines to serve food from the buffet, and it would be better if there’s A/C on the lunch buffet area cuz it’s too hot.

Name: Club Hotel Dolphin
User_Review:
I recently visited Club Hotel Dolphin on a day-out package, and overall, my experience was mixed.
The hotel itself looks quite presentable, though I personally felt that it looks much better in the photos than it does in reality. On a positive note, customer service was good…
the staff were polite and helpful, which I appreciated.
The room we booked had basic amenities such as liquid soap and shampoo. However, the cleanliness could have been improved, as I came across a baby cockroach in the bathroom, which was disappointing.
The food, unfortunately, was the weakest part of the experience. While the presentation was nice, the taste did not live up to expectations and felt well below average. This was quite underwhelming, especially for a hotel of this reputation.
The highlight of the property is definitely the pool. It’s large, well-kept, and clearly the main attraction. If your goal is to spend the day swimming or enjoying pool activities like water polo, this hotel would be a good choice.
However, outside of the pool, there wasn’t much that stood out or created a wow factor.
Overall, I would recommend Club Hotel Dolphin mainly for its pool facilities, but not for those expecting exceptional food or a particularly memorable experience beyond that.

Name: Anantaya Resort Chilaw
User_Review: The rooms are spacious but a bit old. The phone was not working in one room. We took two rooms and there was an interconnection which was good. They arrange a cake for my mother’s birthday and the restaurant staff was really good. Front office is not at all supportive. Don’t forget to bring some water bottles coz they do not offer water or any other amenity on your checkout day and the two small water bottles they provide are not at all sufficient to manage the stay. Washrooms are good. Beach is sooo dry and all the grass has dried off showing very low maintenance in the hotel. If you are looking for a calm place to relax without much disturbance this is a good option.

Name: Anantaya Resort Chilaw
User_Review:
We stayed at Anantaya Resort & Spa Chilaw in a Deluxe Room. The room was spacious, comfortable, and had a bathtub, which we really liked.

The breakfast buffet was very nice with a good variety of tasty options — we really enjoyed it. There are two large pools with sea views, perfect for relaxing and taking photos.

The staff were friendly and helpful, and overall we had a wonderful stay. Highly recommend this place for a peaceful getaway by the sea!

Name: Anantaya Resort Chilaw
User_Review:
We stayed here during an office trip and were quite disappointed with the experience. The food quality was very poor, and there were a lot of flies around the dining area, which made it quite unpleasant. Service was slow — even simple requests took a long time to be attended to. Cleanliness was not up to standard either.

On a positive note, the rooms were big and spacious, but overall the stay didn’t meet expectations due to the poor food and service.

Name: Anantaya Resort Chilaw
User_Review:
I stayed at this hotel recently and while the staff were incredibly courteous and helpful throughout my visit, I unfortunately had a very unpleasant experience with the food. The hygiene standards at the buffet were shockingly low, and I ended up suffering from severe loose motion shortly after dining there.

It's disappointing because the customer service was genuinely excellent—friendly, prompt, and attentive. But the poor food quality and lack of cleanliness in the kitchen overshadowed everything else. I strongly urge the management to take immediate steps to improve food safety and hygiene.

Until then, I’d recommend this hotel only if you plan to eat elsewhere.

Name: Anantaya Resort Chilaw
User_Review:
Stayed at Anantaya Resort and Spa recently and honestly loved it. The rooms were very very nice, super comfortable, and the bathrooms were just as good. The place has a hugeeee lawn, more than enough space to walk around, play cricket. Loved chilling on the sun loungers too.

They’ve got two pools which was convenient for both wings. Overall, it was relaxing. The view from the rooms was beautiful. It was a chill, fancy and luxurious stay.

Name: Avani Kalutara Resort
User_Review:
We had a very pleasant stay at this hotel. The rooms were clean, comfortable, and well maintained. The staff were friendly, polite, and always ready to help. The food was delicious and had a good variety. The overall atmosphere was peaceful, making it a great place to relax.
A special thanks to Hiran and Achini for their exceptional hospitality and kindness — they truly made the stay even more enjoyable. Highly recommend this place!

Name: Avani Kalutara Resort
User_Review:
I had an amazing stay at Avani Kalutara Hotel! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel so welcome and comfortable. The service was truly exceptional — especially Achini and Hiran, who went above and beyond to make our stay memorable.

The food was absolutely delicious with a great variety to choose from, and every meal felt fresh and flavorful. The rooms were clean, spacious, and beautifully designed, offering a relaxing atmosphere with stunning views.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience filled with warmth, comfort, and top-notch hospitality. Highly recommend Avani Kalutara Hotel to anyone looking for a peaceful and enjoyable getaway!

Name: Avani Kalutara Resort
User_Review: I had a wonderful stay at the hotel! The room was clean and comfortable, and the service was excellent. I especially want to mention Amashi from the Front Office, who was incredibly friendly, professional, and helpful throughout my stay. She greeted me with a warm smile, handled check-in smoothly, and made sure all my needs were taken care of. Her excellent customer service truly made my experience more enjoyable. Thank you, Amashi, and the whole team, for making my stay so pleasant!

Name: Avani Kalutara Resort
User_Review:
This was my first visit to Avani Resorts. Overall, it's a good experience and I’d rate the experience 7.5/10.

The welcome was warm, and the refreshing welcome drink set a good first impression. The rooms were not very spacious but adequate for a comfortable stay. However, I did notice some sand and dirt in the corners, which gave the impression that the rooms had been prepared in a hurry. Aside from that, the washrooms were clean, well-maintained, and had both hot and cold water.

The buffet area was large, but the spread was rather average. The selection was just enough to meet expectations, Size of the dining area didn’t feel like fully matched the capacity of the hotel.

The pool area was clean and pleasant, but again, space seemed to be an issue. With the size of the hotel, the pool can get crowded easily, even though there’s also a kids’ pool available. It felt like the overall design didn’t fully consider the number of guests the hotel can accommodate at once.

If you’re planning to enjoy the seashore and waves, this is not a bad place, though the sea can be quite rough, so you need to pay attention to the warning flags.

One highlight was the staff; they were very friendly, accommodating, and went out of their way to handle all custom requests, which really added to the experience.

Name: Avani Kalutara Resort
User_Review: We recently had a full board outing at Avani Kalutara Resort with a group of colleagues, and it was an amazing experience! From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel welcome and well taken care of. A special thanks to Nishen from Reservations, Rishan, F&B Manager, Jayantha, Nimesh, Tharindi and Rovindi from the Reception for their outstanding service. Everyone was so friendly, attentive, and professional. The food was delicious, the service was top-notch, and the overall experience exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended for anyone planning a group outing or getaway!

Name: Turyaa Kalutara
User_Review: Its a wonderful hotel in Kalutara district with a nice beach.I specially thank for front office manager. He manage all things very properly. Rooms are very clean and roomservice is very good. In our check in time and stay period Dilki, Hiruni and Hirosha very friendly with us. I want to come again. This hotel management is very good.

Name: Turyaa Kalutara
User_Review:
We recently visited this hotel for our office family trip, and it turned out to be a truly memorable experience. From the moment we arrived, we were impressed by the size of the property and the way everything was managed so smoothly. The hotel is very spacious with enough rooms to comfortably accommodate a large group, yet the staff ensured that each of us received excellent service throughout our stay.

The restaurant was another highlight of our visit. It is large enough to handle big crowds, and I was amazed by how efficiently they provided such warm and attentive service even when serving many guests at once. The food was absolutely delicious with a variety that satisfied everyone, and the quality remained consistently high during our stay.

The rooms were very comfortable, well maintained, and provided everything we needed for a relaxing experience. The hotel also offers high-speed Wi-Fi, which was very useful for those of us who needed to attend to internet-based work. The environment around the property is calm, scenic, and creates a refreshing atmosphere, making it ideal for both leisure and work.

Overall, this hotel exceeded our expectations. It is a wonderful place to stay, and I would highly recommend it to others.

Name: Turyaa Kalutara
User_Review:
I had an amazing experience at this hotel from start to finish. The flexibility and hassle-free booking process made everything so smooth, and the staff went above and beyond to ensure a memorable stay.

The customer service was exceptional – every staff member was attentive, warm, and professional. A special thank you for the thoughtful arrangement with the bed décor and cake ,which made the occasion truly unforgettable.

The room was spotless, comfortable, and well-maintained, offering a perfect balance of luxury and coziness. The location was ideal, and we especially loved spending time at the pool, which was both relaxing and beautifully kept.

The food was excellent with a great variety and taste that exceeded expectations.

Overall, this hotel made our stay truly special, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a combination of comfort, service, and memorable experiences

Name: Turyaa Kalutara
User_Review:
We had a pleasant stay overall!

Room: Clean, comfortable, and well-maintained – very satisfied.

Food: Great variety and taste – definitely a highlight.

View: Beautiful and relaxing, perfect for a getaway.

Pool: Excellent facilities, clean and enjoyable for all ages.

Staff: Very friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

A few areas to improve:

The kids' play area could use some upgrades and better equipment to be more engaging.

Would definitely consider coming back.

Name: Turyaa Kalutara
User_Review:
Our stay was overall a moderately pleasant experience from start to finish. The staff were friendly and efficient in handling billing and registration. The beach was lovely, and the hotel itself was very clean and well maintained. The room and bathroom were spacious and spotless.

Dinner and breakfast were enjoyable, with a nice selection of dishes, and the happy hour with complimentary drinks was a lovely touch. On some evenings, there was live music and a party-like atmosphere, which added to the charm. We also appreciated that the hotel provided free accommodation and meals for our driver.

However, there were a few areas that could be improved. This was the only hotel we visited that did not offer refreshments on arrival. Lunch was not as impressive as the other meals, and we had to call several times to arrange the third bed and toiletries for the third guest. Additionally, there was a fire alarm at around 2.00 am (night),
which was quite disturbing — it would be great if such incidents could be better prevented.

Name: Royal Palms Beach Hotel
User_Review:
Royal Palm Beach Hotel is a wonderful place for a relaxing getaway by the sea. 🌴🌊 The location is excellent, right on the beach with stunning ocean views and a peaceful atmosphere. The garden areas and pool are well maintained, making it perfect for both families and couples.

The staff are friendly, attentive, and always willing to help, which really adds to the overall experience. Rooms are spacious, clean, and comfortable, with modern amenities. The food is also very good, offering a nice mix of local and international dishes.

Evenings by the poolside or beach are especially beautiful, with a cool breeze and the sound of waves. 🌅

Highly recommend this hotel if you’re looking for comfort, relaxation, and great service in a beachside setting

Name: Royal Palms Beach Hotel
User_Review:
We had a fantastic company day outing at Hotel Royal Palms, Kalutara. The customer service was excellent – the staff were very attentive and supportive throughout the day. The food was delicious, fresh, and hygienic, and the place was kept very clean and well-maintained.

The highlight for our team was the pool activities. One of the hotel staff members joined and guided us in pool games, which was such a fun and unique experience. None of us had experienced that in any other hotel in Sri Lanka, and it made our outing truly memorable.

Overall, it was a perfect place for a team outing – great service, tasty food, cleanliness, and something extra special!

Name: Royal Palms Beach Hotel
User_Review: What a wonderful stay! From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make me feel welcome. The room was cozy and beautifully maintained, with a stunning view. The food at the restaurant was fantastic, and the overall atmosphere made me feel relaxed and cared for. I look forward to coming back soon!

Name: Royal Palms Beach Hotel
User_Review:
We had lunch buffet at this location and we were quite pleased with the experience. It is located a bit away from the main road, creating a peaceful environment. The environment was very relaxing and they greeted us with a warm welcome.
The package included lunch buffet, pool access and an evening snack which included a piece of cake and tea.
We specifically wanted to use the pool and decided it was worthwhile to get the whole experience.
The staff was very friendly. The food was good and there was quite a collection of food items to chose from. However the dessert section was a bit limited.
Any how, the overall experience was great.

Name: Royal Palms Beach Hotel
User_Review: An excellent hotel with outstanding hospitality. The staff was extremely helpful, and our room was clean, cozy, and comfortable. The food was delicious with a wide buffet selection, plus live Calypso/Classical music during weekend dinners, which made the experience even more enjoyable. The large pool with Jacuzzi and bubbles was a highlight—our child loved it! Highly recommended."

Name: Citrus Waskaduwa
User_Review:
Very good property located around 10-12km from Bentota.
Rooms are good and spacious with sea view.
Pool is also great.
Only bad thing is that if you are a vegeterian from India then you would find very few options in buffet menu.

Name: Citrus Waskaduwa
User_Review:
Beach view is stunning, but swimming isn’t safe.

Rooms are clean but old; some equipment needs upgrading.

Staff are friendly, but service isn’t five-star level.

Food quality is inconsistent, buffet often not refilled, and long queues.

Finger bowls unavailable; told to use a nearby washroom.

Safety and maintenance need serious attention.

Great location, but far from a true five-star hotel.

First of all, we need to find the person who gave this hotel a 5-star rating.

Name: Citrus Waskaduwa
User_Review: We had a really lovely stay at Citrus Waskaduwa. The food was delicious, and the garden area was beautiful with a huge lawn to walk around and relax. I especially loved the swings by the beach, it made the whole experience feel so peaceful and laid-back. The bathroom was spacious, and overall the stay was very comfortable. Loved the pool loungers too, very cozy.  Another highlight is that the property has plenty of spots that are perfect for photos, definitely Instagram-worthy! A great place to unwind and create memories by the sea.

Name: Citrus Waskaduwa
User_Review:
A great stay at Citrus Waskaduwa!

The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful from the moment we arrived, making our stay very pleasant. The rooms were nice and spacious, offering plenty of room to relax and
unwind. While the hotel is lovely, a bit of renovation would help to freshen things up.
The food was also very good, with a great variety of delicious options for both local and foreign travellers.

One of the highlights of this hotel is the beautiful and spacious garden area, which is perfect for a leisurely stroll. The beach is also fantastic and ideal for a relaxing day by the sea. The only minor point to note is that the pool can get a bit crowded on weekends, but it didn't detract from our overall experience.

Name: Citrus Waskaduwa
User_Review:
The beach view here is absolutely stunning — it’s one of the highlights of the stay. The hotel has a beautiful beachfront location, and the rooms also offer a great view of the sea. However, there are red flags in that area, so swimming might not be safe.

The staff service is generally satisfactory — friendly and helpful when approached — but not up to what you’d expect from a true five-star property. The rooms are clean and tidy, though the overall setup feels a bit dated. All the appliances work fine, but most of them are quite old and could use an upgrade.

When it comes to food, I was quite disappointed. The quality and consistency weren’t great. Some dishes were too salty, while others had almost no salt at all. The buffet selection was limited, and proper cutlery wasn’t always available. Once a dish ran out, they didn’t seem to refill it, which was clearly visible in the photos I’ve attached. The chicken dishes especially were mostly bones and gravy.

Another issue was the long queues at the live cooking stations and dessert counters. There was enough space to arrange two lines, but they only kept one, which made the waiting time unnecessarily long. It almost felt like they wanted to discourage guests from taking more food.

Although this hotel is rated as a five-star resort, the maintenance clearly doesn’t match that level. Many of the safety items looked old and poorly maintained — something that really shouldn’t happen at this standard. It’s a serious concern because safety should always come first.

In some rooms, the phone doesn’t work, so you have to call the main reception line for any request or room service. The air conditioning can’t be adjusted by guests either; you have to ask a technician each time you want to change the temperature.

Overall, even though the location and beach view are fantastic, the management and maintenance do not reflect a true five-star experience. With better upkeep, food quality, and service consistency, this place could easily live up to its potential — but right now, it falls short.

Name: The Blue Water Wadduwa
User_Review: Gorgeous hotel, pool and spa with amazing sea views. The staff were incredible, particularly Prabath who led the water aerobics and yoga. We were the only couple for yoga and we had a 1 hour 20 minute session that really relaxed us and set us up for the day. The food was fantastic and the staff very friendly and approachable. Great gym and spa facilities (spa is very well priced ~£56/hour massage). Our room with a balcony was beautiful, our only issue was the shower leaked during use. Aside from that it was a wonderful stay and I’d thoroughly recommend booking here to enjoy the west coast.

Name: The Blue Water Wadduwa
User_Review:
We visited The Blue Water Hotel and Spa for lunch and had a great experience. The atmosphere is elegant and relaxing, making it a perfect spot for a leisurely meal.

The food was delicious and well-presented, and the service was attentive and professional. We really enjoyed the overall experience and the calm, sophisticated setting.

We would definitely recommend The Blue Water Hotel and Spa for anyone looking for a quality lunch in a beautiful environment.

Name: The Blue Water Wadduwa
User_Review: I have had many visits as a local to this hotel, Specially for the Food! The weekend buffet with the spend the day at the pool has always been a quality family time location.  I was sad to know that the pool has now been restricted only for house guests ... But still the seafood buffet is a definite must try here.

Name: The Blue Water Wadduwa
User_Review:
We stayed at Blue Water Hotel for a quick family getaway from Colombo (just about an hour’s drive away), and overall, it was a good value-for-money experience.

The hotel has a spacious and welcoming lobby, and the location right by the beach is excellent. The views from the rooms are beautiful, especially during sunset. The pool is large and clean – great for both adults and kids.

We had booked a Deluxe Double Room, assuming it came with a bathtub, but were told only "Super Deluxe" rooms have bathtubs – a room category that surprisingly isn't listed on their website. However, the staff were very accommodating and upgraded us free of charge after we explained the situation. We really appreciated this gesture, especially since the kids were looking forward to a bath in the tub.

The rooms themselves are a bit dated and could use some maintenance and refurbishment. While they are clean and spacious, a refresh would go a long way.

The food was average – nothing to complain about, but nothing exceptional either. The restaurant can get quite noisy. One disappointing moment was when my daughter wanted to take her leftover pastries from her plate to the room, and the staff declined, saying it's against hotel policy. This seemed unnecessary, especially since leftover food likely ends up in the bin anyway.

That said, the friendly service, great location, and value on a half-board basis make this a solid option for a short break from the city. With a few improvements, it could be even better.

Name: The Blue Water Wadduwa
User_Review: The Blue Water Hotel is the best place to enjoy the vacation and feel the Sri-lanka’s vibe. The landscape  and views are awesome! The hotel's atmosphere is created by its staff. I would  like to express special gratitude to them. They will always help with any question in a very friendly manner.   All employees do their work with soul! I would come here again and again🥰

Name: Mermaid Hotel & Club
User_Review:
It was a Warm & very Homely stay. Team headed by Thomas, seemed a great strength as they were always ready to accommodate us, within their capacity to make us feel happy.
A special mention of Athula, taking care of the Front Office, who went out of his way to change our initial perception of the place & arrange and get a room cleaned & ready through Nishantha,
for us to stay on comfortably.
Food was tasty and the salads were so delicious, another plus at the place,
Chef Gamage together with Wasantha, at the restaurant took all the trouble to ensure we were well taken care of, even by preparing & offering special dishes. It was so kind of them. Warmly remember Priyadarshani who served us at Breakfast smilingly despite our demands. Another special mention of Thilina at the pool who took care of us and made that experience memorable.
Restaurant at the upper floor made it a bit difficult without a lift.   As the premises is quite old, we feel overall the standards of the premises need to be uplifted. We were concerned about the cleanliness which should be made aware among the entire staff & place.
Live Music and entertainment on Monday night made our stay extra special and we really enjoyed it.
Despite premises and cleanliness related few issues, we truly enjoyed our short stay and were well taken care of with the hands on approach by the Senior Staff Members.
Thank you very much Mermaid and the Team. Hope to see you again. 🙏

Shervin and Inoka Fernando
September 2025

Name: Mermaid Hotel & Club
User_Review: The hotel has a calm and relaxing environment, and the rooms are quite spacious. However, I wouldn’t really recommend it. The floor in our room was sandy when we check in, and basic items like dental kits had to be requested separately. Each room had only one small 250 ml water bottle for two guests, and we had to refill from a purifier available on each floor. The food was average with limited variety and not very tasty. Overall, it’s a peaceful place to stay, but it didn’t quite feel worth the price.

Name: Mermaid Hotel & Club
User_Review:
It's very sad that we as a group from a private corporate company had such an unpleasant experience at the Mermaid Hotel Kalutara last weekend. The person named Wasantha was supposed to make this stay a memorable one, but instead he made it an unpleasant experience. He is very uncooperative and acts like a school principal all the time.

We had to pay for the driver's accommodations and meals too.

Front office staff did their briefing, as we are visiting a hotel for the first time in our lives. Still not feeling like mentioning the person's name in public, as we felt that was not entirely that person's fault. They do what they are asked to do by upper management. There not properly guide on how to talk to there guests.

Room conditions were bad too.

But people who worked in the restaurant tried their best to serve their guests.

Food was ok. But they can do better.

Not recommending this hotel to anyone.

Name: Mermaid Hotel & Club
User_Review:
An amazing spot to enjoy a stress-free vacation. The views are gorgeous, especially by the sea, and the atmosphere is so refreshing. The team here is very friendly and welcoming, which makes the stay even more comfortable. Meals are packed with taste and variety, making dining a special part of the experience. A great choice for both couples and families.
Highly recommend !

Name: Mermaid Hotel & Club
User_Review:
We came for a two night stay and it was beyond amazing!!!
The staff were extremely friendly and attentive and made our stay memorable for us.
The food was amazing. They have a good spread and all of the food taste amazing!
They have a BBQ live station every Saturday night and we enjoyed it so much.
The spa is also amazing. They have a sauna,  steam room and a jacuzzi. We had a great and relaxing experience in using both the spa treatment and the sauna. Also staff in the spa are well trained and experienced and very friendly!
They also have a gym facility, table tennis, squash and many more activities which we enjoyed during our stay.
All in all I could recommend Mermaid hotel who are looking for a relaxing and calm getaway and also good for groups as well since they have two pools and ample of garden space to hang out.

Name: Heritance Ahungalla
User_Review:
Absolutely stunning experience at Heritance Ahungalla! The service was incredible, and the staff ensured we had everything we needed. The resort itself is beautifully designed, with a great view of the beach and surroundings. The rooms are spacious, clean, and comfortable.

The food was amazing, with a wide variety of delicious options, and the pool was lovely. Perfect for anyone looking for a peaceful weekend getaway. Highly recommend it!

Name: Heritance Ahungalla
User_Review:
5-star service! Huge thanks to Kaushadi at Heritance Ahungalla for exceptional service! She was our angel during breakfast, lunch, and dinner, ensuring we had everything we needed. Most impressively, she lovingly cared for our little one while we enjoyed our meals.

The kids' activities were a hit, and the pool area was perfect for relaxation. The staff at the front office were super helpful and friendly. Housekeeping kept our room spotless throughout our stay.

The entire team went above and beyond to make our stay unforgettable. 🙏❤️ Highly recommend Heritance Ahungalla for a fantastic family vacation!

Name: Heritance Ahungalla
User_Review: I had a fantastic two-night stay at the RIU hotel. The all-inclusive experience was top-notch, with 24/7 access to food and beverages, including both alcoholic and non-alcoholic options. The amenities were excellent, featuring three individual pools and a separate kids' pool, which was perfect for our family. We also enjoyed the in-house night clubs (open on weekends and Fridays) and the live entertainment shows. It offered different vibes for everyone, and we all had a great time together. I can't wait to visit again!

Name: Heritance Ahungalla
User_Review:
Average.

Liked · We stayed in the Luxury Suite - one of the best rooms in the hotel. Room was spaciatious, right next to the pool and sea. Spa in the suite was great.
10/10 for the lady who welcomed us - great customer service from her. Food had a good spread.

Disliked · Customer service, lot of the staff seems to not want to be there, Except the lady who first welcomed us, everyone else pretty much look down on you unless you are a foreigner. Most dissapointing part is we are actually no longer live in SL, but they have a very different treatment for foreigners compared local crowd. Which is extremely disspointing. This is not the only hotel in Sri Lanka we had this experience. Facilities getting outdated - major reno required.
But good value for money.

Name: Heritance Ahungalla
User_Review: Located right on the beach, Nice resort ambience, staffs are very friendly and helpful. Food has lots of varieties for both Breakfast and Dinner. Pool bar is nice. They have wifi facilities and room amenities are well equipped. We organised a conference in the resort, meeting hall also good and taken care.

Name: Earls Regency Kandy
User_Review:
We had a wonderful experience at the hotel buffet while celebrating our anniversary. The food was absolutely delicious with a great variety to choose from every dish was fresh and flavorful. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, making our special day even more memorable.

A big thank you to Mr. Shantha and his amazing team for arranging a lovely surprise cake-cutting for us! Their thoughtful gesture and friendly service truly made our celebration unforgettable. Highly recommended for anyone looking for great food and exceptional hospitality!

Name: Earls Regency Kandy
User_Review: We had my brother’s wedding 15th of September at Earl’s Regency, and everything was absolutely fantastic! From start to finish, the entire event went so smoothly. A special thank you to Kasun and the team for their incredible support, attention to detail, and warm hospitality. They made sure every moment was perfect and stress-free. The venue, service, and coordination were truly exceptional. We’re so grateful for making this special day unforgettable. Highly recommended!

Name: Earls Regency Kandy
User_Review:
Thank you very much for your valuable service. The friendly staff is very commendable. A beautiful night spent in peace and quiet after a tiring life. Beautiful mountains, the banks of the Mahaweli River, the cool breeze are very beautiful, very enjoyable. The hotel is amazingly beautiful. Very clean. The food is very delicious. The friendly staff are like a group of close relatives. Beautiful paintings, colorful flowers, neatly dressed staff, talented chefs, the latest furnitures, very beautiful. Experience this change at least once in your life. This is a paradise in Sri Lanka. Earl's Regency staff and management, thanks once again your amazing service for treating me and my family in the highest way from booking the hotel to leaving.
Special thanks Mr Nishanta and our coordinator Mr Suranga..

Name: Earls Regency Kandy
User_Review:
We had such a great stay at this hotel. We went with the full board option and it was absolutely worth it. The room was really spacious and had everything we needed.

The place itself is huge and the food was amazing. The buffet was honestly one of the best I have ever had. There was so much variety and everything tasted fresh and delicious.

What really made the stay special was the service. From the moment we arrived the staff was warm and supportive. A big shout out to Prabhavi who went above and beyond. She even checked online to make sure we were getting the best rates, walked us personally to see the rooms, let us pick the one we liked, and double checked that everything was okay. That kind of attention made a big difference.

We only stayed for one night which is a shame but I would definitely recommend this place and I am sure we will be back again.

Keep it up!

Name: Earls Regency Kandy
User_Review:
Room is clean, a bit old fashioned. The staff are very friendly and warm. Foods are great, especially butter chicken and the pancakes.

Awesome pool view!

Also great view in the canteen terrace!

Name: Mahaweli Reach Hotel
User_Review: I have ordered food through Refined Tastes multiple times now and we are very happy with the taste, quality, and quantity of food. We were able to customize the food for our dietary needs as well as some family members are vegetarian. Always promptly delivered on time too. Very special complements to Ms. Buwani Halangoda, Assistant Manager Complaints & Customer Relations Support, for excellent service and support throughout the process. We once had an issue with a delivery and Ms. Buwani quickly rectified the issue and has been very helpful since then. Highly recommend the food delivery service and we are looking forward to ordering more in the future.

Name: Mahaweli Reach Hotel
User_Review: We are currently staying in a beautiful river view room at this nice boutique hotel, our room is spacious and comfortable.  The hotel is set in picturesque gardens, however, what truly makes this hotel special are the staff who are all so incredibly nice. Upon going for our first evening meal we were greated with a warm smile by Samanthika who made us very welcome with high class service.  Our second evening was our wedding anniversary and the Manager Indika ensured our evening was very memorable, he arranged a special table for us and Ajanka and Hirunika looked after us with Indika regularly checking everything was perfect for us.  On our third evening Hirunika even remembered I like Martini's and one was very quickly brought to our table and once again Indika checked to ensure all was perfect.  On our last evening Nadeesha looked after us, once again we had a special table reserved for us and Nadeesha's service was exceptional making sure our every need was catered for.  We have been very fortunate to have stayed in a lot of high class hotels and what makes a hotel stay special are the memories and I would like to thank all the staff at the Mahaweli Reach Hotel for the memories they are truly special and we will be returning.

Name: Mahaweli Reach Hotel
User_Review: Had a wonderful couple of nights staying half board at this hotel. The facilities are showing slight signs of wear but still very good. The staff here are extremely good and go out of their way to make your stay pleasurable. We were mainly served by Lahirla who was great.

Name: Mahaweli Reach Hotel
User_Review:
Wonderful Stay – Highly Recommended!

I stayed at this hotel for two days and had a fantastic experience. The staff were absolutely perfect—friendly, attentive, and always willing to help. I had the pleasure of meeting Nethan, who was exceptionally polite and went above and beyond to assist me. He even helped me book a tuk-tuk via Uber to KCC at the lowest price, which I really appreciated.

The room was spotless and very comfortable, making my stay even more enjoyable. I truly enjoyed every moment and would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting the area!

Name: Mahaweli Reach Hotel
User_Review: The rooms at Mahaweli Reach Hotel were huge and very comfortable. The restaurant staff, especially Nathan and Nadeesha, were courteous and attentive, making the dining experience pleasant. The check-in process was smooth and hassle-free. However, the food could be improved, particularly the Indian dishes.

Name: Amaya Hills Kandy
User_Review: Shaminda and his colleagues were so friendly and helpful. Incredible views, beautiful Sri Lankan food, lovely room!

Name: Amaya Hills Kandy
User_Review: Thank you sudeepa and lakdisa for exceptional service. I enjoyed well and  you alla re an amazing staff that never could have anywhere. Thank you for best service and good rooms

Name: Amaya Hills Kandy
User_Review: Lovely views of Kandy, food was excellent.

Name: Queens Hotel Kandy
User_Review:
We had a wonderful stay at Queens Hotel Kandy! From the moment we arrived, we received such a warm welcome and special care from the team. The room was spotless, the bathroom sparkling clean, and the bed was super comfortable — we slept so well.

The food was delicious, and the service throughout our stay was excellent. We absolutely loved the unique view of the Sri Dalada Maligawa and Kandy Lake — it made the whole experience even more special.

A big thank you to the General Manager and the front office staff for their exceptional hospitality and next-level guest relations. The valet parking service was also really convenient and well organized.

Special thanks to Michelle for taking care of us from start to finish — she truly made us feel at home. Highly recommend Queens Hotel Kandy for a memorable and comfortable stay!

Name: Queens Hotel Kandy
User_Review:
We had a wonderful experience during our stay. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the staff, and the level of service remained consistently high throughout. Special thanks to Michelle, who was exceptionally kind and went out of her way to make us feel comfortable. Her attentiveness and thoughtful support even helped us to decide to extend our stay for an extra day.

All of the staff were friendly, courteous and genuinely hospitable. It's clear that guest experience is top priority at Queens Hotel. We truly appreciated the personalised care and highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a warm, welcoming atmosphere and top notch service.

We would also like to extend our sincere thanks to Mr. Angelo Gibson for his assistance and a heartfelt thank you to Mr. Kumara Adikari for his gracious hospitality.

Name: Queens Hotel Kandy
User_Review:
I recently traveled from Galle to Kandy to visit the Temple of the Tooth. We had lunch at Queen’s Hotel, and I was warmly welcomed at the entrance by Michelle, the Guest Relations Executive. She guided us through the hotel and gave an excellent briefing about its fascinating history. We were truly impressed by both the heritage and the hospitality of Queen’s Hotel.

Thank you, Michelle, and the entire team, for your exceptional service. We hope to stay at Queen’s Hotel on our next visit to Kandy!

Name: Queens Hotel Kandy
User_Review:
We stayed at Queen’s Hotel, Kandy, for two nights during my recent visit. We had a truly lovely experience at Queen’s Hotel, one of the oldest and most historic hotels in Kandy. The building itself has a classic colonial charm with high ceilings, grand staircases, and a beautiful old-world feel. Its location is perfect, right in the heart of the city, just across from the Temple of the Tooth and near Kandy Lake.

What made our visit even more special was the Junior Chef’s competition held in celebration of World Children’s Day. My daughter Hannah participated in the event and had so much fun  and so did the other children! It was a joy to watch them all smiling, learning, and enjoying the experience together making pizza and even garnishing cupcakes. The event was very well-organized and thoughtfully planned.

I would especially like to thank Ms. Michelle Jayasundera, Guest Relation Executive, who was incredibly accommodating and welcoming. She made sure we were comfortable and satisfied during our time there, and her kind and professional manner really stood out.

Overall, it was a memorable stay filled with warmth, fun, and a sense of history. Thank you to Queen’s Hotel and the whole team for making it such a positive and unforgettable experience for me and my daughter.

Name: Queens Hotel Kandy
User_Review: We checked in at the hotel with our twins for a night just to visit Temple of tooth. We got the perfect room for our family. They were considerate about our needs when allocating the room. I have to say that customer service was exceptional. The buffet spread during both dinner and lunch was excellent. The convenience of the location when visiting the temple enhanced our experience with our little ones. We are considering visiting again when we are in the area

Name: Cinnamon Citadel Kandy
User_Review:
Highly recommended this beautiful hotel.
Also recommend the boat ride!!! We did it at 5pm which was perfect for cooler weather and sunset.
Rooms are nice.  Bring your own shampoo and conditioner as that is the biggest issue with the Cinnamon hotels is the lower quality bathroom products.  Also, turn AC to the very lowest as that’s the only temp that will cool the room to comfortable.
Beautiful pool area overlooks the river.
The grounds are manicured and lovely to meander about.
