Shockingly, at checkout the manager claimed the suite’s AC had been fixed just 30 minutes after we checked in — something she never bothered to inform us during our stay. Instead, she blamed us for her losing a booking on the room she had given us.

At checkout, things got worse. The manager refused to disclose the actual room rate and insisted the price difference between a suite and a superior room was only LKR 2,000 — when it was actually over LKR 12,000. Only after 25 minutes of insistence did she reluctantly issue a bill, still charging us for the suite.

Her tone throughout was rude and defensive. She even had the audacity to say they “lost out” on another booking because they had to give us a smaller room — as though this was our fault. She further justified not informing us about the repaired AC by saying she “thought we were comfortable” — with our 3-year-old — in the much smaller room. How she became a manager of this so-called 4-star hotel is beyond me.

There was zero apology, zero accountability, and a complete disregard for guest experience. The property may have nice views, but poor maintenance and worse management make it far from a true 4-star experience.

The owners seriously need to review how this place is being run.

Name: Cantaloupe Aqua Unawatuna
User_Review: We had a wonderful stay at Levels, Unawatuna. The room was clean and comfortable, the ambience was peaceful, and the food was excellent. The pool was a highlight, and all the staff were very courteous. Highly recommended for a relaxing getaway

Name: Cantaloupe Aqua Unawatuna
User_Review:
A Truly Disappointing Stay: Mismanagement and Misleading Information

★☆☆☆☆ (1/5 Star Rating)

I am writing this review with deep disappointment after a horrible experience at this hotel, which fell drastically short of basic standards of service and honesty.

Our stay was plagued with issues from the moment we arrived:

1. Broken AC and Unjustified Downgrade:
We had booked two suites for our group. Upon check-in, we were informed that the AC in one suite was not working. Instead of offering a solution or an apology, we were simply downgraded to a "Superior" room without any prior discussion.

2. Deceptive and Insulting Billing:
At checkout, the real frustration began. When we questioned why we were being charged the full suite rate for a downgraded room, the manager initially claimed the rates were the same. Only after persistent questioning did they offer a negligible reduction of LKR 2,000.

This is where the dishonesty became clear. The manager insisted the price difference between a suite and a superior room was only LKR 2,000. However, a quick online check (which we did on the spot) showed the actual difference to be over LKR 12,000. Attempting to undercompensate us by LKR 10,000 is not an oversight; it's a deliberate and unethical practice.

3. Complete Communication Failure:
The manager then defensively informed us that the original suite had been repaired and was "ready," implying it was available to us all along. This was news to us! At no point during our stay were we notified that our original, paid-for room was available. How were we supposed to know? It is the hotel's responsibility to proactively communicate with their guests, not to point out solutions after the fact.

4. Poor Room Condition:
The room we did stay in was subpar. The bathtub was rusted and leaking, making it unusable. Furthermore, the air conditioning had to be switched on long before the room became bearable, as it felt like a sauna upon entry. A simple pre-check to cool the room would have been a basic courtesy.

Final Thoughts:
The combination of a broken booking, a deceptive billing attempt, a complete lack of proactive communication, and poor room maintenance made for an awful experience. The most frustrating part was the manager's attitude, which was dismissive and defensive, refusing to acknowledge any wrongdoing.

We feel cheated and misled. I would strongly advise others to double-check all bills and confirm their room assignments in writing, as this hotel cannot be trusted to handle issues with integrity.

Name: Cantaloupe Aqua Unawatuna
User_Review:
We visited this lovely place on 10 August with my wife’s classmates — around 16 members — to spend the day. We had a fantastic time with the wonderful team at Levels Hotel, and this is what true hospitality looks like.

The secret is great leadership — from the manager to the lifeguard, everyone was professional and provided excellent service, even for our small requests. Special appreciation goes to the front office staff, Oshini and her assistant, for their warm and friendly assistance.

This place feels like a small palace situated on the beautiful Rumassala Mountain. The prices are very reasonable, and the food is absolutely mouth-watering.

We will definitely be coming back very soon!

Name: Thaproban Pavilion Resort Unawatuna
User_Review:
Visited during September first week for 2 nights stay. We had a really good time there. Room interior was pretty and clean. Bathroom was spacious and clean. 2bpools were available for use. Bit questionable regarding the cleanliness as there were white floating particles towards the evening.
No direct access to the beach, but can see the ocean from the hotel.
Breakfast Buffet had a good spread. Dinner buffet didn't have much option,but was yum.
Used the spa and massages were good.
Hotel also has a game room with lots of options.
Beautiful sceneries to capture.
Really enjoyed the time there, will definitely revisit if we get the chance.

Name: Thaproban Pavilion Resort Unawatuna
User_Review: Such a beautiful relaxing spot! Sadly we only stayed one night but the room was beautiful, clean, and cool. The bed was extremely comfortable and the atmosphere was lovely and relaxing. Our room was a level up from the sports bar but we couldn’t hear a thing. We also had a beautiful patio to overlook the ocean. Breakfast was delicious and had everything we could want. We would definitely stay here again if we’re back in the area!

Name: Thaproban Pavilion Resort Unawatuna
User_Review:
Beautifully situated hotel with all the essentials, two swimming pools, big restaurant with both indoor and outdoor seating, nightly BBQ by chef, the bar is tasteful and offered lots of different drinks which are delicious. The best part, the staff! We also loved sitting by the pool near the rocks listening and watching the waves crash. They truly go above and beyond to make you feel right at home. They even coordinated our safari and packed us a perfect and thoughtful breakfast. We treated ourselves to a traditional massage which was priced well and relaxing. Definitely recommend! We stayed four nights and would return again. The rooms are large but could use a little updating
Special Thanks to all the amazing staff for taking great care of us 🙏🏼

Name: Thaproban Pavilion Resort Unawatuna
User_Review:
Our stay at this hotel was simply unforgettable. From the very first moment, they made us feel at home with their warm and genuine hospitality.

We would especially like to mention Giant, the reception manager, who took care of us as if we were part of his family. His dedication and kindness truly made a difference in our experience. A big thank you also to the restaurant team, always attentive and smiling, and especially to Lajiru, who was absolutely outstanding in his service and friendliness.

The hotel itself is amazing: well-kept facilities, a relaxing atmosphere, and a level of service that goes far beyond expectations.

We highly recommend this place and hope to come back one day. Thank you for making our trip to Sri Lanka so special!

Name: Thaproban Pavilion Resort Unawatuna
User_Review:
Came here the second time for the massage! Very kind staff members and the massage was awesome. I feel very relaxed now and calm. You can also come here to take a swim for 3 hours/ 3.000 rupees, even if you are not a hotel guest. Very reasonable price for what you get. Towel is also included and the pool is huge. The view is stunning! Next to the ocean ! Very peaceful & lassanai (beautiful).
Will be back! Thanks so much for the welcome! 🌞

Name: Nooit Gedacht Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
The Food at the Hotel was exceptional!! Kudos to the chef!!

All our requests were honored. Be it International Cuisine or Local, it was prepared very well!

The area around the property is also beautiful! Options to to go treking available directly from the hotel.

Overall wonderful stay! If we are back in the South of Srilanka, this is where we will stay!

Name: Nooit Gedacht Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
A really nice location with calm surrounding. Went there for a photography shoot. Location has good number of locations and the architecture is really nice and the atmosphere is great.
Staff was friendly and helpful.
Recommend this place

Name: Nooit Gedacht Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
Great quiet and tranquil location where you can unwind and relax. Old Dutch colo nail charm.
Great staff. Perfect place to have a quiet retreat.

Name: Nooit Gedacht Heritage Hotel
User_Review: The standard room was very clean however a little small in size. In comparison to the bathroom, which was pretty big. It’s a beautiful heritage resort with some vintage architecture. They don’t showcase it much, but there is a tiny trail leading to the forest as well, which is pretty interesting. We saw all kinds of birds during our stay there.

Name: Nooit Gedacht Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
It's a wonderful experience. The amenities are worth it. If you want to relax on your vacation, this is the perfect place. It's very close to Unawatuna Market and beach so you don't have to take a vehicle to travel for shopping or eating out.
The only area of improvement is service which can be slow sometimes.

Name: W15 Weligama Bay
User_Review:
Our stay at this incredible hotel was nothing short of enchanting. From the moment we arrived until the time we left, every detail was flawlessly orchestrated to create a truly magical experience.

A special mention must go to the ever-attentive Guest Relations Officer, Nishadi, who ensured we felt welcomed and cared for throughout our stay. Her thoughtful check-ins and warm hospitality made all the difference.

The cuisine was exquisite, the hospitality impeccable, and the rooms were elegant, comfortable, and immaculately maintained. Every facility reflected the highest standard of luxury, and the views were simply breathtaking.

This was my sixth visit, and each time feels just as special as the first. I’m already looking forward to my seventh.

Name: W15 Weligama Bay
User_Review:
I had a wonderful experience staying a Aura beach club by w15  in Weligama. The property is beautiful, clean, and very well maintained. The atmosphere is calm and relaxing, making it a perfect place for a peaceful getaway. The hotel is  comfortable and the facilities are excellent .
A special mention to Mr. Anoj, the supervisor  of this hotel, who was extremely friendly, kind, and helpful throughout my stay. He made me feel very welcome and ensured everything was perfect. The entire staff was professional and always ready to assist with a smile.
I truly appreciate the warm hospitality and the high level of service provided. I would happily recommend Aura beach club by w15 Weligama to anyone looking for a memorable and relaxing experience. I look forward to visiting again.

Name: W15 Weligama Bay
User_Review: Thank you so much for such a memorable stay! From the front office staff, service staff to security, the entire staff was so friendly & very attentive to anything we asked for. They provided us with the best service for sure. The chefs are definitely an asset in this property because the food was just too good to put into words. Will definitely come back & highly recommend you to anyone. Thank you again for your friendly & kind service 🫶🏽

Name: W15 Weligama Bay
User_Review:
Loved the place! The staff were super helpful with absolutely everything, the food was amazing from breakfast to dinner. Rented a board and they helped me and provided different options. Perfect if you are looking to spend some surfing time or family time. Definitely coming back!
Greetings from Spain and Colombia!

Name: W15 Weligama Bay
User_Review:
We had dinner at W15 Beachfront Restaurant and really enjoyed the whole experience. The beachside setting was beautiful with a nice breeze and a relaxing vibe. For food, we tried the dumplings, a pizza, and tacos – all were fresh, flavorful, and well presented. The dumplings were soft and tasty, the pizza had the right balance of toppings with a nice crust, and the tacos were full of flavor.

For drinks, we went with two fresh juices – the Mint Refresher (or cooler) which was absolutely superb, and the Mango with Ginger, which had a great kick to it. Both were super refreshing and paired nicely with the food.

Overall, it was a wonderful evening – tasty food, refreshing drinks, and a great atmosphere by the beach. Definitely a spot worth visiting!

Name: Cape Weligama Luxury Resort
User_Review:
From the very first moment, the experience has been absolutely wonderful! We received a significant room upgrade to premium villa. The service is excellent, the staff are incredibly kind, and the overall atmosphere is calm and luxurious.
The hotel sits on a cliff with a stunning view of the sea and adorable animals roaming around, which makes the stay even more special. There’s also a surf spot nearby — perfect for those who love the ocean and waves.
The food is delicious, with a wide variety, and even when we didn’t find something on the menu, the staff went above and beyond to prepare special dishes just for us.
Cape Weligama is truly one of the best hotels we’ve ever stayed at — everything feels thoughtful, elegant, and full of attention to detail.
Highly recommend Cape Weligama! We’re still in the middle of our six-night stay and already know we’ll be happy to come back.
A huge thank you to the entire team for making our vacation so unforgettable! 💛

Name: Cape Weligama Luxury Resort
User_Review:
This property is located at a very unique site! Such magical feelings are expressed through out this stay. The resort has different views and the pool locations are breathtaking! The infinity pool is so magnificent!

The rooms we were staying at are connecting suites which were beyond spacious and very well maintained and equipped. The dressing area and the wardrobe area was very unique and so spacious.

The staff at the property were very friendly and professional they managed the guests so well. We felt so relaxed and welcoming.

Felt so blessed and lucky to have stayed at the property!

Name: Cape Weligama Luxury Resort
User_Review: Best place to relax! Great innovative hearty food. It has this great view like from a light house. You can see the sunrise and sunset from one point. You get so many pools to have a chill time. The way they had used landscape to attract the environment is best. Great place for kids too and has a bigger kids pool

Name: Cape Weligama Luxury Resort
User_Review:
Our stay at Cape Weligama was truly memorable. The resort is set in one of the most stunning locations we’ve ever experienced – breathtaking views over the ocean, beautifully kept gardens, and an atmosphere of absolute peace and relaxation.

The service throughout was exceptional, warm, and attentive, making us feel genuinely welcomed. The villas are spacious, elegant, and private, offering everything one could expect from a luxury escape. The infinity pool overlooking the ocean and the different lookout points around the property were simply spectacular.

If we had to point out one area for improvement, it would be the dinner at the Atlas restaurant. While the setting is beautiful, the food did not quite live up to the standard of the rest of the resort – portions were small, flavors not particularly memorable, and the prices high for the experience. For now, I would recommend enjoying room service instead, which was excellent and, in our view, the best way to dine here until the Atlas restaurant raises its level.

That said, everything else – the place, the views, the service, the rooms, and the sense of space – was outstanding. Cape Weligama is a remarkable place to unwind, and we would return without hesitation.

Name: Cape Weligama Luxury Resort
User_Review: We stayed for our honeymoon at this incredible place for five nights. We were blown away by the big area this resort has, the view over the sea, our room and the service. The food was also excellent. We enjoyed our stay to the fullest, highly recommend this stunning stay!!!

Name: Mandara Resort Mirissa
User_Review:
Our experience at Mandara hotel was absolutely exceptional from start to finish. The highlight of our stay was the sunset lagoon boat ride – truly breathtaking and perfectly organised. Watching the sun set over the water was such a peaceful and memorable experience.

The buffet food was another standout, offering a wide variety of delicious dishes to suit every taste. The high tea experience was just as delightful, with a great selection of savoury bites and desserts served in a relaxed setting.

The room was spotless and well-maintained, with every detail thoughtfully arranged. We loved the view we had from our room. We really appreciated the cleanliness and comfort after a long day of exploring.

Overall, everything from the service to the atmosphere exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend this hotel for anyone looking for a perfect blend of relaxation, great food, and beautiful views.

Name: Mandara Resort Mirissa
User_Review:
I stayed at Mandara Resort for 2 nights and 3 days. While the property holds a 4-star rating, unfortunately, my experience did not match the standards expected of such a rating.

Positives:
•	The location of the property is excellent.
•	The private beach is clean, well-maintained, and truly scenic.

Concerns during our stay:
•	Food service: On the first day, we ordered a simple meal of dal and plain rice. It took over 40 minutes to arrive, and despite clearly mentioning that I am allergic to mustard seeds, they were still included. The corrected order took an additional 30 minutes to be served.
•	Wi-Fi: My husband had meetings to attend and required a stable internet connection. The Wi-Fi speed was barely 1mbps. Despite repeated requests, the issue remained unresolved. The staff attributed it to weather conditions, although the weather was perfectly fine during our stay. This poor connectivity persisted throughout our visit.
•	Bathroom maintenance: The basin in our bathroom was clogged, and water wasn’t draining properly. We called twice for assistance, but no one came. Eventually, we had to purchase cleanser from the market and fix it ourselves.
•	Breakfast service: On the first morning, I requested hashbrowns at 9:48am, while breakfast was available until 10am. At 10:05am, the waiter returned only to say breakfast service had ended, and nothing could be provided.
•	Hospitality and service: At both check-in and check-out, no staff member offered assistance with our luggage, despite seeing us carry it. This is surprising for a property of this rating.
•	Infrastructure: The rooms and bathrooms were not at par with the 4-star standards or the prices being charged.

Overall, we experienced excellent hospitality across Sri Lanka, but this property fell short in multiple areas. It is disappointing, as the resort has great potential given its location and the number of bookings it attracts, even in the off-season. Improving service quality and infrastructure would greatly benefit both the guests and the property itself.

Additional note (not directly about the resort):
A serious issue we faced was with the auto drivers stationed outside the resort. They function as a group and prevent PickMe drivers from picking up guests. When we tried negotiating fairly, they demanded nearly five times the usual fare and threatened us if we mentioned using the PickMe app. On another occasion, they even stopped our cab driver, threatened him, and extorted 2000 LKR from him. While this is not the resort’s fault, it is worth being aware of, as it affects guests’ overall experience.

Name: Mandara Resort Mirissa
User_Review:
There everything was great. Nice sea facing room. The hotels offered us nice dinner and staffs were friendly.
BUT we had a little bad experience.
Since we were leaving at 3 am, the front desk officer herself had informed that they would be providing us packed breakfast. In the dinner time also, we had confirmed about our departure and packed breakfast. BUT the breakfast was not there in the morning, the available staff told us that they were not informed. SAD

Name: Mandara Resort Mirissa
User_Review: You can choose it for a nice and peaceful stay on Mirissa beach. The staff are very attentive and my friends and I enjoyed ourselves in the evening under the lights on the beach. They even brought a special sound system for this. A helpful and considerate place to stay. I will definitely visit again.

Name: Mandara Resort Mirissa
User_Review:
I had an absolutely wonderful experience at Mandara Resort Mirissa! From the moment I arrived, I felt so welcomed and cared for, especially thanks to Mr. Nishantha, who truly made the stay unforgettable. He greeted me so kindly and took the time to explain everything in detail about the resort, the facilities, and nearby attractions. His genuine hospitality made me feel right at home.

One of the highlights for me was the special iced coffee it was prepared for me, it was the perfect refreshing treat and such a thoughtful gesture! Small details like that made a big difference in my experience.

The resort itself is incredibly quiet and peaceful, surrounded by natural beauty. Whether I was relaxing by the pool or enjoying the view, everything felt serene and luxurious. The atmosphere was just what I needed — calm, clean, and truly relaxing.

I honestly loved everything about my stay. If you're looking for a beautiful escape with exceptional service and a personal touch, Mandara Resort Mirissa is the perfect choice.

Name: Paradise Beach Club Mirissa
User_Review:
We were a group of five who stayed for two nights at Paradise Beach Club Resort in Mirissa. While the location is absolutely stunning — right on the beach with beautiful views — our experience with the rooms left quite a bit to be desired.

My husband, our 4-year-old daughter, and I were charged for a double superior room, but only a king bed and a single mattress on the floor were provided. The room itself was far from what we expected for the price. The bathroom had a constant unpleasant smell, and the shower drain was so clogged that water started coming out from under the toilet. We had to request to be moved the next day.

Our friends’ room had a leaking toilet and, although they were overall satisfied, they also noticed it could have been much cleaner. The cleaning standards across the resort appear quite low — fans covered in dust, stained linens and towels, and minibars in very poor condition (dirty and old). It seems the cleaners aren’t provided with proper equipment to do their job properly.

The food was decent, though not what you’d expect from a 4-star resort. A downside is that even water wasn’t included during buffet meals, which felt unnecessary given the room rates.

On the positive side, the Ayurvedic clinic at the top of the building was an excellent experience — professional, relaxing, and very friendly staff. In fact, all the staff we interacted with were kind and helpful throughout our stay.

Overall, Paradise Beach Club Resort has so much potential thanks to its unbeatable beachfront location and lovely staff. However, the management really needs to invest more in room maintenance, cleanliness, and attention to detail to justify the prices and deliver the “superior” experience guests expect.

Name: Paradise Beach Club Mirissa
User_Review:
The location of Paradise Beach Club is excellent—right on Mirissa beach with a nice pool and plenty of space to relax. The atmosphere feels tropical and inviting, and the beachfront setting is the main highlight of the property. Rooms are comfortable enough, and the staff are generally polite and helpful.

However, the dining experience was disappointing for a hotel marketed as 4-star. The breakfast and dinner spread were very average and did not reflect the level we expected. There were no live stations for traditional Sri Lankan dishes such as hoppers or dosa, which is something most guests look forward to when staying in Sri Lanka. On top of that, even a simple bottle of water was not included with the meals—they charged extra, which felt unnecessary and frustrating.

In short, the hotel is a good option if you are visiting Mirissa mainly for the beach and poolside relaxation, but when it comes to food and dining standards, there’s definitely room for improvement.

Name: Paradise Beach Club Mirissa
User_Review:
Stayed as a large group of 24. Our hotel room was Beautiful and clean. Food was delicious. Many options to eat - we have 3 major allergies to food groups- fish, nuts and Gluten - but we didn’t get sick.
Good service. Right on the beach!

Name: Paradise Beach Club Mirissa
User_Review:
Exceptional views.But poor stranded and quality of rooms and toilets. It is like a lodge .
Pillow cover wasn't charged when giving the room. They charged for  triple bedroom, but they provided a single mattress instead of a single bed .
Bathroom, toilet are so smelly. Uncleaned.
Dirty bath towels.Some were smelly.
Less choice of dinner.
I recommend not to choose this for higher price.
If you want, Just go to beach and enjoy.
Don't waste your money in this hotel

Name: Paradise Beach Club Mirissa
User_Review:
The location of this hotel is honestly unbeatable — right on the beach with a gorgeous pool and easy access to the sea. There are plenty of little shops and restaurants around too, so it’s really handy if you need to grab anything.

Our room was fine — good air conditioning and comfortable enough for the few nights we stayed. Breakfast was solid with a good variety, and the food on the lunch menu was actually quite nice — definitely better than the dinner buffet, which was disappointing. On our last two nights, the buffet had a poor selection and the same desserts repeated, which felt a bit lazy.

One thing that really took away from the experience was how pushy some of the staff were when it came to tipping. We absolutely understand that tips are important and we always give them — but it shouldn’t feel so forced. Staff were hovering around after very small tasks, sometimes knocking on our door just to ask how the room was, and clearly expecting something. My mam had someone take her bag about 100 metres and then just stood there waiting for a tip — it made her uncomfortable. Even when we were being shown to a table, it felt like a tip was being expected right away. On top of that, a service charge and taxes were already added to our room bill, which made it noticeably more expensive than the price we originally saw when booking. It would be nicer if things were a bit more relaxed and genuine in that sense.

We did have a good stay overall, but one other letdown was when my husband ordered the seafood platter (around 5000 rupees) because he was really craving lobster and jumbo prawns — both listed on the menu. When the dish came, neither were on the plate. He asked and was told they weren’t in season — fair enough if that’s the case, but it should have been mentioned before ordering, especially at that price. We’d had jumbo prawns the day before at another place nearby, so it just felt a bit off. Charging full price without what was promised is not great.

All in all, it’s a lovely spot and we did enjoy our time, but there are definitely a few areas where they could improve the overall guest experience.

Name: Elephant Reach Hotel Yala
User_Review: We had a good experience at elephant reach yala recently . We stayed for a one night with my family and parents. I’m pleased to say we had a good time. The hotel staff is very friendly. Minor staff also very helpful. I had a little doubt after reading some reviews in Google but after I went to the hotel , the way staff welcome us and treat us changed my mind. Normally they won’t put buffet unless they have enough guests but before we go I called and requested them to arrange buffet at least for dinner.since it’s a long weekend .they had enough guests I think. Therefore They agreed and arranged buffer for dinner and breakfast as well. We had our lunch only as a set menu but that’s was enough too. Udaya from kitchen updated me regarding the meal plan . And amali at restaurant friendly and treat us well . Nawodya from reception is very friendly too. And also we had a free upgrade to the interconnected chalets which is very nice for our both families. Food was good. Staff is very friendly. Swimming pool was clean. They could have put more effort on garden like grow more grass phase all over the garden. Garden is big and surrounded by trees . It’s very clam and cool.

Name: Elephant Reach Hotel Yala
User_Review:
Great location!

We stayed here for 1 night and the hotel is surrounded by the nature which is we admire always.

It’s convenient and easy to access the Yala national park.

Quite big room with bit old basic amenities, the beds were comfortable and the rooms were clean and tidy.

The place is calm and love the environment.

The pool is nice and quite spacious. But not very deep.

Buffets were average with considerable choice of foods, and food was good.

Staff were friendly and attentive throughout the whole stay.

Overall experience was good and happy to be back again!

Name: Elephant Reach Hotel Yala
User_Review:
Had a great time in Elephant Reach Hotel. Calm and relaxing environment to enjoy a lovely vacation.

Chalets with 2 bedrooms (triple bedrooms and double bedroom) and chalets with single bedrooms can be accommodated in here. They are well maintained with all facilities. Two bedrooms in 2-bedroom chalets can be accessed by a 2-way door in between.  They are built surrounding the pool.

Meals were delicious and had variety of choices. Beers and soft drinks can be purchased at the restaurant (not quite sure whether liquor is available at the restaurant for purchase)

Pool is quite spacious and well maintained. Deep end is only 1.4m deep. No baby pool in there.

Spa is available. Pool table was under maintenance when we stayed there. There’s a common area which is ideal for group gatherings, to have a celebration, etc.

Elephant Reach Hotel is located within a distance of 30 minutes to Palatupana entrance of Yala national park and the hotel is arranging jeeps for Yala safari. Even during a long weekend, they were able to arrange us safari jeeps. Kirinda beach is also located near here.

Staff was friendly and helpful. Experienced a great hospitality in here.

Overall, it’s a wonderful place to stay-in and highly recommend.

P.S. there was an error with TV, no working power outlets in our room, during our visit. Although we informed that, neither of those were had a solution. Hope they fixed it by now.

Name: Elephant Reach Hotel Yala
User_Review:
Before make any comments I must all credit to Anuradha and Amali.
Have been excellent.
Big assets Elephant reach.
We had a fantastic time.
Must spare one night.
It's not five star hotel. But you will get six star service.

Name: Elephant Reach Hotel Yala
User_Review:
SPA:
A truly wonderful experience — relaxing, professional, and the best part of my stay.

Restaurant:
The Mongolian station looked very appealing, but I noticed the same pan was used to cook both pork and chicken. As Muslims do not consume pork, having separate utensils would help make the experience enjoyable for guests with dietary restrictions.

Room Service:
I requested a blanket at night, but unfortunately it didn’t arrive despite a few follow-up calls which was quite disappointing.

Overall:
With a few small improvements in service and food handling, this hotel has the potential to provide an excellent experience for all guests.

Name: Jetwing Yala Safari Hotel
User_Review: Very modern and luxury hotel, we had such a lovely stay here. The staff were friendly and attentive. They were very helpful with organising a packed breakfast for our early safari. During our stay an elephant was roaming through the ground and the staff took us to a special spot to view up close and safely. A great experience and comfortable stay.

Name: Jetwing Yala Safari Hotel
User_Review: We went to Jetwing Yala for a 2 nights stay during last weekend (27-29) of September. The hotel is located in a really nice spot in Yala. We were in love with the location as soon as we arrived at the place. The property has a really stunning beach that you will fall in love with. We stayed at a Deluxe room and it was spacious and we had a big balcony with sun beds all to ourselves. The staff were very welcoming. The spread for the buffet was not the biggest but still the food tasted really good. They had few action stations too during the dinner. This is really a must visit hotel in Yala if you are planning a trip.

Name: Jetwing Yala Safari Hotel
User_Review: Jetwing Yala was a highlight. The pool is absolutely beautiful and perfect for cooling off after a safari. We loved seeing the wildlife right on the property — cows, monkeys, rabbits, bats, and geckos wandering around, which made it feel unique and connected to nature. The service was excellent and staff were friendly and attentive. The rooms were ice cold and very comfortable, which was perfect after a hot day out. A fantastic stay and highly recommended when visiting Yala.

Name: Jetwing Yala Safari Hotel
User_Review:
Really nice and quiet hotel in a beautiful location, perfect for a relaxing break after safari adventures. The rooms are comfortable, spacious and many open out onto private balconies or terraces where you can unwind.

The food was okay, a bit average, but that could be because we visited during the off season. Staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. It’s also quite convenient for safaris as the Yala Block 1 entrance is only about a 15-minute drive away. Overall, a nice place to stay if you’re looking for a quiet getaway close to the park

Name: Jetwing Yala Safari Hotel
User_Review: Beautiful property . Excellent service by all the staff members specially Mr Shameem. Chef Mahesh accommodated our food requests . We felt very welcomed and treated with a lot of respect . We travelled with 2 kids and all our requests were politely accepted . Would definitely come back again.

Name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
User_Review:
Cinnamon Wild Yala truly lives up to its name! This was more than just a hotel stay it was an adventure.

From the moment we checked in, we felt like we had stepped into a nature documentary. The lodge is beautifully designed to blend in with the surrounding wilderness, and it's not uncommon to spot wild boars, deer, or even elephants roaming nearby (at a safe distance!).

Our room was a cozy jungle chalet, beautifully maintained and surprisingly luxurious given the remote setting. We especially loved the rooftop bar — perfect for watching the sunset over the lake with a drink in hand.

The staff were fantastic — so friendly and helpful, always ready with a smile or a story. The food was great too, with plenty of variety and some delicious Sri Lankan specialties. Huge thanks to Subhash and Sandu for superb service. They are very supportive

And of course, the safari was the highlight! We were lucky enough to spot a leopard, thanks to our guide who was incredibly knowledgeable and passionate about the park.

If you're looking for a place that combines adventure, comfort, and nature, Cinnamon Wild Yala is the perfect choice. We'd go back in a heartbeat.

Name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
User_Review:
The hotel which brings wild nature to your footstep.

From the beginning the stay became very exciting to me. We were given early check- in facility upon request without any hesitation. The lake view is very fascinating full of animals and birds. We saw an elephant inside the resort premises too. The vibe is very calm and quiet giving the pure essence of wild nature.

The staff is very friendly and supporting. Specially Sohani Ranabahu and Thushara Senerath treated us very well understanding what we need. Both having friendly and welcoming approach to guests. Sohani provided us lake checkout facility as we went for Safari in the evening and Thushara provided a great service at the dining restaurant. We value their services and I believe Sri Lankan hotel industry need these kind of staff more and more.

We stayed at Jungle chalets and the rooms were clean and I love the food. Though the varieties are limited the food is delicious. My applause to all the wonderful chefs!!

I believe this is one of the best hotels in Sri Lanka and I would love to come again with my loved ones!!

Name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
User_Review:
I recently stayed at Cinnamon Wild Yala and had an absolutely incredible experience. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the staff, and the hospitality continued throughout our stay.

The resort is beautifully located right on the edge of Yala National Park, giving it a true "wild" feel. We loved how seamlessly the property blends into the natural surroundings — monkeys, wild boars, and even deer roamed freely near the paths and chalets. It was magical waking up to the sounds of nature each morning!

Our chalet was clean, spacious, and well-maintained with a rustic charm and modern comforts. The views from the room and even the bathroom were just stunning.

The food at the restaurant was excellent, with a great mix of Sri Lankan and international cuisine. The staff was attentive and always ready to accommodate dietary needs or special requests. Thanks subash and sandu for taking care all of us.

The  pool overlooking the lake was a perfect spot to relax after a morning safari, especially during sunset.

Overall, Cinnamon Wild Yala offers an amazing blend of comfort, adventure, and nature. Highly recommended for anyone looking to explore Yala in style without losing that close-to-nature experience. I would definitely return!

Name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
User_Review:
We had an unforgettable stay at Cinnamon Wild Yala! The resort's eco-friendly setting amidst the lush jungle, just adjacent to Yala National Park, was breathtaking.
The staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort, and the safari experience was exhilarating. We spotted leopards, elephants, and crocodiles in their natural habitat.
The rooms were spacious and stylishly designed, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. The pool area offered stunning views of the lake, where we often spotted wildlife. The food was delicious, with a great mix of local and international cuisine.

Name: Cinnamon Wild Yala
User_Review: Absolutely gorgeous resort. A beautiful lake with wildlife at all times of day. The staff are amazing, the food was incredible, and the rooms are lovely. Every guest has a huge smile because it’s just a wonderful place to be. Highly recommend staying here. Just a short distance to the national park if you want to go in a safari adventure.

Name: Chaarya Resort & Spa Tissamaharama
User_Review: Very lovely hotel. The rooms were spacious, and since we stayed in the back of the resort it was also very quiet. We had both breakfast and dinner included—breakfast was delicious with plenty of choices, while dinner could have been a bit better. The evening before our early safari, we asked for a takeaway breakfast box and the staff were super helpful, even offering different options. Overall, a really lovely place to stay.

Name: Chaarya Resort & Spa Tissamaharama
User_Review: We stopped for lunch at Chayya Resort, Tissamaharama, with our family and absolutely loved it! The food was delicious, and the service was outstanding. A big thank you to Restaurant Manager Dhammika and Senior Waiter Ravidu for their warm hospitality and amazing service. Highly recommended!

Name: Chaarya Resort & Spa Tissamaharama
User_Review:
We stayed at Chaarya Resort after visiting Hambantota, and I have to say – the place was beautiful, to say the least. For a hotel that’s marked as 5-star, the pricing was surprisingly reasonable. The rooms were clean and well-arranged, and all the expected amenities were available and in good condition.

The only minor letdown was the dinner buffet. While the variety was there, the taste and quality of most dishes didn’t quite live up to the standard we’ve experienced at similar hotels. That said, the Sri Lankan dishes were delicious and clearly the highlight of the buffet.

On the flip side, the breakfast buffet was impressive with a good selection and much better overall quality.

All in all, it was a pleasant and comfortable stay and with just a bit more attention to the dinner buffet, it could be an even more wonderful experience. Would recommend it :)

Name: Chaarya Resort & Spa Tissamaharama
User_Review: Chaarya Hotel was honestly such a good stay. Everything felt cozy yet spacious, with a calm vibe that made it super comfortable. What stood out the most for me was the amount of wildlife around - monkeys casually hanging around, iguanas crossing by, cranes, and so many birds. It felt like nature was part of the hotel itself. The staff were really hospitable, and the overall standard was impressive. Food was another highlight - so good and definitely worth mentioning. Altogether, a really pleasant experience

Name: Chaarya Resort & Spa Tissamaharama
User_Review: Stayed in the hotel with our kids for one night in the deluxe room. The hotel rooms were very nice, clean and spacious. Also the garden outside the rooms were nice and allowed the kids to run around and play. The service and staff were exceptional. the food ( breakfast and dinner) was top notch.

Name: Kithala Resort Tissamaharama
User_Review:
Good afternoon, the experience at the hotel has been, overall, unpleasant. To begin with, we arrived at 1:30 PM and the room was still not ready. We went on a safari and when we got back to the hotel, it was unbearable due to the number of insects in the environment. It was outrageous. The WiFi connection was intermittent (this has happened to us in several hotels). The variety of food at the buffet was scarce. And we had a very unpleasant dinner with insects bothering us the entire time. We had to leave the dinner halfway through.

Not everything was bad. The room was quite nice, and the pool and views were great. But they don't compensate at all for the insect issue.

Best regards.

Name: Kithala Resort Tissamaharama
User_Review:
Our stay at Kithala Resort in Kataragama was truly a highlight of our trip to Kataragama and Yala! 🤩
From the moment we arrived until we left, the staff provided exceptional service and made us feel so welcome. We were particularly impressed by how they went above and beyond to help us resolve a booking issue we had with the Agoda app. They handled it with incredible professionalism and efficiency, ensuring our check-in was smooth and stress-free.
​Beyond the excellent service, we absolutely loved the resort itself. The food was delicious and the overall service was brilliant. The swimming pool was a perfect spot to relax, and the natural, beautiful environment of the resort made our stay feel like a peaceful escape. We can't recommend Kithala Resort enough! ❤️

Name: Kithala Resort Tissamaharama
User_Review:
We recently visited Kithala Resort at Yala as a outside guests for lunch. While we found the food to be absolutely delicious and well-prepared, unfortunately, our overall experience was affected by the behavior of the restaurant staff.
We felt that the staff were not particularly friendly or polite during our visit. There was quite a bit of loud talking and what seemed like shouting among the team, which created an uncomfortable atmosphere, especially as the restaurant was not busy at the time.
Although the dining area is relatively small, that in itself was not an issue. However, the noise and lack of courtesy from the staff made our lunch experience less enjoyable than we had hoped.

Name: Kithala Resort Tissamaharama
User_Review:
Excellent establishment with friendly staff who go out of the way to be helpful. The rooms and bathrooms are spacious , with a beautiful view in to the forest. The breakfast and buffet at dinner has lots of food varieties.
The staff at the restaurant are very polite and efficient.

Name: Kithala Resort Tissamaharama
User_Review: The hotel itself is lovely, with a beautiful pool overlooking the rice fields – a truly relaxing setting. However, the restaurant is a major letdown. Prices are significantly higher than in nearby accommodations or local restaurants, yet the food quality is far below expectations. Even simple dishes like burgers and pizzas are poorly executed. Despite the presence of multiple chefs in fancy hats, this unfortunately does not translate into quality on the plate. A disappointing dining experience that does not match the standard of the rest of the hotel

Name: Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle
User_Review:
We celebrated our anniversary at Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle Resort and it was simply unforgettable! The resort is a true paradise — lush greenery, the ocean right at your doorstep, and plenty of nature with peacocks and monkeys adding to the charm. The restaurants were excellent, the spa was so relaxing, and the overall atmosphere felt peaceful and luxurious.

A special thank you to Mudith, Chef Mohammed, Chef Pathum, Sameera, Dileep, Sanju, Ishara, Thisari, and Tennakoon for making our stay extra special with their care and attention. At the same time, we want to sincerely appreciate all the other staff members who always greeted us with a smile and provided such warm hospitality throughout our stay.

This is a resort where every detail is looked after and every staff member truly cares. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a mix of nature, relaxation, and world-class service!

Name: Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle
User_Review: Absolutely no complaints! The staff were incredibly friendly and went above and beyond to ensure guests were well taken care of. Our room was cleaned and beautifully refreshed twice a day. The food on-site was excellent—from breakfast to dinner—with a wide variety of options catering to both Western and local tastes. The resort also features plenty of animals, activities, and nearby excursions to enjoy. This was our first time visiting Sri Lanka, and Anantara truly set the bar high for every other hotel we’ll experience here. A fantastic stay all around.

Name: Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle
User_Review:
Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle is an absolute paradise on Sri Lanka’s southern coast. From the moment you arrive, their welcome, the serene beachfront setting and lush tropical surroundings make you feel completely relaxed. The resort perfectly combines luxury with a sense of peace and privacy, making it ideal for both romantic getaways and tranquil family vacations.

The villas are spacious, beautifully designed, and offer stunning views of the ocean or the tropical gardens. Waking up to the sound of the waves and enjoying a morning swim right by your private pool is an unforgettable experience. The staff are exceptionally warm, attentive, and go out of their way to make your stay comfortable and memorable.

Dining here is a delight – the restaurants offer a wide range of flavorful dishes, from fresh seafood to international cuisine, all presented beautifully. The spa is also top-notch, providing a truly relaxing and rejuvenating experience.

Every corner of Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle radiates luxury, tranquility, and natural beauty. Whether you want to unwind by the beach, indulge in gourmet dining, or simply enjoy the stunning surroundings, this resort delivers an unparalleled experience. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a luxurious and peaceful escape in Sri Lanka.

Name: Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle
User_Review:
We recently visited Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle and had an amazing stay. We are from Germany, and we truly enjoyed everything about this beautiful hotel . everything was perfect!

A special mention goes to the Italian restaurant and the main restaurant. The Italian restaurant manager, Mr. Niroshan, and the main restaurant manager, Mr. Lakmal, were exceptionally friendly and provided outstanding service. The entire staff at both restaurants were also very kind and helpful.

Our host, Ms. Kasthuri, made our stay comfortable and welcoming, and housekeeping staff member Mr. Lalindu took great care of our room.

Because of the wonderful hospitality we received  especially from Mr. Niroshan and Mr. Lakmal . we definitely want to come back again!

Name: Anantara Peace Haven Tangalle
User_Review:
The resort is absolutely amazing! ✨
The welcome was warm and the positive vibes from the staff were incredible from the smallest role to the highest position, everyone worked with a smile and genuine kindness. It was a true relaxation trip, and I didn’t feel the time passing at all.

Special thanks to Rasith, our personal assistant 🙏. He was with us throughout the stay, arranging everything perfectly and paying attention to even the smallest details, which made all the difference in our comfort.

I will definitely come back to this resort as soon as possible 🌴💛

Name: Buckingham Place Tangalle
User_Review:
​In Sri Lanka, there are surely many hotels, each one more different than the last, but there is definitely no other quite like the Hotel Buckingham Place. It’s not just about its privileged location; it's about the magic that surrounds it, the nature, the wonderful rooms, the unbeatable cuisine, and above all, the marvellous staff who work there.
​When you put it all together, you create the best experience, especially when you've been travelling through the spectacular paradise of Sri Lanka for three weeks and decide to finish on a high note. Words can't express our gratitude for the 24/7 care and affection we felt. Everything is looked after down to the smallest detail, and that's thanks to the great Nick, the hotel's owner.
​While all the hotel staff are wonderful—from the dining room and massage area to the housekeeping and bar staff—I would like to highlight the impeccable and kind attention of Sheham, who did everything and more to make our stay perfect. When I return to Sri Lanka in the future, I know that a visit to this wonderful hotel will be an absolute must.
​Thank you and see you soon.

Name: Buckingham Place Tangalle
User_Review:
We had a truly wonderful experience at Buckingham Place in Tangalle.
From the moment we arrived, everything was perfect , the beautiful lagoon kayaking & bird watching, the secluded beach, the inviting pool, and the peaceful surroundings made it a relaxing and unforgettable escape. 🌊💆🏻‍♀️❤️
The staff were incredibly friendly and attentive, always ready to help with a warm smile. A special mention goes to Arshad, one of the best people at the hotel ,always helpful, professional, and genuinely kind. Piyumi was also so lovely and supportive; she ensured we had everything we needed without delay. 🫂❤️
Our room was spacious, very clean, and beautifully maintained, with a calm and cozy atmosphere. The morning and evening views from the room were absolutely stunning ,just wow! 😍🫶🏻
The food was absolutely delicious, every single meal was a treat. 😋
If you're looking for a place to relax, unwind, and be treated like family, we highly recommend Buckingham Place. We loved every moment and thoroughly enjoyed our stay! ❤️

Name: Buckingham Place Tangalle
User_Review: This is a fantastic boutique hotel with the most amazing staff and service. The rooms are massive and well-appointed, and the food is consistently excellent. The views of the sea and the lagoon are spectacular, and a great beach is on the doorstep. Very highly recommended.

Name: Buckingham Place Tangalle
User_Review: We visited this place for lunch after being turned down by another place. I would say we got really outstanding service and delicious food. The staff was super friendly and welcoming as well as the owner. They have 2 lovely dogs at the hotel that makes it even better. A lovely view from the pool overlooking the sea. The property is really private and well maintained and we have already decided to come back there in December!

Name: Buckingham Place Tangalle
User_Review:
We have just had the most fantastic 3 nights here and highly recommend. The service is exemplary, the food outstanding and the location glorious.

It’s bold and joyous and full of life, but super relaxed at the same time, and you just can’t help but feel happy here - a brilliant exercise in the psychology of colour. There are only 16 rooms so the service is really personal (they seem to know what you need before you have even thought of it!) and there are so many thoughtful details.

The hotel is just down a few steps to Rekawa beach which is vast and unsullied by tourism.  The few hotels and a couple of beach bars are tucked behind bushes and virtually invisible from the beach. The waves are really powerful - too powerful to swim but the sound of them crashing onto the beach carries up to the pool - deeply relaxing and great for the soul. Rekawa is a turtle beach so there is the added bonus of late night walks to watch the turtles laying their eggs.

This is a really special place created by a lovely man called Nick Buckingham (hence the hotel name) who is full of wonderful stories.  We very much hope to return.

Name: Uga Bay by Uga Escapes Pasikuda
User_Review: The water is calm and clear, and the pool looks right out at the ocean. My room was very clean and comfortable with a nice balcony that caught the breeze. Housekeeping did a great job every day. The staff were friendly and helpful all the time. Breakfast was fresh with plenty of fruit and local dishes that taste super nice. The seafood at dinner was very good and portions were generous. The spa was relaxing and well run, and it was easy to arrange simple activities like a beach walk or volleyball. Perfect place for beach getaway.

Name: Uga Bay by Uga Escapes Pasikuda
User_Review:
We stayed here for three nights on our holiday to Sri Lanka few weeks ago and we couldn't be happier. We booked a bay view villa for our family and for our in-laws. The rooms were inter connected and we had a small plunge pool to our selves.

The food , staff and the service provided were fantastic. Loved the food varieties on each days. We were staying there in full Board basis, should have been fine with even half board.

The beach was nice and clean. We noticed the hotel was mainly occupied by tourists, this is probably due to the premium price. We loved the quietness and enjoyed few massages too.

I would highly recommend this hotel if you are around Pasikudah area.

Name: Uga Bay by Uga Escapes Pasikuda
User_Review:
Uga Bay is a beautiful resort right by Pasikuda beach. The beach is pristine, quiet and not crowded, which makes it perfect if you want a peaceful getaway. The resort itself has a touch of Kandyan vibe in the architecture, and also comes with a game room and a gym.

I stayed at a Beach Studio room – it was very spacious and comfortable. The only small issue was that the shower area didn’t have a door separating it from the rest of the washroom, and the bath towels were hung right next to it, so they got wet easily. This could be improved if they placed the towels elsewhere.

Food was a real highlight here. Breakfast and dinner were buffets, and lunch was set menu with the full board option. Unlike some Colombo hotels where buffets feel repetitive, here the dishes were unique, very tasty, and not overly spicy.

The staff were amazing – extremely friendly and pleasant, which is something I’ve noticed with all Uga resorts. It really makes the stay feel special.

Overall, it’s a peaceful place where you can easily stay for longer periods. The internet speed was decent too. Definitely one of the nicest beachfront resorts in Pasikuda.

Name: Uga Bay by Uga Escapes Pasikuda
User_Review:
Uga Bay Pasikuda delivered a perfect beach escape. The resort opens onto the calm turquoise curve of Pasikuda Bay with an infinity pool that seems to meet the ocean. Rooms are airy and spotless with balconies that catch the sea breeze and sunrise.
Service was outstanding. The team was friendly, attentive, and quick to help. Breakfasts were fresh and generous and poolside cocktails were excellent.
The beach is ideal for long walks at low tide and easy swimming in clear water. Paddleboarding and snorkeling were simple to arrange. Grounds are beautifully kept and everything ran smoothly without fuss. I would return to Uga Bay for a quiet, luxurious beach getaway in a heartbeat.

Name: Uga Bay by Uga Escapes Pasikuda
User_Review:
We stayed here to celebrate our wedding anniversary and had the most wonderful experience. The hospitality was truly amazing – every staff member went above and beyond to make us feel special. What impressed us most was how beautifully people from different ethnicities worked together in harmony, providing excellent service with genuine warmth. It was truly inspiring to see.

The food was also exceptional – delicious, well-prepared, and full of flavor, making each meal memorable. Overall, it was a perfect celebration, and we couldn’t have asked for a better place to spend such a special occasion. Highly recommended!

Name: Maalu Maalu Resort & Spa Pasikuda
User_Review:
We had such a fantastic time at Malu Malu! 🌴 It’s truly an amazing resort. One of the highlights of our stay was the incredible animator, Ruchira — he made our trip unforgettable. He’s full of energy, very entertaining, and always had us engaged in fun activities like volleyball and other games.
Not only Ruchira but also other Managers and Staffs did a fantastic job.

The World Tourism Day celebrations were another highlight, with special gifts for the kids and lots of enjoyable activities. The food was excellent — the buffet breakfast and dinner stood out with a wide variety of both local and international dishes. Everything was delicious!

The beach was clean and stunning, and the atmosphere was so relaxing. Our room was spacious, very comfortable, and beautifully maintained.

What made our stay extra special was the staff. They were extremely kind, friendly, and always ready to help with anything we needed, making us feel right at home.

Overall, Malu Malu is a perfect place for both relaxation and fun, and we can’t wait to come back again! 🌊✨

Name: Maalu Maalu Resort & Spa Pasikuda
User_Review:
I had a truly memorable stay at Maalu Maalu in Pasikuda. The staff were welcoming, attentive, and always ready to help, which made the whole experience feel so special. The atmosphere was peaceful and relaxing, perfect for a getaway by the beach.

The highlight of my stay was the dining experience – absolutely exceptional. The food was fresh, full of flavour, and beautifully presented, with plenty of choice to suit different tastes. Every meal felt like a treat.

Overall, Maalu Maalu exceeded my expectations with its service, comfort, and outstanding dining. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Pasikuda!

Name: Maalu Maalu Resort & Spa Pasikuda
User_Review: We just absolutely loved this place. It was the highlight of our 2 week Sri Lankan stay. Everyone was friendly and Richie was amazing with our son. Richie included every kid in activities and was a joy to be around. The room was great and the pool and beach were to die for! The food was good each day and every staff member was friendly and could not do enough for you. I highly recommend this resort. The activities on offer were great and not too expensive.

Name: Maalu Maalu Resort & Spa Pasikuda
User_Review:
A wonderful stay from start to finish!
The staff were incredibly friendly, professional, and always went out of their way to make us comfortable.
The beach view is absolutely breathtaking, and the hotel offers plenty of activities to keep you entertained. A special highlight was the violinist playing during dinner — such a lovely touch!

Great value for money and the perfect place to relax and unwind.

Will definitely return!

Name: Maalu Maalu Resort & Spa Pasikuda
User_Review:
Our experience at Maalu Maalu was absolutely amazing. The resort itself is stunning and peaceful.
A special shout out to Ruchira, the resort’s animator, who truly made our stay extra special!
We’re already looking forward to coming back soon!!!

Name: Anantaya Resort & Spa Passikudah
User_Review:
We stayed at Anantaya Resort and Spa from 31st July to 2nd August as a group of 11, and our experience was nothing short of wonderful. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with a warm welcome from the staff, setting the tone for a truly relaxing getaway.

Our rooms were beautiful, spacious, and extremely comfortable, perfectly complementing the breathtaking surroundings. The beach, the sea, the pool, and the gentle breeze created an idyllic atmosphere. The location at the northern end of the beach felt tucked away and peaceful, with arguably the best stretch of coastline — clean sands and a gentle entry into the ocean.

We opted for the half board package, which turned out to be an excellent choice. Dinner each night was a delight, offering a mix of à la carte and buffet options, all delicious and satisfying. The restaurant staff were exceptionally friendly and attentive, and the whole dining team carried out their service with calmness and grace, making every meal a pleasure.

The pool was another highlight — large, well-maintained, and one of the few in Passikudah to offer shade throughout the day. The pool attendants worked tirelessly to keep it spotless. With the size and layout, it might well be the largest pool on the beach.

From peaceful sunrises to stunning landscapes, Anantaya is the perfect place for a quiet, rejuvenating escape. With few crowds, pristine surroundings, and excellent hospitality, we would gladly return and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a serene beachside retreat.

Name: Anantaya Resort & Spa Passikudah
User_Review: A truly exceptional stay—seamless service, exquisite dining, and unmatched comfort. Our heartfelt thanks to the F&B manager Mr. Attanayake and the waiter Mr. Danujan, whose gracious hospitality elevated the experience. Every member of the team contributed to making it unforgettable.

Name: Anantaya Resort & Spa Passikudah
User_Review: A good resort by the beach with well equipped and furnished rooms, large swimming pool, great open park, good food, and, important: nice, friendly, efficient and service oriented team. Nice landscapes and views. A relaxing atmosphere, a place where you want to stay more time.

Name: Anantaya Resort & Spa Passikudah
User_Review:
We checked in to Anantaya, Passikudah, expecting a premium experience given its 5-star rating and the higher price point compared to other, more cost-effective options in the area. Unfortunately, our experience did not align with the standards expected of a 5-star hotel, resulting in significant disappointment.

The dinner buffet was far from international standards, with limited choices that did not cater to international guests. The food spread felt more like a low-budget offering, which is unacceptable for a property marketed as a luxury resort.

On a positive note, the restaurant and front office staff provided excellent service and were courteous in their efforts to manage the situation. Their professionalism is commendable.

However, we faced a serious concern regarding housekeeping integrity. We accidentally left behind a t-shirt, and upon checking with the hotel later, we were informed that it was not found. This raises questions about the reliability and integrity of their housekeeping services, which is deeply troubling for any guest.

Given these experiences, I would not recommend Anantaya, Passikudah in its current state. I strongly suggest that the management reassess and realign their standards to accurately reflect their service levels and reset guest expectations accordingly.

Name: Anantaya Resort & Spa Passikudah
User_Review:
Fantastic Hotel and Wonderful Escape

We had a great experience staying at this hotel! The location is beautiful, although it is a bit far from Colombo. The food was excellent, and the staff were incredibly kind and welcoming. We stayed for five days and had a lovely time despite it not being the best season to visit, as the seas were quite rough.

During our stay, we celebrated a birthday, and the team went above and beyond by baking a cake and making the celebration so special. It was truly heart-warming and memorable.

Overall, it was a thoroughly enjoyable escape - relaxing, fun, and filled with great hospitality. Highly recommend!

Name: Amaya Beach Passikudah
User_Review:
I had an excellent experience with the Front Office team at Amaya Beach Hotel. From the moment I arrived, the staff greeted me warmly with genuine smiles and made me feel truly welcome. Check-in was smooth and quick, and they explained everything clearly about the hotel facilities and services.

What stood out most was their professionalism combined with friendliness – they were always ready to help, whether it was arranging transport, giving recommendations about Pasikudah, or assisting with any small request. The staff made sure every detail was taken care of, which added so much comfort to my stay.

A special mention to the reception team for being attentive, courteous, and always approachable. They really set the tone for a relaxing and enjoyable holiday.

Highly recommend the Front Office service at Amaya Beach – it’s simply perfect!

Name: Amaya Beach Passikudah
User_Review: I recently had the pleasure of staying at Amaya Beach Hotel, and it was an unforgettable experience. The location is absolutely stunning, with breathtaking views of the beach right from the room. The rooms are spacious, clean, and well-maintained, offering both comfort and luxury. The staff went above and beyond to make our stay memorable, with their warm hospitality and excellent service. The food was exceptional, with a variety of options to suit all tastes. Whether you’re relaxing by the pool, enjoying the beach, or dining in the restaurant, every moment was enjoyable. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking for a perfect getaway!"

Name: Amaya Beach Passikudah
User_Review: Beautiful hotel with an amazing beachfront location. The rooms are spacious, clean, and offer stunning sea views. The staff were exceptionally friendly and attentive, always going the extra mile to make my stay special. The buffet had a great mix of Sri Lankan and international dishes, and everything was delicious. Perfect place to relax by the pool or beach. I would definitely return

Name: Amaya Beach Passikudah
User_Review: The hotel did not impress us in any special way. The food was very average and lacked variety. The rooms were clean. The service in the restaurant, especially at the Aqua Bar, was very pleasant and polite; however, the reception staff was the complete opposite. The beach was narrow, and the entry into the water was very unpleasant due to the coral reefs, making it necessary to wear protective shoes. There is a beautiful public beach nearby without coral reefs, with cooler and refreshing water. Essentially, while staying at the hotel, there aren’t many opportunities for walking around. You should be prepared for a stay that keeps you mostly within the hotel. It was very hot. The hotel pool was unremarkable, with warm water that didn’t provide any cooling relief. The coastline around Negombo is definitely better; I mention it as a comparison. I emphasize that we visited in August; perhaps this changes seasonally.

Name: Amaya Beach Passikudah
User_Review:
Excellent structure. Spectacular beach (but be careful of the corals). Very nice rooms. Super cleaned. Nice view of the beach with palms. A nice place to rest and recharge.
The staff is friendly and  helpful!
Laundry service could be improved.
Air conditioning is locked at 22 degrees, not the best!
Recommended overall!

Name: Anilana Pasikuda Resort
User_Review:
I visited this beachside hotel about 10 years ago with my family, and it was truly one of the best hotel experiences I’ve had. The hotel had a spacious and beautifully designed interior, and the rooms were very large and comfortable. We stayed in a family room with a lovely sea view, a large bathroom, and elegant furniture and décor, along with all the necessary amenities.

The highlight of our stay was definitely the food. Even years later, we still remember the amazing dishes served at their buffet. Since we visited during Christmas, the hotel was decorated beautifully, which added to the festive atmosphere.

The property also offered a nice swimming pool and direct access to the beach, which made the stay even more enjoyable. It had plenty of outdoor space, though the garden itself wasn’t particularly remarkable. Overall, it was a memorable and delightful experience that left a lasting impression on us.

Name: Anilana Pasikuda Resort
User_Review:
Superb view. Very close to pigeon island and easily can arrange a guided tour to the island. A perfect place for snorkelling and safe as well.

The beach is very quiet and beautiful

Staffs are friendly and professional. Food quality is good. Rooms are spacious and Room services are nice. It also has nice pool. The breakfast just perfect!!

Name: Anilana Pasikuda Resort
User_Review: The service is very good. The staff is very helpful and friendly. There is a big pool area where there are plenty of space for adults and children. The food is great. We had the breakfast buffet, which is good. The pool facing rooms are great. There is a small balcony with a table and two seats which is great. And the bead and inside chairs are very comfortable. The shower has a open roof which is nice. Overall very good experience.

Name: Anilana Pasikuda Resort
User_Review: Travelling to this resort was really memorable. The staff was incredible and always tried to meet our needs. Food was too amazing. We enjoyed the beach and the bonfire. The rooms were excellent. Surroundings around with the beautiful greenery made our day.

Name: Anilana Pasikuda Resort
User_Review: We travelled to this resort from Canada in June 2022 and we had a great experience. The staff was incredible and always tried to accommodate our needs. Since we did a last minute reservation, the food was limited in option as we were the only guests. We enjoyed the beach and the bonfire. The rooms were excellent. We still talk about the pillows and blanket !

Name: Trinco Blu by Cinnamon
User_Review:
A wonderful vacation😚

The hotel exceeded my expectations. Cleanliness, friendly atmosphere, excellent food, and spotless rooms. I have nothing to criticize and simply can’t find any faults.

The entire staff was fantastic. Unfortunately, I don't know all of their names, but I'd like to name a few: Indi, Mahesh, Eranda, Vishwa, Ravi, Suseevan, Sandeepa. I hope I spelled these names correctly. Sorry also to everyone I didn't mention.

Thank you all very much, you made my stay a great pleasure.You could read my every wish from my face. All of you were very professional.

I would also like to express my sincere thanks to Chief of Staff Bandara and the head chef.

At the end, I will recommend this hotel to everyone. It was the best vacation we’ve ever had. We will definitely book this hotel again.

Gabriela and Mohamad

Name: Trinco Blu by Cinnamon
User_Review:
Amazing place with a fabulous beach and a large pool. Very friendly staff who attend on even small requests. Breakfast spread is huge and very good dishes.
Veg options on ala carte is limited. Even the fish and chips off the ala carte was average.
The decor of hotel is all blue and goes well with the ocean view
Must do place in trincomalee

Name: Trinco Blu by Cinnamon
User_Review:
From the moment you arrive, you are welcomed with a warm smile and genuine hospitality. Guests often describe the staff as exceptionally friendly, polite, and attentive, always ready to assist with anything you might need. The check-in feels personal and caring, often with a refreshing welcome drink and the kind of service that makes you feel at home straight away. It’s not just professionalism — the team radiates warmth and sincerity, creating an atmosphere of true Sri Lankan hospitality.

Food is another highlight of the hotel. Breakfast buffets are generous and varied, while seafood lovers rave about the crabs and other ocean specialties. Many guests emphasize how well-prepared and flavorful the meals are, noting the attention to detail in both taste and presentation. Dinner is equally outstanding, offering a wonderful selection of dishes that combine local flavors with international cuisine, served in a relaxing seaside atmosphere that makes every evening feel special.

Name: Trinco Blu by Cinnamon
User_Review:
I had a fantastic stay at this hotel and couldn’t be more pleased with the overall experience. From the moment I arrived, everything was seamless, relaxing, and enjoyable. The food was absolutely delicious, offering an excellent variety each day to suit all tastes. One of the highlights of my mornings was the breakfast, especially the mouthwatering hoppers made by Jasintha — a truly warm and friendly chef who added a personal touch to every dish. Her milk hoppers were divine, and I highly recommend trying them! I’m also grateful to the chefs who kindly took the time to show me how they’re made — a lovely and memorable experience.

The beach area is another standout feature of the hotel. Clean, peaceful, and well-maintained, it was the perfect spot to unwind and enjoy the ocean breeze. The rooms were very comfortable, spotlessly clean, and well attended to throughout the stay. Room service was prompt, and the staff responded to every request with a smile and great efficiency.

The hospitality, cleanliness, and overall atmosphere exceeded my expectations. I left feeling refreshed and happy, and I would definitely return. Whether you’re here to relax, explore, or simply enjoy good food and service, this hotel is a perfect choice.

Name: Trinco Blu by Cinnamon
User_Review: Wonderful stay at Trinco Blu by Cinnamon for one night with our young children. The pool area was fabulous and beautiful. There was a large restaurant which had a very good dinner and breakfast buffet with plenty of choice. Breakfast and dinner was very good. We had a beautiful room overlooking the ocean which was very close to the beautiful beach, and you could watch the local fishermen haul in their catch. The staff were exceptional and professional, also friendly, welcoming and helpful. There’s a nice long beach too where you can walk and find other restaurants and bars. And it’s easy to get a TukTuk to get around. Highly recommended this hotel Trinco Blue by Cinnamon spend your holiday in beach hotel !! The staff at the restaurant including the restaurant manager were exceptionally polite and good.

Name: Chaaya Blu Trincomalee
User_Review:
A wonderful vacation😚

The hotel exceeded my expectations. Cleanliness, friendly atmosphere, excellent food, and spotless rooms. I have nothing to criticize and simply can’t find any faults.

The entire staff was fantastic. Unfortunately, I don't know all of their names, but I'd like to name a few: Indi, Mahesh, Eranda, Vishwa, Ravi, Suseevan, Sandeepa. I hope I spelled these names correctly. Sorry also to everyone I didn't mention.

Thank you all very much, you made my stay a great pleasure.You could read my every wish from my face. All of you were very professional.

I would also like to express my sincere thanks to Chief of Staff Bandara and the head chef.

At the end, I will recommend this hotel to everyone. It was the best vacation we’ve ever had. We will definitely book this hotel again.

Gabriela and Mohamad

User_Review:

Veg options on ala carte is limited. Even the fish and chips off the ala carte was average.
The decor of hotel is all blue and goes well with the ocean view

Name: Chaaya Blu Trincomalee
User_Review: Wonderful stay at Trinco Blu by Cinnamon for one night with our young children. The pool area was fabulous and beautiful. There was a large restaurant which had a very good dinner and breakfast buffet with plenty of choice. Breakfast and dinner was very good. We had a beautiful room overlooking the ocean which was very close to the beautiful beach, and you could watch the local fishermen haul in their catch. The staff were exceptional and professional, also friendly, welcoming and helpful. There’s a nice long beach too where you can walk and find other restaurants and bars. And it’s easy to get a TukTuk to get around. Highly recommended this hotel Trinco Blue by Cinnamon spend your holiday in beach hotel !! The staff at the restaurant including the restaurant manager were exceptionally polite and good.

Name: Pigeon Island Beach Resort
User_Review: Had a wonderful stay at this beach resort! The location was perfect with stunning ocean views and a peaceful atmosphere. The rooms were clean, comfortable, and well-kept. What really made the stay special was the staff – they were incredibly warm, welcoming, and always ready to help with a smile. From check-in to dining, their hospitality made us feel truly cared for. Highly recommend this resort for a relaxing and memorable getaway! ❤️❤️❤️👍👍

Name: Pigeon Island Beach Resort
User_Review:
We stayed at Pigeon Island Beach Resort, Nilaveli in the last week of August 2025. Overall, it was a pleasant experience, the staff were very welcoming, friendly and helpful, which made us feel at home from the start.

However, one thing to note is that this period is considered the off-season. The hotel was undergoing some repair work and didn’t seem fully prepared for guests at the time. While everything else was good, the ongoing maintenance affected the overall experience a little.
That said, I believe this is more of a seasonal issue. When the local travel season to Trincomalee begins, the resort and its staff will likely be fully ready and at their best.

It’s a nice place with warm hospitality,
just make sure to check the season before planning your visit for the best experience.

Thank you for everything.

Name: Pigeon Island Beach Resort
User_Review:
A Memorable Stay at Pigeon Island Beach Resort 🌴

I want to extend my heartfelt thanks to the management and staff at Pigeon Island Beach Resort for an unforgettable stay. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warm hospitality and exceptional service.
The rooms were spacious, clean, and beautifully maintained, offering a perfect retreat after a day in the sun. The highlight of our stay was undoubtedly the incredible buffet—a wide variety of delicious dishes that catered to every taste, with fresh seafood and local flavors that truly stood out.
The resort’s location is stunning, nestled along the pristine Nilaveli beach, and the atmosphere was both relaxing and rejuvenating. Every member of the staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort, making us feel truly valued.
Highly recommended for anyone looking for a peaceful beach getaway with top-notch service and amenities. We’ll definitely be back!

Name: Pigeon Island Beach Resort
User_Review:
