THE BEACH RESORT ARE NEARBY TO SEA BEACH. BUT THERE SECURITY GUARD AND SECURITY CAMERA ARE NOT AVAILABLE ALL THE ENTRANCE.
I LOST RS. 5000 DOLLER and Many More Valuable Things ROM MY CLOSED HOTEL ROOM. IT'S ONLY POSSIBLE WHEN ANY KNOWN SERVICE SUPPORT PERSON WILL ENTER INSIDE and After Theft again Locked THE HOTEL Room.
The People Denied about the Incident.
Immediately I lodge Complaint Local Police Station.
But THE POLICE PEOPLE WERE VERY EFFICIENT. THEY IMMEDIATELY CALLED TOURIST POLICE and Utlimately THE TOURIST Police of Sri Lanka 🇱🇰 actively CALLED THE Manager of THE RESORT and The Manager Compansate our Doller amount but other Valuable items are gone.
Don't Book The RESORT

Name: Pigeon Island Beach Resort
User_Review: The beach at this hotel is absolutely stunning. Unfortunately, the beauty of the location is completely overshadowed by the terrible staff. From unfriendly attitudes to not delivering ordered room service, their lack of professionalism makes the experience frustrating and disappointing, leaving you wishing the people matched the charm of the place

Name: Nilaveli Beach Resort
User_Review:
Not to be confused with the Nilaveli Beach Hotel, this hotel consists of cabins right on the beach.  You know it is in a good location when you have a tap at the bottom of the stairs to your cabin to wash off the sand!  The staff were very friendly and helpful - they bent over backwards to help us.  Our cabin was spotlessly clean and the staff were constantly sweeping away sand.  We had a fan and air conditioning.
It is on a deserted, long beach with a clean sea.  The food was fantastic and beautifully presented.  We originally booked half board but there was too much (delicious) food at dinner so we dropped to a la carte, which was much cheaper and still great.  The restaurant staff worked very hard and were very smiley.
The pool is quite small but it is fine, and the sea is immense!  We enjoyed watching the fishermen each morning and evening pulling in their catch.
As in other parts of the east of Sri Lanka, there were a surprising number of crows in the evening.  Not the fault of the hotel, but just be prepared. And lots of dragonflies.
We all loved staying here, it is such a unique place.  Highly recommended.
To show I'm balanced, the bathroom door was quite noisy and, as it was glass, putting the bathroom light on lit up the room. But I would still recommend the hotel to anyone.

Name: Nilaveli Beach Resort
User_Review: Very nice location on the beach, looks very beautiful and relaxed. Nice rooms, but didn’t have hot water even once during our 3 days stay. The food is just bad, it’s not tasty and does not fit visual description, the choose is poor as well. Went to other hotels to have a docent dinner. No TV in the room, no conditioner and the shampoo is very weird quality. The stuff is very nice and the overall hotel and ambiance is nice as well. The also did a nice towel swabs for our honeymoon.

Name: Nilaveli Beach Resort
User_Review: Beautiful hotel in a nice and calm location. Perfect to re-charge batteries and relax. The staff was super friendly and we really enjoyed our stay

Name: Nilaveli Beach Resort
User_Review: Its truly beautiful place ,every thing better than what we expect ,is much better if you put some one who can speak singhala,

Name: Nilaveli Beach Resort
User_Review: The rooms were luxurious, clean and cozy. Really friendly and hospitable staff too - always willing to help with any little request. The resort is directly accessible to the Nilaveli Beach, whereby we get to see the fishermen crew in action! We will be back!

Name: Amaranthe Bay Resort & Spa
User_Review:
We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The service was excellent, and the location was perfect. We checked in at midnight, and the staff welcomed us warmly without any hesitation. We stayed for 3 nights, and everything was very comfortable. The staff were always friendly, attentive, and ready to bring us whatever we needed. They really cared about us throughout our stay.

It’s definitely one of the best hotels I can recommend to anyone.

The only small issue we faced was with the bed. At first, we couldn’t figure it out, but later realized they used two mattresses joined together, which made the middle a bit uncomfortable for sleeping. Because of this, I rated the room 4 stars.

Apart from that, everything was perfect and very cozy. A big thank you to the whole staff for making our stay memorable!

Name: Amaranthe Bay Resort & Spa
User_Review: Stayed one night on a family holiday. Friendly staff, great location with a view of bay. Hotel has luxury & modern amenities. However, hotel is poorly maintained. Needs a fresh look. Food was delicious & nice array of food on buffet. Overall value for money was there as I've found a special deal on Agoda.

Name: Amaranthe Bay Resort & Spa
User_Review:
Very great experience. The hotel is properly maintained (yes, here and there you can see some marks of maintenance, but not every hotel can be brand new!) and is very clean. The room was awesome, we had a junior suite. Also the room was clean, new electric installation and everything was in a good shape.
One of the highlights is the staff! Every one is very friendly and helpful. Whenever, we had a question or needed support some was there to help us. Especially, Mr Sri Mayuran was always there to find a solution.
The location is not directly at the beach, but there is a free shuttle service to the beach.
With regards to improvements, the pool was a bit cloudy during our stay.
We can highly recommend to go there.

Something additional not directly related to the hotel. As part of our round tripp through Sri Lanka we also had a whale and dolphin watching boat tour. The provider we used was very respectful towards the dolphins - kept sufficient distance and didn’t chased them. Others really chased the dolphins, which forced them to flee. Overall there were dozens of boats „looking“ for dolphins, which was bad to see, especially due to the negative ones chasing them, which caused a lot of stress for the animals. We left after some time and relocated and than the dolphins came to us and showed a completely different behavior - swimming next to the boat for some time without fleeing. If you want to do such a tour look for a sustainable provider, which is focused on animal welfare and not short time tourist attractions. Otherwise, the dolphin may relocate to other places and will not be seen again.

Name: Amaranthe Bay Resort & Spa
User_Review:
Best best best time in my life 🤩🤩🤩
It is expensive but totally worth it. We will visit here again definitely.

Thank you for the small birthday party and video! (quality is crazy…🙊)

This resort has No bugs, super clean room, nice food and the friendly staff (Mithu 😇 and all other staffs)

Name: Amaranthe Bay Resort & Spa
User_Review:
We stayed at Amaranthé Bay Resort & Spa last week, and the entire experience was nothing short of peaceful, luxurious, and truly memorable. We booked the Junior Suite Room, and it exceeded our expectations — everything was spotlessly clean, incredibly comfortable, and well-equipped. The in-room Jacuzzi added a perfect touch of relaxation and created some truly unforgettable moments.

The staff were very helpful and friendly throughout our stay, always making sure we were comfortable. The food was good, and we enjoyed everything we tried.

The resort’s location is stunning, surrounded by nature and calm waters. One of the highlights of our stay was the canoe ride — such a serene and beautiful experience that I’ll always remember.

From start to finish, everything about the stay felt well thought out and pleasant. I would definitely recommend Amaranthé Bay to anyone looking for a relaxing and luxurious getaway. Would love to return again!

Name: Heritance Kandalama Dambulla
User_Review:
An unforgettable stay at Heritance Kandalama!

I had a truly amazing experience at Heritance Kandalama. The hotel’s architecture perfectly blends with nature, offering breathtaking views of the lake and surrounding mountains. The rooms are clean, spacious, and beautifully designed to give a peaceful, relaxing atmosphere.

The staff were exceptionally friendly, professional, and always ready to help with a smile. The food at the buffet was outstanding — a great variety of Sri Lankan and international dishes, all full of flavor.

What I loved most was the calm and natural environment. Waking up to the sound of birds and watching monkeys and peacocks from the balcony made the stay very special. The infinity pool overlooking the lake is simply stunning!

Overall, it’s a perfect place for anyone looking to relax, reconnect with nature, and enjoy luxury at the same time. Highly recommended! 🌿💚

Name: Heritance Kandalama Dambulla
User_Review:
I had an unforgettable stay — such a beautiful hotel surrounded by incredible nature. The design, the atmosphere, and the views are absolutely stunning.

Asela, the General Manager was incredibly attentive, and the entire staff was warm, professional, and genuinely caring. You can really feel their passion for what they do. I also loved the hotel’s strong commitment to sustainability, which makes the experience even more meaningful.

The wildlife safari was amazing — even with a bit of rain, it was magical — and Nayala, the guide is very profesional and caring.
Food was delicious and Shanmu, the Chef was always willing to share food tips.

A very special place that combines comfort, authenticity, and respect for nature. I couldn’t recommend it more!

Name: Heritance Kandalama Dambulla
User_Review: The setting is beautiful with trees, birds, and monkeys all around, and the pool faces the water with a great view. The room was comfortable, quiet, and spotless, with everything working as it should. Service was excellent from check in to check out. Staff were friendly, quick to help, and always polite. The buffet and room service were both very good with many fresh options. Housekeeping kept things tidy and the team handled small requests right away, even taking my clothes and ironing them. Everything ran smoothly and the whole place felt peaceful and close to nature. I would happily return.

Name: Heritance Kandalama Dambulla
User_Review:
I attended a destination wedding at Heritance Kandalama and it was exceptional. The hotel is stunning, serene, and impeccably maintained, with breathtaking views and thoughtful design throughout.
The staff were the standout. Warm, attentive, and proactive at every moment, they made the entire weekend feel effortless and welcoming.
The food was superb. Fresh, flavorful, and consistently excellent. Rooms were spotless and everything ran smoothly. I highly recommend this hotel for weddings and memorable getaways.

Name: Heritance Kandalama Dambulla
User_Review:
We had our wedding at Heritance Kandalama and it was truly unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to take care of us and our guests. The coordination was seamless—they helped with every detail, guided our guests with such kindness, and made the whole weekend flow with ease. We never had to worry about a thing.

The food was another highlight. Every meal was incredible, and our guests are still talking about how much they enjoyed it. A special thank you to the chef, who was so thoughtful and accommodating, making sure every dish was delicious and beautifully presented. It really elevated the entire experience and made our celebrations feel even more special.

The hotel itself is breathtaking—perched over the jungle and lake, it felt like the most magical backdrop we could have ever asked for. Combined with the hospitality, the atmosphere, and the care that went into every moment, it gave us memories we’ll treasure for a lifetime.

We are endlessly grateful to the team at Heritance Kandalama for giving us the most beautiful, effortless, and heart-filled start to our marriage.

Name: Cinnamon Lodge Habarana
User_Review:
We stayed in the hotel for two nights to celebrate our honey moon and the experience was fantastic. The rooms are very clean and bed really confortable. You can see the monkeys through the Windows, It was a really good experience.
The food was great with diferente  options to choose, as well as the two swimming pools. The hotel has a lake with all nature around where you can breath peace on there.
All the staff were really friendly with us, specially our rooms boy Pium. Thanks a lot for your hospitality. We 've enjoyed our trip to Sri Lanka.

Name: Cinnamon Lodge Habarana
User_Review:
Last weekend we stayed at Cinnamon Lodge Habarana with friends and absolutely loved the calm and quiet vibe by the Habarana Lake. The surroundings were stunning and perfect for a relaxing getaway.
Though the rooms felt a bit old, they were maintained really well, hats off to the housekeeping team. Food was excellent with a great mix of local, Western and Indian dishes. We also enjoyed an amazing boat ride, which was a highlight of the trip.
The property is huge and beautiful to walk around freely. The only letdown was that we booked a double room with a king bed but got twin beds merged instead. Other than that, it was a lovely experience overall.

Name: Cinnamon Lodge Habarana
User_Review: My brother and I booked into the Cinnamon Grand hotel on the 26 th.of September and was extremely happy with our experience there.Having stayed at the hotel some months previously we knew what to expect.Our check in was was conducted superbly by a very professional,friendly and polite front office team, Dinithi, Madushika, Nimna and a few others(I cannot recall their names)We were taken to our cottage and a phone call later to ask if everything was ok.We were given a complimentary fruit platter in our room.The room was excellent and so was the dining experience. A magnificent and delicious spread of top quality food and good service provided by dining room hostess Danusha.Thank you Cinnamon Lodge in Habarana,we shall return in the future.

Name: Cinnamon Lodge Habarana
User_Review:
An incredible hotel just a stone's throw from the centre of Habarana and very close to Sigiriya with spectacular views. One of the best hotels in the country, both for its services and for its people and food! We stayed for two nights in October 2025 and were very sad to leave. The rooms are extremely clean, very comfortable and spacious. The hotel staff are very attentive and friendly. Special mention goes to Chef Asindu, who recommended the best traditional dishes for us to try and made us feel at home. Thank you very much, friend, we will miss you!
In short, a hotel that is well worth a visit. We will definitely be back!!

Name: Cinnamon Lodge Habarana
User_Review:
We had the most wonderful stay at Cinnamon Lodge Habanera. I was there with a group and not only were the rooms, facilities and food wonderful - what made our stay exceptional was the staff. Always smiling and with a cheerful Ayuowan nothing was ever too much trouble.

Special thank you to Kusala - who helped me immensely upon check in with one lady in my group. She even called on our table at dinner to make sure everything was ok and arranged for room service for a traveller who didn’t come down for dinner.

The other wonderful reception staff Dinithi, Pramudi and Nimna - thank you for everything you did for us. You were all so kind and professional - we didn’t want to leave!

The food was amazing! Special thanks to Upul and Champika for the very attentive and professional service. You made every mealtime a great experience for us.

And to Thilinika for the best omelettes I have ever had! You are a star in the kitchen and I really enjoyed chatting with you each morning.

I had a wonderful walk around the organic garden and the butterfly garden with your wonderful gardener, and all of the gate staff were so welcoming.

My room attendant Dasun - thank you for your wonderful smile and wonderful work on looking after my room. You are wonderful.

I am already looking forward to returning and will be recommending Cinnamon Habanara to all of my friends, family and colleagues.

Thank you to all of the team for making out stay so memorable.

Name: Aliya Resort & Spa Sigiriya
User_Review:
It was a perfect stay experience.
I checked in late night and stayed 2 nights.
The room condition was good, 4 family members could sleep firmly with 1 king + 2 single beds in 2nd floor. The room was clean and well maintained.
The breakfast was included in our pkan and we satisfied with it. I really enjoyed hooter with tempered onion and omelettes.
The swimming pool is great to swim seeing Sigiriya. The view was gorgeous.
I also loved the bar, Aliya. I enjoyed the foods at there and the service from the staffs.
I also had a chance to get massage, oil massage was good enough to relax.

Name: Aliya Resort & Spa Sigiriya
User_Review:
I had a long stay at Aliya Resort and Spa very recently. It was an unforgettable experience and very enjoyable one. The surrounding was so calm and peaceful. The sound of crickets at night gave me a sense as being in the natural environment. From the reception to the room the service, hospitality, care and love given towards us must highly appreciated. The restaurant too was so nicely arranged and the spread too was delicious and  clean. Each and everyone did their best. I must pay my special thanks to the RGM Mr. Kasun Wijerathne for the great hospitality rendered towards me and at the same time Miss Pabalu, I thank you very much for the warm care given to me.
The solo player who soothes the guests’ inner peace by their melodies music each and every night is a special kind of inspiration.
I highly recommend this hotel to anyone who is interested in having a peaceful, relaxing stay.

Name: Aliya Resort & Spa Sigiriya
User_Review: Hotel is very nice specially i should thank to housekeeping because of maintaining the property very well. Garden team also superb. They are maintaining garden very well and the have very beautiful smile. But i feel this hotel is running with less staff. As an example i feel it happening in f&b and FO. I didnt get my welcome treat even others got it. But they all very nice and ready to Welcome there guests. Lightening in the room is very poor. Feel so much darkness. I suggest to repair restaurant ceiling some cracks was there. This is not a complain this is my suggestion. Room and cleanliness superb. Need to visit this property again. I love it. The view and pool superb. And i suggest to add rubber slippers. Because sometimes we need it to go out. Thank you for your corporation.

Name: Aliya Resort & Spa Sigiriya
User_Review: Surrounded by jungle vegetation and with line of sight to Sigiriya and pidurangula rocks, this hotel is a perfect choice for visitors in Sigiriya. The ecological design fits with the nature, it is quite new high quality facility which is making the experience better than expected. Make sure you have more than one night , spend time on the pool which is uplifted to the height if the surrounding trees and with the Sigiriya rock in the horizon. The hotel has also a nice Spa and a museum and they are offering morning activities with the hotel naturalist. The price is very reasonable and value for money is great and the best in the area. Plan to take your dinner in the hotel, it is a superb buffet and there are not many alternatives outside.

Name: Aliya Resort & Spa Sigiriya
User_Review:
I had a great stay at this hotel.
The room was very comfortable and well kept.
The infinity pool was stunning, offering a beautiful view that made the experience even more relaxing.
The buffet was good, but I felt the continental food options were limited and could use more variety.
Overall, a very nice stay with just a bit of room for improvement on the dining side.

Name: Jetwing Lake Dambulla
User_Review:
I stayed one night at Jetwing Lake in Dambulla, and it’s set in a truly beautiful location. We especially loved the long, spacious pool — it was perfect for a relaxing swim. The pool attendant was very helpful and attentive, which added to the overall experience (unfortunately, I can't recall his name).

The hotel offers a buffet, and we really enjoyed the variety and quality of the food.

Overall, it was a pleasant and relaxing stay. I would definitely recommend Jetwing Lake for anyone visiting the Dambulla area.

Name: Jetwing Lake Dambulla
User_Review:
Another lovely stay at another Jetwing hotel! The rooms were great. Really love the bathroom, the space, the amenities. Few things that could’ve been added are a pen/paper and few laundry bags.
Overall a very relaxing stay, had a very nice early morning walk around the property, and the food was great too! A definite recommendation for anyone.

Name: Jetwing Lake Dambulla
User_Review: We stayed at Jetwing Lake in Dambulla from October 8 to October 11 and thoroughly enjoyed our time there. The hotel, location, and food are outstanding. The staff is extremely friendly and goes out of their way to fulfill every guest's wish to make their stay unique. A big thank you also to chef Shanaka and his family. We met him by chance outside the hotel and he sacrificed his day off to show us the area, his family, and his farm. We will never forget this experience and the impressions it left on us.

Name: Jetwing Lake Dambulla
User_Review: Our stay at Jetwing Lake was absolutely superb! The pool environment was so relaxing, the room setting was perfect, and the food was excellent. From the moment we arrived, the welcome was so warm that we even wondered if they had given us the wrong room — it was that special! We were treated like VIPs throughout our stay. Truly felt like “ladies and gentlemen serving ladies and gentlemen.” A memorable experience we would love to repeat!

Name: Jetwing Lake Dambulla
User_Review: Jetwing Lake welcomed me with the sweetest gesture — a beautiful flower right at the entrance. It honestly made my day and set such a warm, peaceful vibe for the rest of my stay. It’s little things like this that really make a place feel special. Grateful for the thoughtful touch and kind hospitality!

Name: Oak Ray Wild Yala Extension
User_Review: We had an excellent stay at Oak Ray Wild Yala for two nights with our group👌🏼 We booked 40 rooms, and each one was spacious, clean, and beautifully maintained. The staff were exceptionally friendly and attentive, making us feel truly welcome throughout our stay. The food was outstanding—especially the breakfast, which was a highlight. The head chef absolutely killed it at the night BBQ party! 🔥 Special thanks to Manager Gayan for accommodating all our special requests and ensuring everything ran smoothly. Highly recommended for group stays and anyone looking for a top-notch resort experience. ⭐️⭐️⭐️

Name: Oak Ray Wild Yala Extension
User_Review: We had a wonderful stay at Oak Ray Wild Yala Hotel. The room was clean, spacious, and very comfortable. We received a warm welcome upon arrival, and the peaceful, quiet environment made our stay even more relaxing. The staff were extremely friendly, always smiling and ready to help. The swimming pool was well-maintained and a great spot to unwind. Special thanks to the manager, who was very kind and attentive throughout our visit. Overall, it was a fantastic experience, and we would definitely recommend this hotel to others.

Name: Oak Ray Wild Yala Extension
User_Review: Oak Ray Wild Yala in Tissamaharama was a fantastic experience! The hotel offers a perfect base for visiting Yala National Park, just a short drive away. The property is peaceful and beautifully maintained, with lush greenery and a relaxing atmosphere. Our room was spacious, clean, and very comfortable. The staff were extremely courteous and helpful throughout our stay. We especially enjoyed the buffet meals, which included a great mix of local and international dishes. The pool was a great spot to unwind after a safari. Highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting Tissamaharama or planning a Yala safari!

Name: Oak Ray Wild Yala Extension
User_Review:
Honeymoon Bliss at Oak Ray Wild Yala🐘

We had the pleasure of spending two unforgettable nights at Oak Ray Wild Yala to celebrate our honeymoon and it was nothing short of perfection.

✨ First Impressions
From the moment we arrived, the ambiance was magical. Nestled near the untamed beauty of Yala National Park, the property blended rustic charm with modern luxury. The staff greeted us with warm smiles, setting the tone for the attentive service that followed.

🍽️ Culinary Delights
The meals were absolutely divine. Every dish felt thoughtfully crafted, bursting with flavor and showcasing local ingredients with flair. From traditional Sri Lankan cuisine to international favorites, we were spoiled with variety and quality throughout our stay.

🙌 Service that Stood Out
The service was seamless and personal. Whether it was arranging excursions, ensuring our comfort, or surprising us with special touches for our honeymoon, the staff went above and beyond to make us feel cherished.

🌺 Final Thoughts
Oak Ray Wild Yala didn’t just meet our expectations it created memories we'll treasure forever. If you're looking for a romantic getaway wrapped in nature, comfort, and heartfelt hospitality, this place is a dream come true.

Name: Oak Ray Wild Yala Extension
User_Review: Oak Ray Wild Yala is a peaceful and serene retreat, perfect for those looking to unwind in nature. The ambiance is calm and soothing, with well-maintained surroundings that enhance the relaxing atmosphere. The staff are genuinely warm and attentive, always ready to assist with a smile, making you feel welcomed throughout your stay. Rooms are clean, spacious, and thoughtfully designed for comfort. The dining experience is delightful, offering a variety of delicious dishes that cater to different tastes. Overall, it's an ideal place for a quiet getaway, where you can truly relax and enjoy a high level of hospitality and service.

Name: The Lake Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: Good hotel but it has very bad maintenance you could sleep there for one night otherwise it is recommended you book another hotel. This hotel is cheap for its value and you could stay here for a quick night. The hotel should be fully renovated, staff and service is good but it is a bit over staffed. Food is good and the service is amazing. The view is also very good.

Name: The Lake Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: This hotel used to be one of our family destinations. We have stayed here many times and the hotel was closed for some considerable period of time. However recently I noticed that they have reopened the hotel and everything seems to be perfect in the pictures which they have posted in google. So as usual, I made a reservation for our family vacation, but when I reached the hotel only I realized that they have posted the pictures from years back when the hotel was functioning and maintaining well. Now the hotel is not in a good condition at all. Everything looks really unorganized and no quality at all. Rooms are not cleaned and had a very bad odor. They are using old pictures to sell their rooms and that’s what made my entire trip a miserable one. Even we felt bad to see the way how new management maintains the hotel. This place is not recommended at all if you’re looking for a pleasant yet a clean stay.

Name: The Lake Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: Location is SUPERB!! Breathtaking view to Lake ❤️ Clam and splendid 🥰 enjoyed the location very much! Pool was good! Rooms were good. Staff were friendly. We took only some dishes at night and those were tasty. International breakfast was not much at all. Local break fast menu was good. Room services staff should be given more training, though there was no major problems. Few items were not in the room (kettle, dustbin) which we had to ask to bring in. But, was not a big issue😃 we were lucky to see some elephant very close to the hotel ❤️ there were wild rabbits, different kind of mugati🤔 visible near the beautiful humangus tress....

Name: The Lake Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review:
Actually there are some advantages and disadvantages. But mostly disadvantages.

First of all let me talk about the advantages. For me the best thing was the scenery. The scenery captured my eye as soon as i went in. Second of all the pool had a close view to the lakeside which i liked too.

Next let me talk about the disadvantages. First and for mostly the food was really bad and tasted weird and and had a very low variety.
The bathroom was too small plus the translucent window should be removed. The service was very poor although the staff was friendly.

So please take these facts into consideration. Also if you can, try adding a small activity area dor the kids to enjoy more. Hope things will change when I come back.

Name: The Lake Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: One of the worst services that I've ever experienced. We have done the booking for standard rooms. We confirmed the prices multiple times with the hotel through phone calls. But when we checked into the hotel, they led us to different rooms which has higher rates. We did not know that and they haven't told us about that. We only knew this when only the bill arrived the following day, morning. When we told this to the management, they argued with us. We have been scammed. Also, the food wasn't any good. No taste at all.

Name: Hotel Sudu Araliya Polonnaruwa
User_Review:
I have stayed at several other Araliya chain hotels, and compared to them, this property appears to be less well maintained. The rooms were spacious, but the cleanliness and overall upkeep could be improved. Dental kits were provided only upon request.

On a positive note, the staff were exceptionally courteous, friendly, and supportive throughout the stay. The buffet did not offer a wide variety of dishes, but the available selections were flavourful and well-prepared.

Name: Hotel Sudu Araliya Polonnaruwa
User_Review:
Room: Superb! The room was very spacious with a large, comfortable bed — perfect for relaxing after a long day.
Location: Excellent location with a beautiful lake view. Truly peaceful and scenic.
Service: Outstanding! The staff were extremely kind and attentive — always quick to respond. I have never experienced such wonderful hospitality before.
Food: The buffet offered a wide variety of delicious dishes. Everything was fresh and flavorful.
Special Thanks: A heartfelt thank you to Mrs. Sagarika Hemarathne for her exceptional support and warm hospitality. She made our stay truly memorable!

Name: Hotel Sudu Araliya Polonnaruwa
User_Review: I had a really pleasant stay at Hotel Sudu Araliya in Polonnaruwa. The hotel has a great location facing the beautiful Parakrama Samudraya, which makes the view so relaxing. The staff were very kind and always willing to help. The rooms were spacious, clean, and comfortable. The food was tasty with a good mix of local and international dishes. The pool area and garden were well maintained, creating a peaceful atmosphere. Overall, it was a very comfortable and enjoyable experience — perfect for anyone visiting the cultural city of Polonnaruwa!

Name: Hotel Sudu Araliya Polonnaruwa
User_Review:
I stayed at Hotel Sudu Araliya during a recent trip to Polonnaruwa and really enjoyed the experience. The lake view is absolutely beautiful, such a peaceful setting to unwind and take in the surroundings.

The staff were genuinely lovely. Super attentive, always ready to help, and made us feel very welcome throughout the stay. Their hospitality was definitely a highlight.

That said, the hotel could use a bit of a refresh. Some areas feel a little dated, and a few renovations would go a long way in elevating the overall vibe. Also, the buffet could be improved with more variety and some modern options.

Despite those small drawbacks, it’s a great place to relax. With a few upgrades, this hotel could easily become one of the top spots in the area.

Name: Hotel Sudu Araliya Polonnaruwa
User_Review: The rooms are very nice and clean. The bathroom was spacious with great water pressure and hot water, which we really appreciated. However, there was a small water leak from the bathroom to the room, which was a bit unpleasant, and we also noticed a slight odor from the toilet. On the positive side, the location is excellent and the buffet was really nice. Overall, it’s a good place to stay with just a few areas for improvement.

Name: Giritale Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: One of the best places to stay at in the town of Giritale. The view is majestic with wildlife everywhere you look. The food can only be described in one word: Delicious. The hospitality of the staff was helpful and great. A big thanks to Wijaya for all of his help during our trip. Seriously a must visit place. Would recommend to all.

Name: Giritale Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: Spent two nights here and had a wonderful time. Staff were great. Lovely big hotel with sensational views. Pool table and pool. Breakfast was great (both Western and Sri Lankan). Dinner was fantastic. Cool temple nearby and lake is close.

Name: Giritale Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review:
We had a fantastic stay at Lavendish Lake Giritale. The staff were friendly and welcoming, and the room — including the bathroom — was very clean and well maintained. The buffet offered a good variety of dishes, though the overall quality could be improved. The highlight was definitely the breathtaking lake view from our room.

Overall, a pleasant and memorable experience.

Name: Giritale Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: Seriously, I don’t get why anyone would give this less than 5 stars. Great value, the best view ever! High-quality materials in the rooms and throughout. It’s an old hotel, but in a good way – full of character. Staff are super professional. Highly recommended.

Name: Giritale Hotel Polonnaruwa
User_Review: We had an amazing stay at Lavendish, Girithale! The service was truly exceptional — the staff were warm, attentive, and always ready to help. The food was absolutely delicious, with a great variety of flavours that made every meal enjoyable. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for comfort, great hospitality, and a peaceful getaway. Thank you for the wonderful experience!

Name: Forest Rock Garden Anuradhapura
User_Review:
I stayed here with a group and had a single villa. On the surface everything appears lovely and high end, but as you use the rooms the wear and age is evident. The room I stayed in had no cell reception or WiFi, and the room phone did not work. There was no water provided in the room, I had no way to contact reception to ask for some. I arrived at night and did not know where or how to find other parts of the hotel. My shower door was askew and the top hinge was held in by what appeared to be a plastic card. The robes had holes and were musty. You will be woken up by monkeys jumping on the roof, trying to open doors, and licking and chewing on the windows.

I only had one meal at the hotel, breakfast. My food was stolen by a cheeky monkey who was quickly chased off by the staff.

The location is great if you want to really be away from everything. There are monkeys, trees, silence, and nature. The staff was wonderful, when you can find them.

Name: Forest Rock Garden Anuradhapura
User_Review:
This hotel is no less than a haunted place.
If you are traveling solo or as a couple then avoid this hotel as there is a high possibility of anyone getting a heart attack due to fear at night.
This old beautiful property in the middle of the forest has neither proper staff nor security.

Name: Forest Rock Garden Anuradhapura
User_Review:
A Hidden Paradise in the North: A Review of Frost Rock Garden, Anuradhapura

Tucked away in the historic city of Anuradhapura, Frost Rock Garden is a serene and beautifully landscaped retreat that combines natural charm with modern elegance. Whether you're a traveler exploring Sri Lanka's ancient ruins or a local looking for a peaceful getaway, this spot offers a refreshing change of pace. I recently had the pleasure of visiting this hidden gem, and it turned out to be a memorable experience full of relaxation, beauty, and warm hospitality.

A Beautifully Designed Oasis
From the moment you enter Frost Rock Garden, you’re greeted with a stunning landscape — rock-themed architecture mixed with greenery, calm water features, and well-maintained paths. The garden layout is both aesthetic and thoughtful, designed to give visitors a sense of calm and wonder. Large natural boulders are creatively incorporated into the garden’s layout, enhancing the rustic feel while maintaining a modern touch.

Ideal for Relaxation and Photos
The peaceful environment here is perfect for a relaxing walk, a quiet picnic, or just to sit and enjoy nature. It’s also a haven for photography enthusiasts — every corner is picture-worthy. Whether it’s the reflection of trees on the water, the artistic stone arrangements, or the contrast between natural and modern textures, you’ll find many Instagram-worthy spots here.

Events and Gatherings
Frost Rock Garden is also an excellent venue for private functions. I learned that it is often used for wedding shoots, family outings, and small gatherings. The staff is well-experienced in organizing events and maintaining the space to ensure a clean, welcoming atmosphere. The garden’s peaceful surroundings make it a favorite spot for couples looking to capture romantic moments.

Calm Location, Yet Easily Accessible
Although it feels like a peaceful escape, the location is surprisingly accessible from the main areas of Anuradhapura. It’s not far from the sacred sites, yet far enough to give you a sense of quiet and privacy. Parking is available, and the entrance is clearly marked, making it convenient even for first-time visitors.

Friendly Staff and Service
Another highlight of my visit was the friendly and professional staff. From the moment we entered, we were warmly welcomed and guided through the space. The team clearly takes pride in maintaining the garden’s beauty and ensuring that guests have a relaxing experience. They were attentive but not intrusive, which made our visit even more comfortable.

Perfect for All Ages
Whether you're with family, your partner, friends, or even traveling solo, Frost Rock Garden is a place that suits all types of visitors. Kids can explore the garden paths and open spaces safely, while adults will enjoy the peace and nature. It’s also a great stopover for travelers who want to escape the heat and crowd of the city for a while.

Final Thoughts
Frost Rock Garden in Anuradhapura is truly a gem that deserves more attention. It combines natural beauty, thoughtful design, and top-tier hospitality to create a space that’s both relaxing and inspiring. I highly recommend this spot to anyone visiting Anuradhapura — it’s not just a garden, it’s an experience of peace, elegance, and harmony with nature.

Whether you're planning a romantic photo shoot, a quiet afternoon, or a unique spot to visit after touring the ancient city, Frost Rock Garden is a must-see. Don’t forget your camera — and your sense of wonder.

Name: Forest Rock Garden Anuradhapura
User_Review:
It’s a natural experience closer to national park and Anuradhapura. Olden chalet style large rooms that need some work but staff are nice, helpful and courteous. Pictorial atmosphere where it will give you a different look but nice.

In the night you will hear all kind of animals noises. When we stayed, we were the only guests occupied two rooms out of 24.

Food is somewhat local, tasty and spicy. I liked the seafood curry and string hopper. I would recommend.

Name: Forest Rock Garden Anuradhapura
User_Review:
Absolutely avoid this place! Don’t fall into false advertising. This place is not a star hotel.

1. The pool has been out of commission for years. The filters aren’t working, and the water is hazy and smells terrible.
2. The food is subpar; it was significantly better back in 2015. There are no juices, coffee or other food options available, and for 45k per night, the dining experience is nowhere near what you expect at similarly priced hotels.
3. I found a scorpion on top of the bed awning in room 116. I called the hotel three times for assistance, but no one came to remove it. I had to deal with it myself at midnight!
4. The walkways are completely unlit, posing a serious hazard when walking to and from the restaurant. They haven’t not put any effort to fix the already existing footpath lighting system. It is also hard to find the way around the resort at night.
5. There is a lack of responsible staff at the hotel, even in emergencies. The phones in the villas to contact the front desk are not functioning.
6. The bed linens and pillows are stained, and even the white towels are a dingy gray.
7. The split-type air conditioner in room 111 hasn’t been serviced in ages; it’s incredibly noisy, forcing us to turn it off in the middle of the night.
8. Driver accommodation is even worst. There’s a noticeable lack of water in the toilets. We've been informed that wild elephants have damaged the pipes, which raises questions about why only those specific pipes were affected.

I came in with high hopes for a luxury experience like we had back in 2015, but it’s clear that management has utterly neglected this place. Only a handful of staff members seem to truly care about maintaining it.

Name: Palm Garden Village Hotel
User_Review: This was by far the worst service I have ever experienced. I strongly recommend not going there. The customer service was extremely poor, the staff were unfriendly, and the food quality was disappointing. On top of that, the prices do not reflect any value for the money paid. Overall, a very unsatisfactory experience.

Name: Palm Garden Village Hotel
User_Review:
No TV due to monkeys pulling out cable.
Long walk to the reception, in the dark, with no lit paths.
Room service was offered instead of going to restaurant (which is why I think I was the only one there).
Check in was good, with refreshing Sri Lankan orange juice served icy cold.
Quite a few steps up and down through the historic buildings so not good for people with mobility issues

Name: Palm Garden Village Hotel
User_Review: This was the worst hotel that I have been to!!! It was an absolute horror staying there!! I recommend you never ever visit this hotel!! Even the pool has frogs in it.😡😡😡. The whole hotel was under construction but the reception didn' t  imform  us before we arrived!!! The rooms are covered around with water and there are mousquito pupa in the water. The taps don’t provide water at all because the hotel is under construction!!! The rooms too smell so bad as there is really old water puddles around the rooms. Even the parking lot is covered by mud. I felt so mad at this horrible place and I don’t want anyone ever to visit this place!!!😡😡😡😡😤😤😠😠

Name: Palm Garden Village Hotel
User_Review: The Hotel service was average. However our overall experience was basic. We feel the price was high when comparing it to the experience and facilities.  The hotel has potential to provide a unique experience if only they maintained it regularly. Sadly, it's not maintained well at all. Currently there's alot of construction going on and the pool is not available.  While the rooms were okay and the service was fine, I will not recommend anyone to book a stay in this hotel for the next year until the renovations are complete.  I do not understand why the hotel is giving out room with all the construction going on. The only plus point is, it's located close to the city and temples.

Name: Palm Garden Village Hotel
User_Review:
I have stayed this hotel few years back and had really good experiences with room services, pool , staff to food. The stay I had yesterday September 15th with my family was the worst experience I had ever. The team was totally different and new. Most of them are trainees who don’t have experience in the industry. Cleanliness of the premises is very poor. From reception to gusset rooms. Wash room of the front front desk doesn’t have hand wash, accessories are broken and cleanliness is way out. It’s like a common wash room in a public place! I was offered room 111. It was a nice spacious room with nice verandah. The front view is fantastic with greenery! The condition of the bathroom was very poor! Shower was not working properly. The water flow was bad. You won’t be able to have a good shower! The bidet is blocked and water doesn’t drain. The room we stayed seems to be have not been cleaned properly. We noticed termites on the floor. They have built up few lines on the tile. Just imagine the level of attention to detail of the team! In the afternoon I went to the pool with my two children.
Unfortunately, the condition of the pool was far from acceptable during my stay. There were tree leaves scattered all over the surface, and a significant amount had accumulated at the bottom of the pool, making it unpleasant and unsanitary to use. Additionally, the general cleanliness of the pool area seemed to be neglected, which was disappointing, given the expectations I had for the quality of your hotel.

Name: Jetwing Jaffna Hotel
User_Review:
The hotel was booked by our tour company. It is in a good location, close to the Dutch Fort and good for exploring the city.
We had a very warm welcome on arrival. The hotel feels new and modern. The room was large, modern and clean with good facilities.
The restaurant was excellent, with a mix of choosing from a set menu some nights and the excellent Sri Lankan buffet on other nights. It seems popular with locals as well as guests.
Recommended.

Name: Jetwing Jaffna Hotel
User_Review:
We really enjoyed our stay at Jetwing Jaffna! The hotel’s in a great spot — close to everything but still nice and quiet. The rooms are modern, super clean, and have amazing views over the city.

The food was great too — we loved both the breakfast buffet and dinner. Big shoutout to the restaurant team and the rest of the staff — everyone was so friendly, welcoming, and always ready to help.

Definitely one of the best places to stay in Jaffna!

Name: Jetwing Jaffna Hotel
User_Review:
My recent stay at Jetwing Jaffna was made truly memorable thanks to the exceptional service provided by Siva, the manager at Skybar. He is a truly caring and attentive individual who consistently went above and beyond his duty to ensure my party and I were perfectly looked after.

From the moment we sat down, Siva’s attention to detail was evident. He didn't just take our orders; he engaged with us to understand our preferences, offering expert recommendations for local spirits and signature cocktails. He was proactive, ensuring our glasses were never empty, and was always available without being intrusive. He genuinely made us feel valued guests, constantly checking in to make sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed—not just at the bar, but often looking out for our overall experience in the hotel lobby area too.

What really stood out was his willingness to go the extra mile. On one occasion, I mentioned being interested in trying some authentic local snacks, and Siva took the initiative to coordinate with the kitchen to bring us a specially prepared sampler plate, complete with a detailed explanation of each item. This level of personalized care and warmth is rare and truly transforms a good hotel experience into a great one.

Siva is a phenomenal asset to the Jetwing Jaffna team. His professional demeanor, combined with his genuinely kind and caring nature, sets a benchmark for hospitality. If you visit Jetwing Jaffna, make sure to seek out Siva at the bar—you are guaranteed the best service.

Highly recommend!

Name: Jetwing Jaffna Hotel
User_Review:
Our stay at Jetwing Jaffna was nothing short of wonderful! From the moment we arrived, the staff welcomed us with genuine Sri Lankan hospitality. The hotel is modern, clean, and offers a perfect blend of comfort and culture right in the heart of Jaffna. We especially loved the rooftop views overlooking the city and the peaceful lagoon in the distance.

The rooms were spacious, well-kept, and thoughtfully designed. Breakfast was a delicious mix of local and western options don’t miss the Jaffna-style dosa and sambol! The location is ideal for exploring temples, markets, and cultural sites on foot or by tuk-tuk.

As a family, we appreciated the calm, safe environment and the attentive staff who made sure even our little one felt at home. If you're visiting Jaffna and want a comfortable, elegant place to unwind, Jetwing Jaffna is the perfect choice. We’ll definitely return!

Name: Jetwing Jaffna Hotel
User_Review:
✨ Beyond the Ocean Travel Guest Experience ✨

🌴 Jetwing Jaffna
Our guests stayed for 3 days at Jetwing Jaffna and had a truly fantastic experience. The rooms are superb, the food is delicious, and the service is excellent. The staff are very friendly, kind, and always ready to help. Overall, it was a superb stay and highly recommended!

Name: Tilko Jaffna City Hotel
User_Review: The food was good, but the rooms need improvement. The service was poor, and the cleanliness was not up to the mark. During our first visit, Niroshan at the reception provided excellent service, but this time we didn’t receive the same experience. Hope they improve these areas soon.

Name: Tilko Jaffna City Hotel
User_Review:
Tilko Jaffna City Hotel offers easy access near the Jaffna Ancient Fort. The location is beautiful, with a lovely garden. They don’t require an advance payment when booking, and they call a day before arrival to confirm your availability.

We received a warm welcome. Check-in time is at 2:00 PM and check-out is by 12:00 noon. The reception area was very pleasant.

Rooms are well-maintained, spacious, and clean, with all necessary amenities provided. The balcony area was also nice. Bathroom items were supplied, and the bathroom was very clean.
There’s a pool on the side of the building where the rooms are located. We went for a swim, but the water in the pool was quite warm.

Overall, the hotel is a nice place to stay, offering good rooms at an affordable price.

Name: Tilko Jaffna City Hotel
User_Review:
We stayed for two nights with our kids and had a pleasant experience. The room was clean and ready for us at checkin. The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

The food was delicious we highly recommend trying the mutton and fish curry, the deviled fish and the Jaffna coffee which was a standout.

Overall, it was a comfortable and enjoyable stay, definitely worth the price we paid.

Name: Tilko Jaffna City Hotel
User_Review:
​This is the worst place I have ever stayed.
Don't even considor to stay here.

The entire hotel smells like rotten meat and cigarette smoke.
The toilets are filthy, full of gunk and algae, and housekeeping just wiped the floor instead of cleaning it properly.
The bedsheets weren't fresh and there was no room service.
The mini-fridge didn't work and the balcony was so small it was unusable.
The swimming pool is completely neglected with rotten leaves.

Name: Tilko Jaffna City Hotel
User_Review: I booked a session to use the swimming pool there, but unfortunately, the experience was very disappointing. The pool area was smelly and dirty, and the changing rooms had no locks and visible mold. After our visit, both my son and I developed severe skin allergies.

Name: North Gate by Jetwing Jaffna
User_Review: We stayed at Northgate for 3 nights in September. We were 8 of us who were on a tour of the island and Jaffna was our second stop from Colombo. Ideally located comfortable room and good facilities & great service. All of the staff were friendly and helpful but sorry I can only remember Gopi. In my opinion the speciality at this hotel is the authentic Jaffna cuisine every day. Jaffna mutton curry, Jaffna crab curry are a couple I can name but all are delicious. I had the best thosai( Dosa) at North Gate. I will strongly recommend for anyone who really want to experience Jaffna and it’s unique cuisine

Name: North Gate by Jetwing Jaffna
User_Review:
Great hotel. Stayed at the hotel one night. Rooms were really clean and comfortable. A/C , WiFi ,clean bed linen. Very clean swimming pool. The food was amazing! For Dinner we had a four course menu with options for Sri Lankan food, authentic Jaffna food, Western food and others like Kotthu  and Biriyani. Great deserts too. Breakfast was a buffet again with an array of authentic Sri Lankan, Jaffna, and western dishes. Fruits, juices , tea, coffee. etc etc.
The staff in attendance were extremely helpful. I can recommend this hotel without any hesitation. 😊

Name: North Gate by Jetwing Jaffna
User_Review:
I stayed at North Gate Hotel, Jaffna for a 4 day visit and I must say that they give hotels like the Cinnamon chain, a run for their money. From the minute we stepped in, we experienced a warm welcome , thoughtful attention to detail and a charming hospitality that extended through out our stay. From the staff at reception, restaurant to housekeeping, everyone was so courteous and accommodating. A special note for remembering that we had been hunting high and low for Odiyal Kool and the chefs at North Gate Jaffna made it happen.

The hotel is located just a walk away from Jaffna Railway station and was a great base for us to explore the town. We also very much appreciated the work station set up in the lobby area which allowed us to meet with our partners professionally.

A very special mention about the food here. Everything was made to the highest standard, the variety was superb and I really appreciated the options to try both Western and the authentic Yaarl cuisine. In fact I ate mostly Yaarl food during my stay - it was THAT good.

Will definitely return with my family for a holiday 🙏

Name: North Gate by Jetwing Jaffna
User_Review:
This was a great base for exploring Jaffna - it had a lovely view from the balcony. Rooms are clean but the really stand out feature is the food which is really very good! The staff working in the restaurant are also very friendly.

If I could make one recommendation it would be to move the reception desk closer to the door - it felt like staff on reception were reluctant to help guests and wanted to hide away in the booths or run to the back office!

Name: North Gate by Jetwing Jaffna
User_Review: Staff are very good. Rooms need freshening but clean & good value, not so much choice anyway in Jaffna. Bar is well stocked, reasonably priced. Pool is clean & refreshing. Gym needs an upgrade.

Name: Green Grass Hotel Jaffna
User_Review:
We stayed at Green Grass Hotel and Restaurant for two days and had a pleasant experience overall. The room was quite good clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, providing a nice place to relax after a long day.

Each morning, we were served breakfast, which was included for both days. The food was quite good, though we noticed that the menu remained the same on both days. A bit more variety would have made the experience even better.

One of the highlights of our stay was the location. The hotel is conveniently located near the train station, making it easy to get around and explore the area.

In summary, it’s a good place for a short stay with decent food and a great location. We’d consider staying here again.

Name: Green Grass Hotel Jaffna
User_Review:
The location offers easy access, close to the railway station. No advance payment is required to book the room,they simply ask for confirmation before your arrival. The rooms are worth the price, clean and equipped with all necessary amenities. The girls at the reception are pleasant and the service is satisfactory.

We ordered chicken rice, but it took about an hour to be delivered to the room. The rice was okay.

The bathroom was clean, but there was a bad smell after the water drained into the pipes.

Name: Green Grass Hotel Jaffna
User_Review: My wife l stayed at GGrass between 18th to 25th July both days inclusive. Our stay during this period nothing but abysmal. We normally do not write adverse review but what we experienced need to be recorded during our stay in the hope that some improvement must be made for the future. Room service alarming. When cleaning done new sheets and towels were not provided. When asked no one ever sent a few. Taps were wobly and the shower screen door hinges coming apart. Bed side cupboard doors cannot be closed. All the 7 days TV did not worked.when informed someone came to attend still no result when informed reception asked to write a complaint inheriting still no response. Room service tea cups not collected. Everything anything needed have to walk to the reception for action. Why not have a phone link to contact reception from each room. There are many more anomalies that can be listed but in short QUALITY has been compromised for QUANTITY. To pay Rs.9000 per day for such occupancy is extremely exorbitant. One redeeming factor is the good food we enjoyed that too the service is much to be desired. Hope these anomalies be fixed in the future.overall our stay was not as expected. We can give on 4 for the quality of service and occupancy

Name: Green Grass Hotel Jaffna
User_Review:
Great service and location.. rooms are big too.

Pool is out of order
Other areas looks unclean walls need painting..

Name: Green Grass Hotel Jaffna
User_Review:
It was an absolute pleasure staying at this hotel for two nights! The rooms were not only beautiful but also impeccably clean, and having A/C and reliable hot water was definitely appreciated. What truly stood out was the fantastic range of food options available for lunch, breakfast, and dinner – every meal was a treat. The hotel boasts a wonderfully chilly and cozy environment, making it a perfect place to relax. We also thoroughly enjoyed the lovely swimming pool. The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to assist with a smile.

A significant bonus was the free Wi-Fi, which was particularly useful given the somewhat spotty mobile data coverage in the area.

I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay. 😉

Name: Mango Resort Jaffna
User_Review: One of the best places to stay in Jaffna! The rooms are spacious, super clean, and very comfortable. The atmosphere in the house is so calming that just being there gives you peace of mind. I am especially grateful to the two young men who took such good care of us and made sure everything was perfect , it truly felt like being with family. A special thanks to Mathu and Vijay for their tremendous support and warm hospitality.. we will definitely visit again..

Name: Mango Resort Jaffna
User_Review: The Mango Nest is truly the best place to stay! Super clean with a lovely atmosphere. As soon as you enter, you’re greeted by the calming view of the pool. The rooms are spotless, spacious, and very comfortable. A special thanks to Vijay and Mathu, who took such great care of us and made sure all our needs were met. Their warm hospitality really exceeded our expectations. Definitely visit again.

Name: Mango Resort Jaffna
User_Review: We absolutely love this place, amazing stay for the 8 of us in Jaffna. The house is in amazing condition, and so very clean and properly maintained. We were so lucky to be hosted and taken cared of by Vijay he kept the place in such a pristine condition and cooked us such excellent food. We will definitely be back again!!

Name: Mango Resort Jaffna
User_Review:
We had a wonderful stay in Jaffna in the Mango Nest!
The property is cozy, spacious, and beautifully designed with a charming mix of old Jaffna and South Indian vibes. It truly felt like stepping into a piece of history while still enjoying modern comfort. A special thanks to Vijay, the caretaker, for his warm hospitality and excellent service — he made our stay extra memorable. Highly recommended!

Name: Mango Resort Jaffna
User_Review:
The Mango Nest is the best hotel I’ve ever stayed at. It has a beautiful atmosphere and is a very calm, peaceful place. We rented the whole house, which I highly recommend — it’s definitely the best way to enjoy the property fully.

The caretaker, Vijay, was outstanding — always helpful and attentive. He is always concerned about ensuring the food arrives at the breakfast area on time so that no one is left hungry.
The manager, Mathoosan, made sure that everything was taken care of, including breakfast and all other needs during our stay.

Highly recommended for a relaxing getaway!

Name: Hotel Rolex Jaffna
User_Review: Here,On 16th of August 2025, we tried Lunch. The place was really crowded. We have to wait more than 10 minutes to find space for 5 members. We've ordered 3 portions of rice & curry, one portion of vegie fried rice. There're service is bit late. But the price was reasonable with the taste.

Name: Hotel Rolex Jaffna
User_Review: The food is delicious. It's a busy place with a lot of people.

Name: Hotel Rolex Jaffna
User_Review: Price and taste wise ok. They have various variations of foods. Breakfast is cheep compared with other places. Parking is bit hard due to busy area and not dedicated parking. Not an authentic jaffna style hotel. But a simple place for your meals.

Name: Hotel Rolex Jaffna
User_Review:
One of my bucket list items to do in Jaffna. I went there with some friends for lunch and we got seated into the AC areas as the other area was crowded.
The staff was friendly and explained the dishes. The portions were huge and we were glad that we didn't order more. There are signs inside the restaurant also asking people to order only what they can eat.
The food was good and the price was ok as well.

Name: Hotel Rolex Jaffna
User_Review:
I visited Rolex Hotel a few years ago and had a much better experience back then. Unfortunately, during my recent visit, it seems the quality has significantly declined. The food was a major letdown – it lacked the taste and flavor it once had, and was far from satisfying.

The cleanliness was also a concern. The place felt unclean and had a smelly atmosphere, which made it uncomfortable to dine in. On top of that, the prices were quite expensive for what you get. To make matters worse, they charge an additional 10 percent fee for using the air-conditioned room, which felt unnecessary.

Based on this experience, I wouldn’t recommend Rolex Hotel. There are certainly better options in Jaffna for a more enjoyable dining and overall experience.

Name: Mannar Pearl Rest
User_Review: It’s very happy full home stay. That worker in pearl rest he’s name and is Maran, he is soo kind full person. He finish our required as well. If you come to mannar chose Pearl Rest and change the day happy

Name: Mannar Pearl Rest
User_Review: Beautiful property in a lush garden. The spacious room (semi deluxe) was super clean with a nice bathroom. Breakfast is served in a beautiful patio right next to the room. Very tranquil location in a side street  in the centre of Mannar. Hospitable and helpful family. 100% recommended.

Name: Mannar Pearl Rest
User_Review:
It's a quiet good place to stay When you visit to mannar for holidays or business trip.
I can't believe that they give this type of rooms for a cheapest amount. And the important thing is Mr.maaran who works here is a friendly type and supportive person. When I visit mannar again I gonna Stay here for sure.😄

Name: Mannar Pearl Rest
User_Review: Great location in Mannar. The staff and family were helpful and kind. Reconstruction was finished upstairs although construction noise from neighbors was audible. The stairs to the AC room made it feel like we were in a treehouse! The room was small but had a desk and double bed. The linens and towels seemed clean but the quality wasn’t great. The bed and pillows weren’t the most comfortable. No mosquito nets so we were bitten and had to wear repellent to sleep. Ants were around as well. AC was also not working well. The bathroom had no soap or TP so we brought our own. Certainly a lot of room for improvement, but a good spot if you’re using the area only to sleep at night.

Name: Mannar Pearl Rest
User_Review: Extremely cheap, neat rooms and bathroom. There was even a balcony like place where you could sit and relax. However, felt like the hospitality wasn't great. Have been to many cheaper hotels like this where they take care of customers well. And try not to take any food from here, they charge too much. Overall, would recommend this place only if you are in a tight budget.

Name: Four Tees Rest Mannar
User_Review: Very very nice place to stay..  very kind and good customer service by Lawrence. He is the owner of the Hotel. Very clean place with delicious indian food. Calm and awesome atmosphere. Very close to railway station too. Lawrence has a sound knowledge about birds. Highly recommend this superb place for everyone. 👍👍

Name: Four Tees Rest Mannar
User_Review:
This is a perfect no nonsense place of you are a keen bird watcher, not too fussy about 'luxury'. In the same mould as Martin's Lodge, Four Teess offers basic, clean amenities with plenty of space. The food, however, is FANTASTIC! Fresh, balanced and not too spicy. Mr Lawrence, the owner, is always at hand and keen to offer local information about current bird sightings and locations.

Recommend highly to keen ornithologists

Name: Four Tees Rest Mannar
User_Review: This is the go to guest house for most of the birders at Mannar in the birding season. It has A/C and non A/C rooms and the owner Mr.Lawrence is informative when it comes to bird watching so you can ask for the best places to visit for targeted birds watching in Mannar. Food is reasonably good though price is expensive. Rooms are good as well but not the best. Calm and free environment which is a plus point.  Overall decent place to stay in Mannar and since it’s located next to Thoddaveli train station you can use train to reach it easily as well.

Name: Four Tees Rest Mannar
User_Review:
Four Teess Rest Inn - Bird lovers and Mannar nature lovers paradise. Owner Mr. Lawrence is so humble and super helpful.

Located just opposite it to (less than 5 meters) Thoodaveli railway station, this place is covered with green all around. They have both Single/Double/Family rooms with A/C and Non AC. Food is amazingly delicious and thank to their own little chef Chooty. Charges are very reasonable. If your in to bird watching and nature, your first approach would be Mr. Lawrence, he knows everything. Highly recommended place.

Name: Four Tees Rest Mannar
User_Review: The rooms are basic but were clean. The price charged is very reasonable and reflects what’s on offer.  FYI You need to bring your own towels, toilet paper etc. The owner Lawrence was very accommodative and the food was out of this world and very reasonably priced. For birders the location is very good and I would stay there again.

Name: The Palmyrah House Mannar
User_Review:
I think this is one of the best hotels you can find in Mannar. The staff, including the manager and the rest of the team, are extremely friendly, helpful, and welcoming. The food is excellent and really adds to the overall experience.

The location is great too — Talaimannar is just a 20–30 minute drive away, where you can visit the beautiful Talaimannar Beach, pier, and the historic Ram Setu (Adam’s Bridge).

The hotel also has facilities to charge EVs and PHEVs, which is a big plus.
Overall, I’d highly recommend this hotel to anyone planning to visit Mannar!

Name: The Palmyrah House Mannar
User_Review: Beautiful curated landscape and hotel, well trained staff and excellent service, travelled with the jeep team. Spacious and clean rooms. Tasty food with traditional and western varieties.

Name: The Palmyrah House Mannar
User_Review: Unexpectedly surprised. Despite the slightly dilapidated appearance of the grounds, the rooms are great. The staff were outstanding- friendly and helpful, always going beyond. We were invited to their inaugural cooking lessons and the nocturnal hunt for the elusive sri lankan slender loris in the adjacent bush was a totally unexpected highlight! The staff tell us that visiting during the wet season is amazing with the birdlife.

Name: The Palmyrah House Mannar
User_Review: I would give this place 0 stars if I could.The place is nothing like the pictures on the website. The staff are hopeless and food takes years to be made.Their room doors look like they haven't been repainted and scratched.their pool looks like it's infested with algae.I would not be mad if this place was only 10,000 rupees a night but it's 40,000, the same price as a Cinnamon hotel.Do not come unless u want to get scammed

Name: The Palmyrah House Mannar
User_Review:
It was one of the best stays we had.
Loved the food, the service, the luxurious rooms to the calming surrounding.

Name: Jaffna Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
Our family of four stayed at Jaffna Heritage Hotel for 5 nights, and it was truly a wonderful experience. The hotel perfectly blends comfort, cleanliness, and traditional charm. The staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and always ready to help with a smile.

The rooms were spacious and well maintained throughout our stay. The highlight of every morning was the delicious breakfast — fresh, flavorful, and served with genuine hospitality. We especially appreciated the local dishes that gave us a real taste of Jaffna.

The peaceful atmosphere, beautiful surroundings, and warm service made our trip even more memorable. We highly recommend Jaffna Heritage Hotel to anyone visiting Jaffna and would definitely stay here again!

Name: Jaffna Heritage Hotel
User_Review: Amazing hotel in the heart of Jaffna. The rooms are very clean and come with all the facilities and amenities to make your stay comfortable. The staff are professional and very helpful. The breakfast spread is amazing and gives you a taste of all the best local cuisine. Highly recommend Jaffna Heritage Hotel!

Name: Jaffna Heritage Hotel
User_Review:
We stayed overnight here. This is above avergae hotel, I mean no such 4 star level establishment. Room is spacious , bathroom is, slightly older. Somebedsheets there were stains. Considering the condition of the premises the pricing is at higher end. LKR 20,000 without breakfast.
Front office is very helpful. Nallur temple is at walking distance.

Name: Jaffna Heritage Hotel
User_Review: I truly enjoyed my stay at this hotel in Jaffna. The staff were extremely friendly and attentive, which made the experience very pleasant from the start. The food was excellent – fresh, flavorful, and varied. The rooms were spotless, cozy, and beautifully designed. Overall, a wonderful experience that I can highly recommend.

Name: Jaffna Heritage Hotel
User_Review: Very close to Nallur temple and the railway station. The room had all amenities. AC and Hot water all worked perfectly. The staff were helpful and nice. Breakfast buffet was excellent with  many choices. Will definitely return when in Jaffna again.

Name: 98 Acres Resort & Spa Ella
User_Review:
Such a gorgeous hotel!
I felt like this was a magical place.
It is the perfect place for a romantic getaway.  We cannot wait to come back.
The breakfast buffet is very nice, inside and patio seating.
The room was beautifully furnished.  Our balcony had a round hanging lounger, big enough for 2 people.
Bathroom had nice amenities with shampoo, conditioner, and body wash.
The location is perfectly peaceful and quiet.

Name: 98 Acres Resort & Spa Ella
User_Review:
Staying at 98 Acres Resort was truly the highlight of our trip. The view from both the hotel and our room was absolutely breathtaking. We loved the peace, serenity, and the beautiful natural surroundings — it felt like a perfect escape. The room was clean, spacious, and very comfortable.

What we’ll miss the most is the wonderful team at the resort. The staff were exceptionally friendly, attentive, and genuinely warm. They remembered our food preferences and always greeted us with sincere, welcoming smiles. We also joined the cooking class, and the chef was incredibly kind and patient, making it such a fun and memorable experience.

Our only minor criticisms are that the mattress was on the harder side, and there’s no air conditioning, so some guests might find it a little warm during the summer months (though it wasn’t a problem for us). Additionally, while the spa room itself was lovely, the massage service didn’t quite match the standard we’ve experienced at other resorts.

Name: 98 Acres Resort & Spa Ella
User_Review:
Lovely nice Resort hotel.
Clean spacious room & bathroom
Very friendly helpful staff , all staff members are shown great hospitality.

It will be perfect , if rooms had air conditions.
Ella was so hot till evening during our stay at 98 Acres which made our stay a bit difficult due to the warm weather
Wifi connection was very poor & no connection at all most of the time.

Otherthan that we had a nice stay
Food is also tasty

Hoping to come back again during cool weather time... December- January.

Best wishes

Name: 98 Acres Resort & Spa Ella
User_Review:
A Memorable Stay at 98 Acres Resort – Ella

My wife and I had a fantastic time at 98 Acres Hotel in Ella. The view was absolutely breathtaking, and the overall service was excellent. The staff were very friendly and made us feel welcome throughout our stay.

Our room did not have air conditioning, but thanks to the cool Ella climate, it wasn’t really necessary. The swimming pool is a bit small—not ideal if you’re looking for a large pool experience—but it was still enjoyable.

The food was delicious, served as a set menu. We really appreciated the quality and taste. One small suggestion would be to include soft drinks and juices with dinner as complimentary, rather than charging separately—it would enhance the overall dining experience.

Everything else was great, and we truly enjoyed our stay. Thank you to the entire team at 98 Acres for making our trip to Ella so special!

Name: 98 Acres Resort & Spa Ella
User_Review:
​Our stay at 98 Acres Resort & Spa was nothing short of magical. The standout feature is the absolutely unmatchable view of Ella Gap and Little Adam's Peak—it's truly breathtaking.
​What made our visit perfect was the exceptional service. From check-in to check-out, every staff member was incredibly attentive, professional, and always greeted us with a warm smile, constantly ensuring our needs were met.
​The rooms were immaculate and the food was amazing. It is worth noting there's no A/C, so it can get a little warm in the room during the day, but this was a minor point in an otherwise flawless experience.
​98 Acres exceeded our expectations in every way. We highly recommend it for a luxurious and serene escape and cannot wait to return!

Name: EKHO Ella Resort
User_Review:
Lovely hotel.
Modern looking , train themed and incredible views for a well located hotel right in the main street of Ella.
Service is friendly, food was good (breakfast better than dinner).
Room was nice and bed is comfy, everything spotless clean.
Would repeat!

Name: EKHO Ella Resort
User_Review: The most unique view in Ella. The hotel is small, not too many rooms on a huge size. Good atmosphere and the service is with high attention to your needs. There is yoga in the morning and the breakfast was great as well.

Name: EKHO Ella Resort
User_Review: Came for dinner. The food was excellent. The rice and Curry was super. The service provided by Dinesh and Janith was outstanding and had paid attention to detail. This motivated us to come for breakfast tomorrow although we are on a full board basis in another hotel.

Name: EKHO Ella Resort
User_Review: What a delightful boutique hotel. Only 14 rooms but everything you want with excellent service and restaurant. Amazing location in town with fantastic uninterrupted views of Adams Peak and Ella Rock. Great Staff Sanjewa in the restaurant, Priyantha and Thakshia.

Name: EKHO Ella Resort
User_Review:
Our stay in the Junior Suite with Mountain View was wonderful. The room itself was luxurious, boasting a spectacular view and a Jacuzzi. While we were initially disappointed that the Jacuzzi wasn't working upon arrival, the staff acted swiftly and had it repaired by the evening.

What truly set this hotel apart was the staff's genuine commitment to guest satisfaction. The manager kindly offered us a complimentary dinner to make up for the hiccup. Every team member, from the gatekeeper to the waitstaff, was incredibly attentive and eager to please.

Combined with the breathtaking views, sumptuous food, and perfect location, this made for a memorable stay. We highly recommend this hotel and would gladly return.

Name: Mountain Heavens Ella
User_Review: A janky, poorly located hotel. This place really needs some updates, it has the potential to be a nice place, if it were marketed towards people who want a nice view away from the noise of the main town, but it’s ugly, outdated and run down. The artwork on all the walls would be cool if the rest of the hotel wasn’t so mismatched, and the views just aren’t worth the annoyance of getting anywhere. (A free shuttle bus might be a good idea to make it more accessible for guests, particularly considering the prices)

Name: Mountain Heavens Ella
User_Review: Absolutely amazing rooms with fabulous views.  The infinity pool was spectacular.  Staff were really good.  Not suitable for anyone with accessibility issues. Easy to get to town if you don't mind walking on the  railway tracks - which isn't as daunting as it seems as trains aren't regular and they're slow so you get plenty of warning.

Name: Mountain Heavens Ella
User_Review:
We came to Mountain heavens, on a hot day in Ella, just to use their pool. It only cost us 2000 rupees - £4.86 to enter the pool for two hours which was a great price we thought!
If you want a calming infinity pool with a lovely view of the mountains this is the best place to go.
There werent many other people there and there was an option to rent towels for 500 rupees.

Name: Mountain Heavens Ella
User_Review: An excellent hotel in a great location looking out over the Ella gap. Rooms are spacious and clean with good facilities. The restaurant is very good, great views and the service is excellent.

Name: Mountain Heavens Ella
User_Review: Great views of Ella gap. Staff is friendly and food is good. Washroom is bit smelly and we had to keep the exhaust fan on all the time.

Name: The Secret Ella Hotel
User_Review:
We had a great stay here and the family was very warm and friendly! You get a great insight into typical local life! The rooms are authentic and clean; with a hairdryer, fan, kettle, fridge available. The breakfast on the cozy terrace was great, very lovingly prepared and served, with fresh fruit, water, coffee, omelette, toast, butter, jam. We really liked the location: top view, quiet, and in 10-min walk along the train tracks you are in Ella city. We would definitely recommend the secret view homestay! The only thing that was “difficult”, was finding the right temperature of the shower; and there are a few steps to the accommodation, so it may not be the best choice for those who have difficulties with this, but otherwise everything is great!!
Regards Martina and Martin

Name: The Secret Ella Hotel
User_Review:
Nalin made it a very memorable stay in Ella for us! He helped us plan our visit and was very knowledgeable about eveything to do in the area. He also arranged a transfer for us afterwards. The room was clean and had plenty of space.
