Great breakfasts with a lovely jungle view will be one the highlights of our trips for sure. Highly recommend Secret View!

Name: The Secret Ella Hotel
User_Review: A highlight of our trip, all the comfort and bits you'd want to see in hotel, but with the charm of a homestay and amazing view, and local wildlife.

Name: The Secret Ella Hotel
User_Review: Fantastic view from balcony with very hospitable hosts. Namal and his wife went above and beyond with their hospitality. He picked us up from the station and drove us back with a welcome beverages and fruits (all free of charge). The room was clean, with hot shower and a fantastic view to Ella rock, adam’s pick and the water fall (see picture). The breakfast was also wonderful. Thank you very much for all you did.

Name: The Secret Ella Hotel
User_Review:
Secret View is one of the best home stay experiences we had in Sri Lanka.

Breathtaking views. Perched above the train tracks looking across at Ella’s Rock, Little Adam’s Peak and a waterfall. Sit on the swing and watch sunrise or the misty clouds passing. You have two viewpoints of the iconic train going by as well. It’s magic!

The space is a perfect base for exploring Ella + surrounding areas. Private balcony. Well equipped room: plenty of space and comfy seating. Extra blankets. Bed was comfy. Fan, hairdryer and TV should you need it. A fridge with cheap drinks if you’d like to buy.

What makes this place most special is Namal and his family. They were the kindest, caring and helpful people. The epitome of Sri Lankan warmth. They welcomed us with open, warm hearts. Great communication over WhatsApp. Helped us book a cooking class (Matey Hut - highly recommend). Made time to check in with us for advice and local tips. Delicious breakfasts. Tuktuk lifts to/from the town which they wouldn’t take payment for. They went above and beyond to make sure I was ok when I felt unwell.

I can’t say enough good things about Secret View and Namal + his family. Experiences like these are memories for a lifetime 💕

Name: Hotel Onrock Ella
User_Review: I had a great stay at this hotel. The rooms were very clean and well maintained. The staff were always friendly and smiling, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The food was excellent — fresh and full of flavor. The location is also perfect, just 200 meters from the main street but set on top of the road, which makes it very quiet and peaceful. Highly recommended for anyone looking for comfort, good service, and a relaxing environment.

Name: Hotel Onrock Ella
User_Review:
The staffs are all very polite and helpful, especially Suresh.

The room is also new and clean, I have a good sleep during my stay. The breakfast spread is good. During breakfast, the staffs greeted me & my family with a warm smile, and constantly checking if the food is good and if we need additional things. I will come back to stay in this hotel again if I visit Sri Lanka. Thank you for the great hospitality!

Name: Hotel Onrock Ella
User_Review: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The staff were very friendly, always ready to help with anything we needed. In particular, Mr. Suresh was exceptionally kind and attentive, which made us feel very welcome. Unfortunately, we could only stay for one night, but we truly enjoyed our time here. I would definitely love to come back!

Name: Hotel Onrock Ella
User_Review:
The room with the view of Ella rock and Little Adams peak is well worth it. It was gorgeous. The hotel staff were friendly and very accommodating and helped us with our bags and had local recommendations for dinner too.
The location is perfect if you'd like to hike up the little Adams peak (45min walk away) and be away from the hustle bustle of a tourist city.
The breakfast buffet had the best range of options salads, srilankan food and dessert was delicious!

Name: Hotel Onrock Ella
User_Review:
The restaurant of the hotel is very pricey for the quantity they provide.
Very less vegetarian options and the rooms are basic.
Location is decent and hence would recommend to eat at other cafes than to opt for hotel food.

Name: Ella Flower Garden Resort
User_Review:
We really enjoyed our stay at Ella Flower Garden Resort! The service was exceptional, especially from Nimeshika and Lalith, who went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable. Everyone else was also incredibly friendly and supportive throughout our stay.

The room was clean, spacious, and well-maintained, and the food was delicious. The main highlight of our stay was definitely the outstanding customer service — the staff truly made us feel welcome.

The only downside was that the elevator wasn’t working, so we had to climb the stairs to the 5th floor. However, everything else was perfect, and we would happily stay here again!

Name: Ella Flower Garden Resort
User_Review:
We had a really good stay at Ella Flower Garden Resort. The rooms were very clean, spacious, and comfortable – we were very satisfied. The food was excellent and really tasty.

All the staff were extremely helpful and friendly. A special thanks to housekeeping, Sanka and Vishan, who kindly helped us with our luggage, and to Prathibha, who served us our meals with such warmth and care. Their service made our stay even more enjoyable.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and we would definitely recommend this resort to anyone visiting Ella.

Name: Ella Flower Garden Resort
User_Review:
The location of the hotel is perfect. The views from the room are amazing. Everybody was nice and helpful.
At the restaurant, the food was tasty. My grilled fish was very good. And the service of Lalith was one of the best parts. I've a food allergy and he was all the time aware of making the changes in order I could eat the dishes.

Name: Ella Flower Garden Resort
User_Review:
We stayed one night  at  Ella  Flower Garden Resort and found the location convenient - just a short walk  from Ella town.

Breakfast was excellent, and both room and bathrooms were above average. What truly stood out was the friendly and attentive staff. They were always available to help us and made our stay feel welcoming.

Trailheads for  Little Adams Peak & Nine Arches  were located right  next to the Hotel making early morning starts easy. Both offered stunning views that fully justified the  moderately challenging climbs.

One area for improvement: the hotel didn’t provide any printed tourist information. Even a basic handout with a simple map, trail directions, and approximate distances would have been incredibly helpful for planning and orientatins.

Name: Ella Flower Garden Resort
User_Review:
We had a lovely experience at Ella Flower Garden Resort. The buffet was fresh and had a nice variety of both local and international dishes, and the setting overlooking the gardens made it even more enjoyable.

The service was warm and attentive, especially Lalith, who was incredibly kind and helpful. He took time to made sure we were well looked after. His friendliness really stood out and made our visit feel even more special.

Overall, a beautiful place with good food, a relaxing atmosphere, and staff who genuinely care about their guests. Highly recommend!

Name: Olympus Plaza Haputale
User_Review:
We had a wonderful time at Olympus plaza. The people there are really kind, the bar is lovely and the bartender knows his stuff ! We had the possibility to do a karaoke and an eight ball pool is also available.
The food was okay (speaking as an European).

The room we had was good, the only problem was that the shower almost fell from the wall when trying to use it. Please, screw the bathroom fixtures.

Name: Olympus Plaza Haputale
User_Review: Went here for lunch on the way back to Colombo! We ordered rice and curry and food was amazing and prices were very reasonable. Major highlight was the service of the staff at the restaurant!They were really efficient and friendly.

Name: Olympus Plaza Haputale
User_Review: If you’re ever visit Haputale, don’t miss the chance to dine at Olympus Plaza Hotel – the food here is absolutely phenomenal! From the moment you sit down, the service is warm and welcoming. Highly recommended for food lovers exploring the beautiful Haputale region.

Name: Olympus Plaza Haputale
User_Review: I appreciate the service of the staff. I informed the management that the room I was given was on the ground floor, so it was difficult for me and my wife to enjoy the beauty of the surroundings. They immediately gave me another room that was available. It was a very attractive and comfortable experience for me.

Name: Olympus Plaza Haputale
User_Review: Hot towels and welcome drink on arrival and a small gift on departure was a nice touch. Great views from the room, very quiet at night. Had the best cocktail guy - delightful to have someone who loves their job and is great at it!

Name: Melheim Resort Haputale
User_Review:
We received incredible service from Melheim Resort, Haputale during our office staff tour on 27th September 2025. The resort is well-established and set in a calm, scenic environment. The rooms were in excellent condition, and the service was outstanding from the moment of check-in.

The buffet offered a wide variety of dishes under our full-board booking, exceeding our expectations. Special thanks to Ruwani from Sales and Nishal from the Front Office for their exceptional cooperation. We also deeply appreciate the support and service provided by Madura and Asiri during our event.

Overall, Melheim Resort, Haputale is highly recommended for its hospitality, quality service, and serene atmosphere.

Name: Melheim Resort Haputale
User_Review:
We had a fantastic two-night stay at Melheim resort and spa in Haputale. The hotel has a beautiful and very well-kept garden with lovely paths to walk on. We were really impressed by how the hotel is built into the mountain, with plenty of lawns and balconies that offer amazing views of Haputale.

Our room was spacious and very clean. The views from the restaurant were a special highlight. They offered a great buffet for all three meals with a good mix of local and international food.

The staff were all very friendly and helpful. We especially want to thank Manju from the restaurant. He was so active and made sure we had everything we needed. He is a resident in the same area and gave us great tips on places to visit. His excellent service made our stay even better. We highly recommend this resort!

Name: Melheim Resort Haputale
User_Review:
We stayed at Melheim Resort and Spa, Haputale last week, and it was truly a 10/10 experience. The hotel is nestled at the edge of a breathtaking jungle, offering peaceful views, fresh mountain air, and stunning sunrises. The location is perfect for nature lovers looking to escape the chaos.

The food was absolutely delicious—fresh, flavorful, and thoughtfully prepared. Every meal felt like a treat. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, always making sure we were comfortable and happy throughout our stay.

The rooms were clean and cozy, and the view from the balcony was just magical. From jungle trails to scenic lookouts, it’s the kind of place that leaves you refreshed and grateful.

Highly recommend this beautiful hideaway to anyone visiting Haputale. Would definitely return again!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Name: Melheim Resort Haputale
User_Review: The staff is very friendly. The welcome from the reception upon entering the hotel and the tea with a beautiful view were very refreshing. The rooms are also very clean and tidy. The view from there is very beautiful. The food is also very delicious and their service is very good. Many thanks to the Melheim staff for helping us to spend our weekend comfortably...

Name: Melheim Resort Haputale
User_Review:
We visited Melheim Resort on August 30th for the day-out package. It was a wonderful experience! The hospitality was excellent, the food was delicious, and the adventure activities were great. We had a lot of fun at the pool.
A special thanks to the telephone coordinator—he gave us a great first impression of the resort. Thank you for the lovely treats!

Name: Lakshmis Hotel Ella
User_Review:
We stayed at Lakshmi's Hotel at ella a few days back and full credits to Mr. Ashok for making our stay so smooth. He informed us about everything to do in and around the area, suggested us brilliant places to visit and eat at. Property was amazing the cleanliness and the games available near reception area helped us unwind after a long b tiring day.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Would definitely recommend.

Name: Lakshmis Hotel Ella
User_Review:
Lakshmis hotel in Ella is fantastic! Great location, stunning views and a very comfy room. No AC, but not needed with the mountain breeze and fans.

It's a big hill to get there, but 100% worth it.

Lakshmi, Kurt and their staff are incredible helpful and knowledgeable- they planned my whole stay in Ella - from hikes, to cooking class to massages! The food is also stellar!

Highly recommend it and they are particularly nice for solo travelers.

Name: Lakshmis Hotel Ella
User_Review: Beautiful, peaceful location in the heart of Ella. Room was so lovely and Sam and Kurt were so helpful and accommodating with anything we needed! We wish we got to stay longer but would definitely come back :)

Name: Lakshmis Hotel Ella
User_Review: Very kind people, would take us places in their tuk tuk which was an added bonus. Organised a great cooking class for us.

Name: Lakshmis Hotel Ella
User_Review: Nice hotel to stay with excellent service. The staff is so kind en willing to do everything is service! We had a very nice stay.

Name: The Hideout Kitulgala
User_Review: We had a truly memorable stay at the hotel! The ambiance was beautiful, the rooms were clean and comfortable and overall everything was well maintained. The food was excellent and we were especially touched by the effort the staff put in to help us celebrate our father’s birthday. They prepared a lovely special dish which made the occasion even more meaningful. A huge thank you to the entire team for their amazing service and warm hospitality you truly made our stay special. We’ll definitely be back

Name: The Hideout Kitulgala
User_Review: Amazing place, so tranquil, stayed as a group of 13. Nothing was too much for them. Smooth check in and check out. All staff were amazing. Everything was super clean and comfortable including amazing rooms. Highlight was loft bedrooms. Dolib and kitchen staff looked after us well and did an amazing service.

Name: The Hideout Kitulgala
User_Review:
What a truly beautiful hotel! Everything exceeded our expectations — even more stunning than the pictures. The rooms and beds were spacious, comfortable, and tastefully designed, creating a perfect blend of style and relaxation. The surroundings were calm and peaceful, and the property was impeccably maintained.

The manager and staff went above and beyond to make our stay unforgettable. A particularly thoughtful gesture was when they prepared snacks for us and our children to take on our trip to Ambewela the next day — such genuine hospitality is rare and deeply appreciated.

We highly recommend this hotel and will definitely return. Our heartfelt thanks to the Manager and the entire team for their exceptional care and warm hospitality.
Felix & Harshani
Sri Lanka

Name: The Hideout Kitulgala
User_Review: Its beautiful.  The ambiance is very serene and there is a continuous stream of calming music playing through the lobby and dining area.  The room is spacious but reeks of moth balls (there are loads of moth balls there) but I guess its better than having tons of moths.  The staff is extremely accommodating.  I recommend booking directly with them.  Expedia messed up our reservation and the hotel staff were great at working around Expedia's mistake.

Name: The Hideout Kitulgala
User_Review: The rooms were spotless, well-maintained, and incredibly comfortable. The staff was exceptionally friendly and supportive, always ready to assist with a smile.Every meal was delicious, well-prepared, and full of flavor. The attention to detail in both service and cleanliness made our stay incredibly enjoyable. From the warm hospitality to the excellent dining experience, everything exceeded our expectations. They even didn’t forget to give us  a complimentary snack when we left, which was a lovely gesture. Highly recommended

Name: Rookwood Plantation Bungalow
User_Review: Ceylon Tea Trails exceeded our expectations. From the location, ambiance, food, staff etc. My husband and I stayed in the Norwood Bungalow and it was absolutely stunning! The gardens were well manicured and the rooms/décor were well presented. It feels like you’ve been taken back in time. The whole experience is next to no other. The staff were one of the main highlights of our stay. The staff were very friendly, accommodating and made us feel comfortable. The food was amazing too!! Oh and the views were incredible!! Overall I would highly recommend Ceylon Tea Trails. Thank you Ceylon Tea Trails for a memorable and perfect escape.

Name: Rookwood Plantation Bungalow
User_Review: The most perfect relaxing retreat in the Hill Country. The service and food is exemplary, nothing is too much trouble. Approx 30min from Hatton TrainStation & close the Seaplane at Castlereigh reservoir. Walk around the tea plantations, swim in the pool & switch off in Tea Planters Bungalow. Room Fan instead of aircon but it is cooler in the Hills  and gives the rooms that authentic colonial feel.

Name: Rookwood Plantation Bungalow
User_Review: By far, the best hospitality experience we have had in our lives! From our room to the service to the food! Amazing!!

Name: Rookwood Plantation Bungalow
User_Review: Amazing place. Need to thank all the staff especially anoj who had an eye for all our needs.

Name: Rookwood Plantation Bungalow
User_Review: Wow - amazing experience in the Norwood Bungalow taking service and luxury to a very high level. Blown away by the hospitality, the quality of the food and the views over the tea plantations from the hot outdoor jacuzzi. Thanks to Singh and the team for two fantastic days

Name: Ahaspokuna Bush Walks Camp
User_Review: This place is amazing, especially coming from England! The hospitality is great, and the staff are incredibly friendly. The location is also fantastic, and they’re very helpful with excursions and hikes. The food is incredible! They even taught us how to ride a scooter. The breathtaking views and scenery are simply stunning.

Name: Ahaspokuna Bush Walks Camp
User_Review:
Our weekend stay at the Worlds End Eco Village Farm Resort was a truly refreshing experience, set amidst a breathtaking landscape of lush paddy fields and majestic mountains. The resort's location is undoubtedly one of its strongest assets, offering a tranquil escape from the hustle and of everyday life.

Our villa was incredibly comfortable, and we particularly enjoyed the luxury of having a bathtub and comfortable beds. Resort had a well-maintained swimming pool and, even more charmingly, a beautiful natural water pool. The gardens are meticulously landscaped, creating a picturesque setting that invites leisurely moments.

The only area where the resort fell short was the food. While the menus offered promising selections, the portion sizes were noticeably small. More importantly, the taste of the dishes was not  perfect. I suspect there might be an issue with the cooking oil used, as it seemed to affect the overall flavor.

Despite the culinary aspects needing improvement, the Worlds End Eco Village Farm Resort offers a good retreat. With attention to enhancing the quality and portioning of their food, this resort has the potential to be an even more exceptional destination. I sincerely wish them good luck in addressing this, as the rest of the experience was truly good.

Name: Ahaspokuna Bush Walks Camp
User_Review:
Spent a night with friends at this lovely hotel and it was a great experience overall. The view of the mountains was absolutely stunning, and the peaceful surroundings made it the perfect escape from the city. Though the area was quiet, the gentle sound of water flowing from a small stream nearby added a relaxing touch.

The pool was a highlight, offering an amazing view of the mountains while you swim or relax by the side. Rooms were spacious and well equipped with all the facilities we needed.

We fully enjoyed the natural beauty and calming atmosphere throughout our stay. The only downside was dinner. it didn’t quite meet our expectations and left all of us a bit disappointed. However, the breakfast the next morning made up for it.

Overall, I’d definitely recommend this place to anyone looking to enjoy.

Name: Ahaspokuna Bush Walks Camp
User_Review: We had a bad experience at this hotel. Firstly, the villa we reserved was not provided upon arrival — we were given a different one without any proper explanation. The villa we booked was in the family category and we had four people. However, during checkout, the hotel charged extra for two guests without informing us in advance. The price initially mentioned was supposed to include our entire family. This lack of transparency and poor communication made our stay very unpleasant. We do not recommend this hotel to others.

Name: Ahaspokuna Bush Walks Camp
User_Review:
Greetings from England!
We recently stayed at one of the best eco hotels we’ve ever experienced. The food was absolutely amazing, and the staff were very helpful and friendly, going above and beyond by even providing a motor bike for us to explore the surrounding village and paddy fields, which look absolutely stunning. The hotel is perfectly located for some of the best mountain treks, with views and beautiful waterfalls along the way. We would definitely return and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a peaceful, nature-filled escape.

Name: Cinnamon Red Colombo Extension
User_Review:
I recently visited Cinnamon Red Colombo with my family for high tea, and it turned out to be a wonderful experience overall. The food spread was delicious, and we were impressed by the quality and freshness of the items available. The savory selections were particularly enjoyable, and there was a nice range of drinks to complement the food, which made the experience more complete.

The staff were very friendly, attentive, and welcoming, which really added to the overall atmosphere. They made sure that we were comfortable and checked in on us regularly, which we truly appreciated. Their warm service definitely elevated the experience.

The dessert corner, however, was a little limited compared to what we expected from a high tea buffet. While the available options were tasty, a wider variety would have made the experience even better. On the bright side, they had a few live action stations, including waffles, pancakes, and sandwiches that could be customized based on individual preferences. This added a nice personal touch and ensured that everyone in the family found something they enjoyed.

Overall, it was a very pleasant outing with the family. With a little more variety in the dessert section, it would easily be perfect. Still, I would definitely recommend Cinnamon Red Colombo for a relaxing high tea experience.

Name: Cinnamon Red Colombo Extension
User_Review: We stayed at Cinnamon Red Colombo for 10 days and had a wonderful experience. The staff were very friendly and always made us feel welcome. The breakfast buffet had plenty of food choices, with something for everyone. Our room was in a corner, so we got to enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city every day. The rooftop pool was clean and refreshing — a great place to relax. Overall, it’s a cozy, well-located hotel that made our long stay comfortable and enjoyable.

Name: Cinnamon Red Colombo Extension
User_Review:
The view from the room was absolutely stunning. I stayed for 9 nights, and it never lost its charm for me.

The room was clean enough, and all facilities worked well. The staff was kind and helpful.

The restaurant and breakfast options were just as you would expect. There are enough options to choose from, maybe more than you need. But, don’t expect a massive selection of international cuisine.

The hotel lobby looked slightly dated, but it was satisfactory.

A gym is available and sufficient, although it is somewhat limited.

All in all, I think it is worth the price, and its location is good.

Name: Cinnamon Red Colombo Extension
User_Review:
I had a wonderful stay at Cinnamon Red Colombo! The hotel has a modern and stylish design, with a warm and welcoming atmosphere from the moment you walk in. The room was clean, comfortable, and offered a stunning view of the city and the ocean.

One of the highlights was the rooftop pool and bar — a perfect spot to relax while enjoying the beautiful skyline of Colombo, especially at sunset. The breakfast buffet had a good variety of local and international options, and everything was delicious.

The staff were friendly, helpful, and very professional throughout my stay. The location is also excellent — close to many attractions, restaurants, and shops.

Overall, it was an excellent experience and great value for money. I’d definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Colombo!

Name: Cinnamon Red Colombo Extension
User_Review:
The location is amazing, and the service was excellent. The cleanliness was outstanding, and the pool had a fantastic view. Everything was perfect!
The receptionist named Rimondi was very friendly and helpful.
The only downside was the food — the prices on the menu seemed reasonable, but I was surprised by the added tax that was almost the same as the meal price.

Name: Paradise Eco Garden Mawanella
User_Review: best place in sri lanka. definetly this place have our heart have private pool mountain view. we create amazing memories and i highly recommend to everyone ❤️❤️thank you so much for everything. we will come back.

Name: Paradise Eco Garden Mawanella
User_Review: I recently stayed at the Paradise Eco Garden Hotel and I have nothing but positive things to say about my experience. The staff were incredibly friendly and accommodating and always willing to help with any requests I had. The hotel's location offered the best view in the mountains, truly breathtaking and it was perfect for enjoying a cup of coffee or a glass of wine in the evening. I was impressed by the hotel's commitment to being eco-friendly and the flexibility they offered to guests. Overall, I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable stay in the mountains. Five stars!

Name: Paradise Eco Garden Mawanella
User_Review: This villa offers vast mountain views and accessible without much hassle. Reaching the villa is a breeze. The natural pool's edge provides a fantastic view. The owner is amiable and accommodating, providing everything we need. Sri Lankan style homemade foods were delicious. This villa is a must-visit for if you are a nature lover and just like to sit back while taking in the beautiful views, and fresh air. A gem of a place surrounded by breathtaking mountain views. a hidden waterfall and some tea estates. The owner and the crew, food and the stunning views made this stay remarkable. Highly recommended!

Name: Paradise Eco Garden Mawanella
User_Review:
Received excellent hospitality during the visit. It’s literally the most beautiful place I’ve ever been to... Never fails to overwhelm me. We stayed at a forest dwelling, it’s a lovely two story chalet type accommodation with everything you could wish for. There's a infinity pool where you can have a nice view from there. The food is good in quality, fresh and tasty too. Very nice place in a top of a mountain with 80 acres....

A hotel designed and built in a nature-friendly way. You can see animals such as chipmunks, butterflies and magpie birds around the hallway, and the vine of the plant covers the area. There is a natural waterfall  too, where you can reach easily. So you can feel a different atmosphere. The interior of the room is maintained in an environmentally friendly way. Very comfortable beds, hot water and etc... Friendly and helpful customer service. Perfect for couples as well as families too. Eagerly waiting for visit again...

Highly Reccomended Place❤️❤️

Name: Paradise Eco Garden Mawanella
User_Review:
Well well well!
Paradise Eco Garden!
This place is one of a kind. The location is quite unique and mind relaxing. Best getaway to release all your stress.
We stayed at the wooden cabins and it was a memorable stay. We enjoyed the peaceful environment and we had our privacy. The food was great too! Hats off to the chef! If you’re planning a trip, you should definitely visit paradise eco garden to get this experience! You will get all these facilities for a very reasonable price as well. Highly recommend this place to all the nature lovers out there. Will surely visit this place again🤩❤️

Name: Belihuloya Adventure Resort
User_Review: A truly wonderful stay! The staff was incredibly friendly and made us feel very comfortable throughout. The food was absolutely delicious and freshly prepared. The view from the hotel was breathtaking with the majestic Nanperiyal mountain on one side and lush green paddy fields on the other. It’s the perfect peaceful getaway for anyone looking to spend quality time with family or friends. Highly recommended!

Name: Belihuloya Adventure Resort
User_Review: Stayed 2 nights at the hotel. Newly built hotel in a wonderful location surrounded with nature. Rooms were with all amenities. Staff was helpful and friendly. Cannot comment on food as i had meals from outside. Minor thing for improvement is all the amenities (towels, soap, water kettle) as mentioned in the website was not readily available at room. But they instantly provided upon our request.

Name: Belihuloya Adventure Resort
User_Review: We had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The staff was friendly and attentive, the rooms were clean and comfortable, and the overall service exceeded our expectations. The food was delicious with a great variety to choose from, and every meal was well-prepared and satisfying. Also our baby got a new friend too (the uncle- Ihave attached a picture) Highly recommended!

Name: Belihuloya Adventure Resort
User_Review: A family visit to a reasonable yet lovely place can create memories that last a lifetime. Choosing a destination that is affordable but still beautiful allows everyone to relax and enjoy without financial stress. A scenic park, a quiet beach, or a charming countryside spot can offer simple pleasures like picnics, nature walks, or games for children. The joy of sharing meals, laughter, and stories strengthens family bonds. It’s not about spending a lot but about spending time together. Such places remind us that happiness often lies in nature’s beauty, good company, and the warmth of togetherness away from daily routines.

Name: Belihuloya Adventure Resort
User_Review: A comfortable and well-maintained hotel that offers good value for money. The rooms were clean, the staff was friendly and helpful, and beautifully located in a peaceful setting, offering a perfect escape from the busy city life. A pleasant stay overall
